For years, Republicans have had the advantage – building their majorities in chambers and destroying progress on abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, and gun safety laws. But we are right on their heels – we have shown that when grassroots Democrats stand together, we can get real work done!
**It’s true:** Just this year, we have won 14 special elections, defying odds and breaking barriers for communities. And if we continue to build our grassroots power, there is no stopping what we can do.
**The contrast is clear – Democrats are focused on protecting our rights, while Republicans are doing everything they can to take them away.**

subject: Re: Tuesday’s election

body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=114%2E35263%2E2i-rf6 ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Peter — This is a big week for Wisconsin.

The pivotal Wisconsin Supreme Court election is this Tuesday, and it’s
mission-critical that we support the Democratic Party of Wisconsin and
their work to turn folks out to vote for progressives like Janet
Protasiewicz. [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-email-wisdems.2AFAs1&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230402_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=114%2E35263%2E2i-rf6 ]Can you split $10 between the WisDems and our team to
support our last-minute GOTV efforts?

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-email-wisdems.2AFAs1&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230402_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=114%2E35263%2E2i-rf6 ]DONATE

Janet is a community leader who firmly believes in upholding our
constitutional rights and protecting our democracy from radical right-wing
extremists.

On Tuesday, we have the opportunity to change the trajectory of
Wisconsin’s Supreme Court by electing her. We can pave a path to protect
reproductive rights, defend voting rights, and keep our elected leaders
from gerrymandering for their own political gain.

We need to elect Janet because Wisconsinites deserve a court that follows
the law, gives every case a fair hearing, and protects the rights
guaranteed to everyone in our state. Our justices should be focused on
upholding the law and doing what is right and just, not playing party
politics from the bench.

In these final days before the election, I’m hard at work reaching out to
Wisconsinites across our great state to remind them of the stakes of this
race and to make sure they turn out to vote for Judge Janet Protasiewicz.

But far-right super PACs are rushing in funds to defeat her and prop up
their MAGA candidate. They’ve spent millions of dollars spreading lies
about Janet’s record on the airwaves.

We need to step up in these final few days to make sure Wisconsinites know
the truth about the two candidates in this race and have a plan to head to
the polls. That’s why I’m asking:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-email-wisdems.2AFAs1&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230402_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=114%2E35263%2E2i-rf6 ]Will you join me in supporting progressives like Janet Protasiewicz by
splitting a donation between the Democratic Party of Wisconsin and our
team today? Any amount you can rush in today will help us turn out voters
before Tuesday’s election.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to the Democratic Party of Wisconsin and Tammy Baldwin will go
through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-email-wisdems.bjGIp9&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230402_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=114%2E35263%2E2i-rf6 ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-email-wisdems.ItsyW7&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230402_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=114%2E35263%2E2i-rf6 ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-email-wisdems.sJ3kqc&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230402_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=114%2E35263%2E2i-rf6 ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-email-wisdems.uD88Fr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230402_PM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=114%2E35263%2E2i-rf6 ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-email-wisdems.dYVf5y&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230402_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=114%2E35263%2E2i-rf6 ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-email-wisdems.2AFAs1&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230402_PM1_V1_S1&t=1012&akid=114%2E35263%2E2i-rf6 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Janet is exactly the kind of leader Wisconsinites deserve. Thank you so
much for joining me in supporting her ahead of Election Day.

Let’s do this!

— Tammy

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1002&akid=114%2E35263%2E2i-rf6 ]www.tammybaldwin.com | [ mailto:INFO@tammybaldwin.com ]INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM | [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=1003&akid=114%2E35263%2E2i-rf6 ]Privacy Policy

Welcome to _Laura Reacts to the News_! This is where you will get my take on various national news stories each week.
## **1.[Protesters descend on Florida capitol criticizing DeSantis, GOP for anti-trans bill: 'Erasing trans babies!'](https://substack.com/redirect/2e02481c-4189-4597-904f-b9abc355d211?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
##### By Garbiel Hays at Fox News
**SUMMARY:** Members of LGBTQ group "Equality Florida," and other leftwing activist groups and Democratic state lawmakers turned out at the Florida capitol recently to protest GOP-sponsored bills restricting minors' access to [sex change therapies and surgeries](https://substack.com/redirect/b133968c-87de-47fd-a03b-1236d0ff08a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
**MY TAKE:**
It's too bad we have an absentee Governor here in the state of Florida who is too busy running for President and traveling out of state on his lucrative "book tour", which is really just a shadow presidential campaign. Isn't it ironic how Governor DeSantis,[ as I have previously reported](https://substack.com/redirect/bdb5309c-87ca-4abb-8d51-61f17eb67057?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), said he was happy that January 6 defendants were being hunted down and arrested in Florida for "storming the US Capitol" on J6, but he has no problem with a bunch of tranny radicals storming the Florida State Capitol in Tallahassee and carrying out a **TRANSurrection**?
[Laura Loomer @LauraLoomerFlorida has the highest number of J6 defendants. @GovRonDeSantis said he's glad they are being arrested and jailed. As DeSantis allows for Capitol Police to have a station in Tampa for the sake of HUNTING DOWN TRUMP SUPPORTERS in Florida, he's allowing Trans activists to storm... https://t.co/4qS1fqlD5LErnie Sampera @Ernie_SamperaHappening outside House chambers right now at the Florida Capitol right now. https://t.co/1ieGNzrRtc](https://substack.com/redirect/d37d720f-cbe8-4542-a332-74f489917ace?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[10:32 PM ∙ Mar 31, 2023
* * *
2,454Likes1,373Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/d37d720f-cbe8-4542-a332-74f489917ace?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Just another reason added to the growing laundry list of reasons why I will never support Governor DeSantis, EVER again.
## **2.[Gulag America: Biden DOJ convicts Doug Mackey for anti-Hillary memes... faces up to 10 years in prison...](https://substack.com/redirect/cda860c7-29f7-4fb7-a402-d5046e216083?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
##### By Revolver News
SUMMARY: Biden's DOJ has found Doug Mackey guilty in the trial concerning his anti-Hillary memes.
As we've reported earlier, this is the most important First Amendment case in the country. The Biden DOJ is attempting to codify the disinformation scam into the criminal code. Mackey's meme conviction, for which he could face up to 10 years in prison, represents the complete breakdown of the rule of law and constitutional norms in this country--we are in uncharted territory.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e133e889-ca09-4caf-ae6c-802d7e243518?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**MY TAKE:**
It's a sad day in America when Conservative social media users are being jailed for using their First Amendment right to freedom of expression. Now more than ever, the Federal Government is hyper-weaponized against conservative Americans, and anyone who expresses dissent against the illegitimate Biden regime.

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: URGENT: Rudy Giuliani To Join Pastor's For Trump National Prayer Call TONIGHT
body:
URGENT MATTER America's Mayor, Rudy Giuliani, will be joining Pastor's For Trump tonight at 6:30pm CT for another National Prayer Call live from Tuls
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11534.1.c023c8fdb5234ba50ee88545cd9b46e0) |
---
## URGENT MATTER
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11535.1.cf739d08db66d398e21ad5bbaf3637fe)
---
America's Mayor, **Rudy Giuliani** , will be joining [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11536.1.fbdc261899a50fa29ccebb20f3c86582) tonight at 6:30pm CT for another **National Prayer Call** live from Tulsa, OK (_along with other surprise guests..._)!
Our last National Prayer Call had over 115,000 people watching live while **President Donald Trump** joined us along with **General Michael Flynn** and **Roger Stone**.
This upcoming prayer call is our **National IMPORTANCE** due to the fact that **President Trump** has been indicted by a Grand Jury in NY.
Please plan to join us to pray for our Nation and President Trump on Monday at 6:30pm CT.
If you live in the Tulsa area you are welcome to join us at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11537.1.a4ca937ef2cfb2f943262b9214e36eb8) where the broadcast will take place (doors will open at 6pm CT).
**Date** : Monday, April 3
**Time** : 6:30pm CT
**Location** : [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11538.1.750f052f2eee39786c5c66cebc7b86d8) 4121 S Sheridan Rd Tulsa, OK
**Online** : [www.Pastors4Trump.com/prayercall](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11539.1.c8fd8d7261a5240161f23ac663b334f6) as well as [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11540.1.1c2b238cf841978b6da1d54a4c533940), [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11541.1.4675cf1b7af238bfa59a7fdd4f8288fd), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11542.1.b1e7787374cb1f88891482e05807d019) & [Rumble](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11543.1.4959cd6ab834c91f5f9661d24aef799c).
Here is how you can help:
1\. Share the recorded Prayer Call of [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11544.1.03827c3528ed857c26f9a2bb92fdb5a1) w/President Trump to friends: [https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11545.1.9e0cdcbbfda270672d07d3e9e5c6165c)
2\. Invite your others to join you for Monday's National Prayer Call at [www.Pastors4Trump.com/prayercall](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11546.1.bc66c61df54e794a3cbbc14311dbcf0c).
3\. Make a donation to Pastor's For Trump of $5, $10 or more so that we can reach more Pastors across the country: [https://www.pastors4trump.com/ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11547.1.c38cc64c221e93a16dc223f79b606a25)
1. | Share the recorded Prayer Call of [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11548.1.b6868de563f3c4f34b24206a38f32ef4) w/President Trump to friends: [https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11549.1.42f26b5235c20e8dc689d7f58076de3e)
---|---
2. | Invite your others to join you for Monday's National Prayer Call at [www.Pastors4Trump.com/prayercall](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11550.1.6e987fac645d503f38d6b1e3ab145a87).
---|---
3. | Make a donation to Pastor's For Trump of $5, $10 or more so that we can reach more Pastors across the country: [https://www.pastors4trump.com/ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11551.1.80a46607daabebd0792cc9f9a314189a)
---|---
God Bless America
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11558.1.85d356e36dd414cecfd01bb0af4d2630)
## Message From President Trump
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11559.1.d6e115107a453a031ecd34be806e81c6)
---
**President Trump** issued his statement regarding our National Prayer Call on Monday night through his Truth Social account. The Fake News media called it "_horrible_ " but **President Trump** labeled it an "_honor_." **We had over 3,000 Pastors and 115,000 people live with us on the stream with just ONE days' notice.** We are preparing for the next one and _you will definitely want to be a part of it..._ You can register at [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11560.1.df0e40445dbd06536c82aca689994a5a)! **President Trump** also shared on Truth Social my Tweet about how impressive it was for him to request pray for our country instead of himself.
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11561.1.9555eece8189fb6e66833a9de428c01a)
---
If you would like to hear me explain what happened on the call when _leftist trolls_ invaded our online backstage you can listen to my interview with **OAN's Dan Ball** here: [https://www.oann.com/video/real-america-video/pastors-4-trump-host-nationwide-prayer/](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20133371.11562.1.33b42964e0eb9f9f663251e682951007)

Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Dan Kelly tried to steal Wisconsin's electoral votes for Trump in 2020. As his attempts to steal this election show, he'll do it again in 2024. He must not end up as the deciding vote on Wisconsin’s State Supreme Court, where he could again put his loyalty to Trump over his duty to democracy.
body:
Election tomorrow!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfe16b721-0660-4641-b291-45d595a67f31/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, **_The most important race of the year begins in less than 24 hours._** _**A race--for the deciding Supreme Court seat in Wisconsin--that will determine whether millions of women become wards of the state, their bodily decisions owned by religious charlatans and right-wing politicians.**_ **_A race that may decide whether criminally indicted, twice-impeached traitor, Donald Trump, can lose the popular vote a third time but just steal the electoral votes he needs to overturn our democracy, like he attempted in 2020._** [**_Right-wing nut Dan Kelly tried to steal Wisconsin's electoral votes for Trump in 2020, and as his attempts to steal this election show, he'll do it again in 2024. Will you join Blue Amp in giving $5, $10, $25 to elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz as the deciding vote on Wisconsin's Supreme Court, to protect our democracy!?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3567f539-8e23-47b7-aca4-0e6c04e842f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _If there are lingering questions as to whether the Wisconsin Republican Party and their Supreme Court Judge candidate, right-wing bigot Dan Kelly, possess the slightest bit of decency, the question has been answered. _

Will you join Blue Amp in giving $5, $10, $25 to elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz as the deciding vote on Wisconsin's Supreme Court, to protect our democracy!?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfcd3f36e-0a75-47fa-b9d5-2636e1aa4443/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **THANK YOU** Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td77c5d3f-598e-45fa-bd96-bccf6962a8e3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

_Now, in case you aren 't convinced to join his defense efforts just yet, let's get into why they're so critical._

There is no limit to what the radical Leftists will do to destroy President Trump and put him behind bars. Since his election in 2016, they've been hell-bent on destroying his legacy and making sure he can't run for office in 2024.

The list of witch hunts goes on and on. From a fake Russian hoax to two impeachments to the FBI raid on Mar-a-Lago. And now, with an arrest that's looming, it's clear that the Democrats and the deep state are out for one thing... _revenge!_

They're livid that President Trump ruined their plans by becoming President and fulfilling his promise to make America great. They can't stand that a Republican like President Trump won, and are risking it all to make sure it doesn't happen again.

They want to see the demise of ALL Republicans, and we're here to promise that we'll never let that happen.

We are sick and tired of these ridiculous theatrics from both parties, so we're taking real action. This is a simple task, but it will have a game-changing impact on President Trump's defense.

There is no limit to what the radical Leftists will do to destroy President Trump and put him behind bars. Since his election in 2016, they've been hell-bent on destroying his legacy and making sure he can't run for office in 2024. The list of witch hunts goes on and on. From a fake Russian hoax to two impeachments to the FBI raid on Mar-a-Lago. And now, with an arrest that's looming, it's clear that the Democrats and the deep state are out for one thing... revenge! They're livid that President Trump ruined their plans by becoming President and fulfilling his promise to make America great. They can't stand that a Republican like President Trump won, and are risking it all to make sure it doesn't happen again. They want to see the demise of ALL Republicans, and we're here to promise that we'll never let that happen. We are sick and tired of these ridiculous theatrics from both parties, so we're taking real action. This is a simple task, but it will have a game-changing impact on President Trump's defense. Friend,
The Failing New York Times has released rumored details of my coming **ARREST :**
_" He will be fingerprinted._
_He will be photographed._ _He may even be handcuffed._ _The former president is expected to walk through the routine steps of felony arrest processing in New York. "_
_**I am not afraid of what 's to come.**_

subject: Political persecution starts tomorrow

body:
Tomorrow is just the beginning of President Trump's battle in court, and while I think that this case is full of hot air, we still need to help him prepare for the fight. |
---

Fellow American,

Tomorrow the political dog and pony show will continue in New York City - _President Donald Trump will be arraigned._

The weak-on-crime, Soros-backed, Manhattan District Attorney Bragg will continue to weaponize the government against our nation's 45th President.

Rather than prosecute criminals who are smashing windows, robbing stores, and punching cops, he's leading a political witch hunt against President Trump. _To what end? To make a name for himself in the Democrat party?_

Tomorrow is just the beginning of President Trump's battle in court, and while I think that this case is full of hot air, we still need to help him prepare for the fight.

[**Fellow American, I want to show President Donald Trump that he has our support as he heads into court tomorrow afternoon. Can you chip in $5 or $10 before he is arraigned?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61665500:W5CKIhDVN:m:1:877327319:EC7FAA9EFF1E50E8E8CC34E865461435:r)

This indictment against President Trump in Manhattan is just like the Left's failed impeachment attempts - **a total sham.**

Thanks,

name: Greater Georgia
subject: Greater Georgia Newsletter: April 3, 2023
disclaimer_text: paid for by partisan or special interests
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kJZjcY85qgo3I9DDubwspID8hyfTaFZpRBbO4KzdVt-7heMb4ROtNQiTA_8IOCqDjig7cnr4hym6xgyZbjJJS3gnEODwSc7s1KJBqQn6ARsxd3yxqFebVpcdqaSnVjFF8p_Br8Hq1LQFS9BvR83tvOnbFEFiDRfE&c=pqFk1QfaH0uODb20NLEM4JYuiku_wVcL79NRa9i4Ir8BCCsYiL3hqQ==&ch=v7aVzDDERVrclr0fJruqJWov3DZvzkr1YFEW2iPuSzquOxTVyEc1Fg==)
---
| |
---
| The Gold Dome Download Monday, April 3, 2023
It's official: this year's legislative session has come to a close! In this week's edition of the Gold Dome Download we'll break down what big pieces of legislation passed and which ones will have to wait until next year. We hope this weekly newsletter has served as a tool to help you better follow what's going on under the Gold Dome!
---
| |
---
| ELECTIONS NEWS
---
| ZUCKERBUCKS BAN [Senate Bill 222,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kJZjcY85qgo3I9DDubwspID8hyfTaFZpRBbO4KzdVt-7heMb4ROtNWfW5d_iGeGZhRNJsb4CnqQz0d-ZcpsHvBXNE47fd_9ErBpRxY17RzOn2C1_GV7tX5-ztFNQPysI8ZUjOCPFaCgTmDNL7WA1QPoUahCDQCCaWUAZFvg7EqU=&c=pqFk1QfaH0uODb20NLEM4JYuiku_wVcL79NRa9i4Ir8BCCsYiL3hqQ==&ch=v7aVzDDERVrclr0fJruqJWov3DZvzkr1YFEW2iPuSzquOxTVyEc1Fg==) a bill to ban local elections offices from accepting outside money to fund election operations, PASSED and is heading to the Governor's desk for his signature. See Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler's statement below and [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kJZjcY85qgo3I9DDubwspID8hyfTaFZpRBbO4KzdVt-7heMb4ROtNbXrzNlNjkQt-iqZEUNquSoUTc-4uVu4tW9lrs569ICv0XIN8aZYRhA5Jcj-YrDDS9DzfyjZhJOYPIZTWZKL7v0XFSkbtK9ULft5a-KFg-o2PSfBQIwJvoZiFeEB6oJaVGOssUgkwEDgDGSiFpUe9yOjeehvBoPknkAQyDhdtaQvyyZSvVE8isTeEkNdml3GEMfaCw5-GWByXON66e-nLXpedwKkQqb-F-ddBXW-kIv2&c=pqFk1QfaH0uODb20NLEM4JYuiku_wVcL79NRa9i4Ir8BCCsYiL3hqQ==&ch=v7aVzDDERVrclr0fJruqJWov3DZvzkr1YFEW2iPuSzquOxTVyEc1Fg==) to read our official press release.
"Once again, conservative lawmakers have led the effort in Georgia to keep our elections secure, fair, and - most importantly - trusted," said Loeffler. "Senate Bill 222 builds on previous law to ensure that our election operations are never bought and paid for by partisan or special interests. This critical measure levels the playing field for election boards across our state, and safeguards them from outside influence. I am grateful to Lt. Governor Jones and Speaker Burns for their commitment to election integrity, and to legislators in both chambers who took immediate action to end this partisan practice once and for all in the state of Georgia."
---
---
| |
---
| PASSED LEGISLATION The General Assembly was hard at work this year passing legislation to enhance public safety, education, election integrity, and more. With over a thousand bills passed this year, we thought we'd spare your eyes and show you the ones that caught our attention. The bills below have all been passed, and the Governor has 40 days to sign them:
ECONOMY $1B TAX REBATE (Signed by Governor) [House Bill 162](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kJZjcY85qgo3I9DDubwspID8hyfTaFZpRBbO4KzdVt-7heMb4ROtNWfW5d_iGeGZOmOBDAbaM5_dWzTL8S0USFEs3EV20A_3NHWs3eivHXhlE0c2ZN72H-rzQ05pNJAjxXJdgdzNLnGTw7Et0q9BzeS75mezwBa-3QIcb7dXiSY=&c=pqFk1QfaH0uODb20NLEM4JYuiku_wVcL79NRa9i4Ir8BCCsYiL3hqQ==&ch=v7aVzDDERVrclr0fJruqJWov3DZvzkr1YFEW2iPuSzquOxTVyEc1Fg==)[,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kJZjcY85qgo3I9DDubwspID8hyfTaFZpRBbO4KzdVt-7heMb4ROtNXo8yqQFco6olTL6zTSDdZ8sG9_PB77pBmPEIgOpOuYvqhWXoBQC8IhGVtmXzy08zVyH1NrI_PUazAKqCSLFxdPY8twZrPeh0_yaZaqdmqiwGaHaolHHOo3ovHEkgq5cI3mE78JGfbG74AKlU4gFY8Asc0oSCyQP5A==&c=pqFk1QfaH0uODb20NLEM4JYuiku_wVcL79NRa9i4Ir8BCCsYiL3hqQ==&ch=v7aVzDDERVrclr0fJruqJWov3DZvzkr1YFEW2iPuSzquOxTVyEc1Fg==) a bill that delivers a $1B state income tax rebate to Georgia taxpayers, received final passage. It has been signed by the Governor.
FY 2024 BUDGET [House Bill 19](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kJZjcY85qgo3I9DDubwspID8hyfTaFZpRBbO4KzdVt-7heMb4ROtNbXrzNlNjkQtX7ngZgtBRA32Gy1Jtw2HF0MtFnQ_QthPfyxZ0jorTb1U83uLpd3vdCRyPp_eYTTu-xV7Xn8FTQ2lBgVESV_BrCmdfV_v_oBLJ_uub84QLfU=&c=pqFk1QfaH0uODb20NLEM4JYuiku_wVcL79NRa9i4Ir8BCCsYiL3hqQ==&ch=v7aVzDDERVrclr0fJruqJWov3DZvzkr1YFEW2iPuSzquOxTVyEc1Fg==), the Fiscal Year 2024 budget that includes pay raises for law enforcement and teachers as well as record spending for education, received final passage.
LICENSE RECIPROCITY [House Bill 155,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kJZjcY85qgo3I9DDubwspID8hyfTaFZpRBbO4KzdVt-7heMb4ROtNbXrzNlNjkQt6IWUTjn0dCqAfDd1Lh8gC0Y5u5ZWyw-RZVIhyc1LtJUv-IsUnbQOhLbiv7bgVAjCYprupVupajdClOp-n0vWekvSgRLWxbF0E3-i3n4Tpz0=&c=pqFk1QfaH0uODb20NLEM4JYuiku_wVcL79NRa9i4Ir8BCCsYiL3hqQ==&ch=v7aVzDDERVrclr0fJruqJWov3DZvzkr1YFEW2iPuSzquOxTVyEc1Fg==) a bill to recognize occupational licenses obtained in other states by new Georgia citizens, received final passage.
REDUCING BARRIERS TO EMPLOYMENT [Senate Bill 3,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kJZjcY85qgo3I9DDubwspID8hyfTaFZpRBbO4KzdVt-7heMb4ROtNbXrzNlNjkQt0tgHq5Jrnmd6cE9s6M78w1lNemP74HcjotCnlr789GAWxBUP3RZooon-M7v8uHPI3yiVJJ5_7CxIVtGq9zqhPuPhlhSvkOJOkwxjxlY0e_g=&c=pqFk1QfaH0uODb20NLEM4JYuiku_wVcL79NRa9i4Ir8BCCsYiL3hqQ==&ch=v7aVzDDERVrclr0fJruqJWov3DZvzkr1YFEW2iPuSzquOxTVyEc1Fg==) a bill to require state agencies to assess whether a 4-year degree is needed for state jobs, received final passage.

clean_body: | | | | == | | | The Gold Dome Download Monday, April 3, 2023 It's official: this year's legislative session has come to a close! In this week's edition of the Gold Dome Download we'll break down what big pieces of legislation passed and which ones will have to wait until next year. We hope this weekly newsletter has served as a tool to help you better follow what's going on under the Gold Dome! | | | ELECTIONS NEWS | ZUCKERBUCKS BAN == a bill to ban local elections offices from accepting outside money to fund election operations, PASSED and is heading to the Governor's desk for his signature. See Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler's statement below and == to read our official press release. "Once again, conservative lawmakers have led the effort in Georgia to keep our elections secure, fair, and - most importantly - trusted," said Loeffler. "Senate Bill 222 builds on previous law to ensure that our election operations are never bought and paid for by partisan or special interests. This critical measure levels the playing field for election boards across our state, and safeguards them from outside influence. I am grateful to Lt. Governor Jones and Speaker Burns for their commitment to election integrity, and to legislators in both chambers who took immediate action to end this partisan practice once and for all in the state of Georgia." | | | PASSED LEGISLATION The General Assembly was hard at work this year passing legislation to enhance public safety, education, election integrity, and more. With over a thousand bills passed this year, we thought we'd spare your eyes and show you the ones that caught our attention. The bills below have all been passed, and the Governor has 40 days to sign them: ECONOMY $1B TAX REBATE (Signed by Governor) == a bill that delivers a $1B state income tax rebate to Georgia taxpayers, received final passage. It has been signed by the Governor. FY 2024 BUDGET ==, the Fiscal Year 2024 budget that includes pay raises for law enforcement and teachers as well as record spending for education, received final passage. LICENSE RECIPROCITY == a bill to recognize occupational licenses obtained in other states by new Georgia citizens, received final passage. REDUCING BARRIERS TO EMPLOYMENT == a bill to require state agencies to assess whether a 4-year degree is needed for state jobs, received final passage. EDUCATION PROTECTING CHILDREN (Signed by Governor) ==, a bill to ban health care providers from administering hormones or performing surgeries to change the gender of underaged children, received final passage. It has been signed by the Governor. SCHOOL SAFETY TRAINING ==, a bill to mandate school safety training, received final passage. IMPROVING LITERACY ==, a bill to require the State Board of Education to approve materials to improve the literacy rate of students in K-3rd grade and ==, a bill to establish the Georgia Council on Literacy, received final passage. PUBLIC SAFETY CREATING DISTRICT ATTORNEY OVERSIGHT ==, a bill to establish ancommission that will investigate and remove District Attorneys if they are found to be in willful misconduct in office or incapable of performing their duties, received final passage. COMBATTING GANG VIOLENCE ==, a bill to establish a mandatory minimum sentence of 5 years in prison for gang activity, received final passage. PREVENTING HOMELESS ENCAMPMENTS ==, a bill to prohibit local governments from blocking the removal of homeless encampments, received final passage. ELECTIONS ZUCKERBUCKS BAN ==, a bill to ban election offices from accepting outside money to fund elections operations, received final passage. TIME OFF TO VOTE ==, a bill to provide time off for employees to vote, received final passage. OTHER TIKTOK BAN == a bill to ban TikTok and other foreign-owned technology on state devices, received final passage. SUPPORTING MOTHERS ==, a bill to allow low-income expectant mothers to receive assistance through the state's TANF program, received final passage. | | LEGISLATION THAT DID NOT PASS Below are bills that did not pass this year. Although they didn't make the cut this year, they will still be in play next legislative session. SCHOOL CHOICE ==, a bill to create a $6,000 voucher program for students wishing to attend the private school of their choice, failed to pass. HATE CRIMES ==, a bill to define antisemitism to aid prosecutions for antisemitic hate crimes, failed to pass. SPORTS BETTING ==, a bill to legalize and tax sports betting with revenue dedicated to the state lottery, failed to pass. BUCKHEAD CITYHOOD == a bill to enable the formation of the City of Buckhead, failed to pass. CASH BAIL bill to require cash bail for a list of new crimes, failed to pass. PROTECTING GEORGIA LAND ==, a bill to ban foreign entities from purchasing Georgia farmland or any land in close proximity to our military bases, failed to pass. JUSTICE THOMAS STATUE == a bill to build a statue of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas on the Capitol grounds, failed to pass. CERTIFICATE OF NEED == a bill to modify the state's Certificate of Need law, failed to pass. | | | KNOW YOUR STATE SENATE & HOUSE MEMBERS | | | | Senate Freshman Senator Shawn Still == is from Georgia's ==, which encompasses Johns Creek, Sugar Hill, and Suwanee. Senator Still sits on the following committees: State and Local Governmental Operations - Vice Chairman, Education and Youth, Natural Resources and the Environment - Secretary, and Transportation. This year, Senator Still sponsored 10 bills and 3 resolutions, including ==, the Landscape Equipment and Agricultural Fairness (LEAF) Act. Click == to visit the Senate website. | | | | House Freshman Rep. Matt Reeves Representative Matt Reeves serves the == of Georgia which includes Duluth and Suwanee. Representative Reeves sits on the following committees: Judiciary - Vice Chairman, Judiciary Non-Civil, and Reapportionment and Redistricting - Secretary. Representative Reeves sponsored 19 bills and 6 resolutions, including ==, the Safer Hospitals Act. Click == to visit the House website. | | | THANK YOU LEGISLATORS Thank you again to our Georgia lawmakers who upheld our conservative values by passing pivotal legislation addressing crime, election integrity, education, and more. Together we are building a Greater Georgia! | | | | WHAT WE'RE READING | ==- 'Zuckerbucks' banned by Georgia lawmakers on legislative session's last day == - Senate Votes to Overturn Biden Clean-Water Rule == \- US attorney declined to prosecute 67% of arrests in DC as nation's capital suffers crime spike ==- Why China props up Putin == - Biden EPA Chief Wants Funding To Hire Hundreds Of 'Environmental Justice' Bureaucrats | | GET INVOLVED Greater Georgia's work is critical to defending conservative values, and it is only possible through the hard work and support of strong, grassroots volunteers. We need your help! -- Click the buttons below to find out how you can join the fight for conservative values. | | == | | == | | | To learn more, visit ==, and follow along on ==, ==, and == to stay up to date with the latest information. | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. name: Patriots for Trump (via Senate Republicans)
subject: Here’s what we have to say about Donald Trump
body:
| |
---
| | | To give you the bottom line up front:

_**[For today only, your pledge to defend Trump will be flagged _specifically_ for the President. This allows you to be one of the select few that President Trump can see as a top defender with his own two eyes!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62512970:6Rt5R_GMN:m:1:3365131770:C19E2CEC1E76FF078AFEF7F8A657FF4B:r "For today only, your pledge to defend Trump will be flagged specifically for the President. This allows you to be one of the select few that
President Trump can see as a top defender with his own two eyes!")**_
---
| | [LET TRUMP KNOW HE CAN COUNT ON YOU](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62512970:6Rt5R_GMN:m:1:3365131770:C19E2CEC1E76FF078AFEF7F8A657FF4B:r "LET TRUMP KNOW HE CAN COUNT ON YOU")
---
_Now, in case you aren 't convinced to join his defense efforts just yet, let's get into why they're so critical._

There is no limit to what the radical Leftists will do to destroy President Trump and put him behind bars. Since his election in 2016, they've been hell-bent on destroying his legacy and making sure he can't run for office in 2024.

The list of witch hunts goes on and on. From a fake Russian hoax to two impeachments to the FBI raid on Mar-a-Lago. And now, with an arrest that's looming, it's clear that the Democrats and the deep state are out for one thing... _revenge!_

They're livid that President Trump ruined their plans by becoming President and fulfilling his promise to make America great. They can't stand that a Republican like President Trump won, and are risking it all to make sure it doesn't happen again.

They want to see the demise of ALL Republicans, and we're here to promise that we'll never let that happen.

We are sick and tired of these ridiculous theatrics from both parties, so we're taking real action. This is a simple task, but it will have a game-changing impact on President Trump's defense.

_**[If you want to go down in history as someone President Trump can rely on, please provide your pledge today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62512970:6Rt5R_GMN:m:1:3365131770:C19E2CEC1E76FF078AFEF7F8A657FF4B:r "If you want to go
down in history as someone President Trump can rely on, please provide your pledge today. ")**_

Our grassroots coalition is the final line of defense. We're imploring you to act NOW because the grand jury just indicted President Trump, and his arrest is near.

Thank you,

Patriots for Trump

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Republicans taking aim at the Endangered Species Act
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1703334?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Stop the Republican “Extinction Package” of bills that GUT the Endangered Species Act and STRIP PROTECTIONS for gray wolves, grizzly bears, and more!**[**Please, Friend, act now to STOP REPUBLICANS before it’s too late!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1703335?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Since taking back the house, _**Republicans have introduced over a dozen bills targeting the Endangered Species Act!**_ This bedrock environmental law doesn’t just **protect more than 1,300 endangered and threatened species** in the U.S. -- it’s also a critical tool for preventing corporate polluters from DECIMATING wildlife habitats and STRIPPING our public lands of their natural resources. **_Without the ESA, more communities will face air and water pollution from Big Oil. _** Republicans even take aim at specific endangered animals in some bills. **Grizzly bear mamas and their cubs wandering the great expanse of Yellowstone National Park.** Gray wolves trotting through the Northern Rockies. Both these iconic creatures could be delisted and then TARGETED with brutal tactics by trophy hunters. **[We need at least 3,489 more people to send a message to their Representative. Friend, help PROTECT the Endangered Species Act from Republican attacks!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1703336?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1703337?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This “Extinction Package” from Republicans goes even further.**One bill would prevent species like giraffes, elephants, and other foreign species from being protected by the Endangered Species Act! **Another would allow the military to _**VIOLATE PROTECTIONS**_ for endangered species without consequence.
Republicans have made one thing clear, Friend. They are more than willing to sell out our endangered species to allow corporate polluters and Big Oil to **_bulldoze through critical habitats_** and **_extract fossil fuels for their own profit,_** despite the impact on our communities and the animals. **That’s why we need YOUR help to stop them. [STOP Republicans from taking a wrecking ball to the Endangered Species Act! Please add your name by 11:59pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1703338?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1703337?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio
Fossil fuels program manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: RELEASE: Dave Min Raises Over $520,000 In First Quarter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024**
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f3c2131ce9e9/releasedave-min-raises-over-520000-in-first-quarter-15652951?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** April 3, 2023
**Contact:[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com)**
**Dave Min Raises Over $520,000 In First Quarter** **IRVINE, CA** — Today, State Senator Dave Min reported raising over $520,000 from January 18th to March 31st for his campaign for Congress in California’s 47th Congressional District. Since launching his campaign, Min has built an incredible campaign team, with endorsements from incumbent Congresswoman Katie Porter, SEIU California, the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership ASPIRE PAC, and more than a 100 local and state elected officials. California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that is being vacated by Rep. Porter who is running for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% and political handicappers have ranked it as a “toss up” district and a must win for Democrats in order to take back the House in 2024. **“Dave Min has proven he can win in a red district, proven to be a consequential legislator, and has built a campaign that will win in 2024,”** said Fundraising Director Isabel Ocampo. **“The outpouring of support from Orange County voters is incredible, and we are so grateful for the hundreds of contributors, volunteers, and supporters who are the backbone of this campaign.”** The commanding early fundraising numbers from Min highlight the campaign’s strong grassroots support, with 78% of contributions being under $250, and are coupled with a truly jaw dropping list of local, state, and national endorsements. In recent weeks, Min has announced the endorsements from SEIU, the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers Local 47, California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis, Attorney General Rob Bonta, State Treasurer Fiona Ma, Insurance Commissioner Ricard Lara, Superintendent of Public Schools Tony Thurmond, the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership ASPIRE PAC, more than 50 local Orange County government officials, and more than 60 state legislators. A full endorsement list is available[ here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=fd6d7065b1&e=7017cc100e). Senator Min, the only Korean-American in the state legislature, serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. Min has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader in the Senate, authoring 16 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on hate crimes, gun violence prevention, family safety, and women’s reproductive rights. In the wake of the 2021 Huntington Beach Oil Spill, he stood up to the oil industry and led efforts to end offshore drilling. Min serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. He previously chaired the Senate Cybersecurity Select Committee. Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law. He resides with his wife Jane Stoever, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout. ** ** ############

_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._
---
| |
---

PO Box 5959
Irvine, CA 92616

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr26qks5skk6d675f60agmsrmvfqkt1s1chc0mag_rp22sh2s8i66o70clj6eor1chh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5ln14npeorruq4d69uijsjn81qm8qj2gmd4p4gg_rp22sh2s8i66o70clj6eor1chh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zstgkhfp36aa5nldfe28thiv615tt2tbmlgokmmg_rp22sh2s8i66o70clj6eor1chh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zimqlajkt61n7i1nkb7jpsbfse4ugbcvpcnu3t40_rp22sh2s8i66o70clj6eor1chh2bs)

**I'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating any amount today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513389:J-LSjxGGN:m:1:3391001263:A07289C4175A483622396BDB49F379E8:r)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513389:J-LSjxGGN:m:1:3391001263:A07289C4175A483622396BDB49F379E8:r)

Kash Patel

---
| | | Donald Trump is about to be formally charged with a range of crimes by NY authorities, a process that will start with his official arrest. Typically, this involves being handcuffed, fingerprinted, and getting a mugshot, but Trump reportedly will not have to go through all of these steps, given his status as a former president. **This is a terrible idea. If no one is above the law, then Trump should be treated like every other prisoner, starting with the first step**. So handcuff him, take a mugshot, get fingerprints, and go through all the usual steps. [**Add Your Name: Don't Give Trump Special Treatment When He's Arrested.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6059da17-d605-4b68-99e6-47049cff5f88/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

_" The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Growing up poor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor
in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.

Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going
to stand for that.

Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and
the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs
to name just two.

Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I
worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in
Congress.

The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht,
the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving
relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an
America that lives up to its ideals.

As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned
growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.

I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re
going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18922?t=1001&akid=3113%2E346206%2EEu8ood ]Can you please split a $25 contribution between Charles Booker and my
United States Senate campaign today? I would not ask if this was not so
important.

CHIP IN →

The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to
sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do
yet, either.

Thank you, and adiós,

Ruben

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230403-3113-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3113_346206_Eu8ood&akid=3113%2E346206%2EEu8ood

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3113%2E346206%2EEu8ood

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

The Failing New York Times has released rumored details of my coming **ARREST :**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: Our faith, our fight, and the battles ahead
body:
We need your help. | | | | | |
---
| | Hi Friend,
This update is a bit of a mashup. Many things are happening, some good, some challenging, but all very much a part of our continued battle for the Republic. However, that’s not where I’d like to start.
This week is what Christians refer to as Holy Week, beginning on Palm Sunday, when Jesus entered the city of Jerusalem, followed by a daily progression of deeply symbolic events leading to His crucifixion on Friday, then a glorious end (and beginning) on Easter Sunday with His resurrection. Humanity was forever shifted through Jesus’ sacrifice. Total, perfect, unconditional love. His death made the way for our salvation.
This Holy Week 2023 it appears we will also see the indictment of President Trump. I don’t know what this confluence of events means, but I do know it means something - at a minimum, that we should pay attention, because the timing is not accidental. Pay close attention. And pray. There are no coincidences. God is always at work.
Though we are not facing indictments, True the Vote is also enduring a very difficult season, planning and preparing for 2024 plans, while battling lawsuits on six separate fronts.
My personal commitment to you is to remain ever vigilant and always transparent. So I feel led to share this very directly and urgently - I am asking for your help.
We are working tirelessly to remain one step ahead of the opposition, to stand in resolve, and to stay alive, while [**navigating the greatest financial burdens we’ve ever experienced.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=4f8e3e825c&e=ad8cba7e98) Quitting is not an option. So while our course does not change, the “going” is getting increasingly more tough.
It’s not often that I ask for help this poignantly, but this week, Holy Week, with all that is happening in our world, I am coming to you with urgency, seeking your support.
[**We ask for your consideration in giving whatever amount you can. Every penny will be put to immediate use.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=1e2c1cdc78&e=ad8cba7e98)In return, we will continue to fight on your behalf, day after day, against enemies both foreign and domestic, in unending defense of your right to have your vote counted and your voice heard.
Many battles lie ahead. We are here for such a time.
Keep the faith.
Ever onward -
---
_**PS Our Monday night Locals livestream will be rescheduled for later this week so that we can bring you more direct news of unfolding events.**_
|
---
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=793253bf87&e=ad8cba7e98)
|
---
| | | | |
---

You are receiving this email because you opted in for updates via the True the Vote website.

**Our mailing address is:**
True the VotePO Box 3109# 19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=d187f7e213) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=d187f7e213).
|

Friend, Marjorie Taylor Greene here:

**Let me be clear:** the Left wants us to overreact so they can silence us all and destroy our MAGA movement for good.

But I’m not falling for this Soros backed trap, and I know you aren’t either Friend.

_**Instead, House Republicans and I are fighting to end the weaponization of our government and stop the Witch Hunt! **_

name: Caroline Colarusso
subject: I'm Voting Steve Ternullo Tuesday April 4th in Stoneham
body:
Polls Open 7 am to 8 pm
| | |
---
|
---
| Stephen Ternullo Running for Stoneham Select Board Tuesday April 4th

---
|
---
| Friends,

Over the last few years in Stoneham I have watched our taxes and fees drastically increase. Our roads are some of the worst in our area and no one has a vision or a plan to improve them.
This week I had the opportunity to watch and listen to the Select Board candidates participate in a local forum. I have concluded that for me there is only one choice for Selectman, a United States Army Veteran named Steve Ternullo. WATCH HERE: [https://videoplayer.telvue.com/player/MYHMRKXBbGFaah07vKkZ_-J4SThODdPq/media/789462?autostart=false&showtabssearch;=true&fullscreen;=false](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IiLP3363kF-kSDMjZ7xQd2iKfWgsMEqpO6rPgsPca_kYvzQRnPch98zAqFHg9D2AKhIn1-ExXXXrSUH_RGip2u0Eu90424WSPi8UiQaMj5mIZP65QGG5VF4NKj7_BJ1AfG5xYJuXZsAMwQNh3mYPgWNbgn2y3Jtb3JRbzeKI1LH6rbqWkjeW-X8xMMyd6rFLAUxUIK34Eix-BsZBn-ZWHH0sVXZfjXyhoC5zo_U3vek6mA44FHSY_HrWBb3QpP-tJOaYDS5FXwRSi0PkjL3HmmlA-YloKZrEqOz3ioQgsHE1yS9AGhHr9dAz2nMbDak_&c=_y42XjcwocnWqRXywl5DCVO8M0qMyxZa_dczL_A4oN7swP--S0ht1w==&ch=uQQhhWWoxD5-nYMkLtI6p9Kye1_WV9UsxY6McyZ4wXXx9bFuWXmHww==)
Listen to each candidates' responses in a short 20 minute debate. Steve Ternullo has a passion for advocating for the taxpayer and a passion to improve the town of Stoneham. If you live in Stoneham please be informed, if you know someone who lives in Stoneham share the video link with them. The Stoneham town election is this Tuesday April 4th. Polls open from 7:00 am to 8:00 pm.
Sincerely, Caroline Colarusso Former Stoneham Selectwoman
---
---
| | | | | | | Caroline Colarusso | 4 Patrick Circle, Stoneham, MA 02180

body:
Levin hit the nail on the head.

| |

---
| | | **Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_" The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

Don't legitimize this partisan Witch Hunt with your silence!

We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:
_**[Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z261apoelfg96csdp327k1q973576b09sbo37f1o_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgm8oj6chh2bs "Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**_
We need 1,000,000 signatures before he's arraigned so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**

This could be your last chance to add your name before he's arraigned.
**[SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd58qm7lpbdg33nd0b6rtq1r7mtkmb6bkqgvm120_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgm8oj6chh2bs "SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**
We'll be on the lookout for your name.

Thank you,

House GOP

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Wisconsin’s State Supreme Court race will determine whether millions of women become wards of the state, their bodily decisions owned by religious charlatans and right-wing politicians. Your help is urgently needed.
body:
Election Day tomorrow!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc8ef773-2b1c-4387-ba58-daafa787a0a3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_The most important race of the year begins in less than 24 hours._** _**A race--for the deciding Supreme Court seat in Wisconsin--that will determine whether millions of women become wards of the state, their bodily decisions owned by religious charlatans and right-wing politicians.**_ **_A race that may decide whether criminally indicted, twice-impeached traitor, Donald Trump, can lose the popular vote a third time but just steal the electoral votes he needs to overturn our democracy, like he attempted in 2020._** [**_Right-wing nut Dan Kelly tried to steal Wisconsin's electoral votes for Trump in 2020, and as his attempts to steal this election show, he'll do it again in 2024. Will you join Blue Amp in giving $5, $10, $25 to elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz as the deciding vote on Wisconsin's Supreme Court, to protect our democracy!?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te175ef92-4e70-45e9-bfbc-1f6c88063025/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _If there are lingering questions as to whether the Wisconsin Republican Party and their Supreme Court Judge candidate, right-wing bigot Dan Kelly, possess the slightest bit of decency, the question has been answered. _
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae540a15-1926-4f37-a4d3-07b84cae845f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_This weekend, these power-mad con artists texted a fake alert about REAL TORNADO threats to try and suppress the votes of Democrats supporting pro-choice, democracy champion, Judge Janet Protasiewicz._** Yes, really: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38c3bca2-c8f2-418d-88d4-b371efb1d18a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Another sick, new low for a group of criminally corrupt, cruel and incompetent cretins willing to steal power at all costs. Democracy be damned._ [**_We know Dan Kelly tried to steal Wisconsin's electoral votes for Trump in 2020, and as his attempts to steal this election show, he'll do it again in 2024. Will you join Blue Amp in giving $5, $10, $25 to elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz as the deciding vote on Wisconsin's Supreme Court, to protect our democracy!?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta61864e5-6c84-4ed6-ae1d-ce900e03c0f6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **THANK YOU** Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90df7f3d-af1e-4d4b-99e0-467350ac0c04/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/protasiewicz24hours-wisupremecourt2-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T09c26e67-b4e3-4561-b122-22fd3cbcc98e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=e9fff56f-ff6a-43e2-a2a9-cfe725a5ce91&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=e9fff56f-ff6a-43e2-a2a9-cfe725a5ce91&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Our vindication is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
“A Republic, if you can keep it.”
| | | [ ](https://email.info.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuYFgbGxy4NCtxaGRKrWq2lUv0cQeh1lhg8A03X9fEWV7_d7T6H0ajMvE4b0X5kUAjOw3ASDkJwFwVi-vX_X519mW2HzvSqtbdT9S-CwA8vtC_6vPKxVF5Omgxha-11fVGF9Q3-iubqHrQBVjH5pTqBHAgzStBsRw8mBIhWBalOAL7qEGWataNlJKBZUJhjrllJT-6t3JCVVzCnPl54STf8vrHpfKzbGY-jHnZXtsGgQMG7l9perOaSV_NA6Gf6jESCs7LN9mTrkMe_Ir8sbpVro5Rs6ZSMCgQ_B4JX_toKvJtEIOe46XSJ73KKR92uoDbvO-OhLSOr7gkzmMC_ItCWk_jD6SOWVKWUjbtfokQF_SxF5I-2N4zfj35z5-ecDHP6S92fiNNf62xdr75c7TxJs2QtW3Y8Eh9i8AAP__T2qNgQ)
---
Friend,
November 5, 2024 will no longer just be an Election Day.
It will be our Vindication Day.

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqmh528moqslr1ccj9r5f22d4795fi2hna3ffeso_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgm4p32chh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkb4mhsv0bdhe8r4hlfe3vn6li0a783opvcf0ds0_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgm4p32chh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4g35p27tum2ebjh920bq0tq1cgt9tjag3in17rg_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgm4p32chh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

body:

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? body:
Let's make the most of our final push to protect our kids.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/0jI_opInxTNoLf-WduVGORuJBL3X_hhr5u_aDJJJxgA=/IhVI-n3nurZPbzZd-tAWbOc7TnMooYSiqQSTyrKUSy0=?refcode=EM_FR_230403Finalpush_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_A_Logo)

Can you rush a donation of $10 or more to help us keep up the pressure to defend our kids, schools, and local government?](https://act.myngp.com/el/0jI_opInxTNoLf-WduVGORuJBL3X_hhr5u_aDJJJxgA=/IhVI-n3nurZPbzZd-tAWbOc7TnMooYSiqQSTyrKUSy0=?refcode=EM_FR_230403Finalpush_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_A_L1&amount=10)**

For months we have worked together in order to build a strong line of defense against extremists. Now, the clock is ticking down to 7 pm on Election Day, and we're almost out of time to give our progressive candidates one final push before Election Day!

Extremists are on the ballot in local races all across our state, and they are more than eager to see us falter in these final moments -- but, with your help, we can stop them.

We've been warning you about these candidates. With only a few hours left until voters vote in person, it is essential we make the most of the time we have left.

**[Fellow Democrats, you have been there for us these past several months, and there is no doubt in our mind that you will be here for us in these last critical hours. Can we count on you to pitch in $25, $10, or even $5 right now to help us give progressive candidates the push they need heading into Election Day?](https://act.myngp.com/el/0jI_opInxTNoLf-WduVGORuJBL3X_hhr5u_aDJJJxgA=/IhVI-n3nurZPbzZd-tAWbOc7TnMooYSiqQSTyrKUSy0=?refcode=EM_FR_230403Finalpush_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_A_L2&amount=10)**

name: PA Democrats
subject: ICYMI: The PA Supreme Court is on the line
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/PDP%20Primary%20Logo.png]
Hey Peter,
In case you missed our email from yesterday, we wanted to make sure you had a chance to help us meet our end of quarter deadline.
Rush a $20 donation now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=April3email&express_lane=true&amount=20]
As right-wing extremists attack our democracy and access to reproductive care, it's critical that we build a strong line of defense by electing a Democratic judge this November. Chip in $5 or $10 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=April3email&express_lane=true&amount=5]
-----Forwarded message-----
From: Pennsylvania Democrats<hq@padems.com>
Date: Thurs, Mar 30, 2022 at 2:00 PM
Subject: The PA Supreme Court is on the line
Hey Peter,
Tomorrow is our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. With municipal and statewide elections quickly approaching, we need your support to ensure we elect Democrats across the state and elect a Democratic Supreme Court judge.
Make a $10 recurring monthly donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=April3email&recurring=1&express_lane=true&amount=10]
Here's why it’s imperative that we elect a Democratic judge this November:
As you know, in 2020, Democratic judges on the Pennsylvania Supreme Court were our primary defense against Republican attempts to overturn election results and ensure free and fair elections in our Commonwealth.
And those radical election deniers haven’t gone anywhere. In fact, some of them are currently serving in the statehouse. With our democracy still under attack, it’s critical that we have a strongly Democratic Supreme Court to act as a firewall against any bogus conspiracy claims they’re sure to make in the upcoming 2024 presidential election.
This month, a Trump-appointed federal judge is likely to rule to restrict access to mifepristone, the abortion pill used in more than 50% of abortions. This ruling will severely disrupt access to reproductive care nationwide. If we don’t elect a Democratic judge to the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, there’s no doubt that Republicans will use the courts to attempt to restrict abortion access.
As if that wasn’t enough, this year all of our County Commissioners are up for election. While not commonly known, these are crucial roles in ensuring our elections are secure and fair. It is vitally important that these roles are filled with candidates who will stand up to attacks on our democracy.
It's clear how incredibly important it is to have the right people on the bench - people who will speak and stand up for us – the people of Pennsylvania – not extremists.
Protecting our democracy means protecting our courts, and we are counting on you. Donate NOW to help us reach our end-of-quarter goal by tomorrow. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=April3email&express_lane=true] We're just $2000 away. >>>
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=April3email&express_lane=true&amount=10]
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=April3email&express_lane=true&amount=25]
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=April3email&express_lane=true&amount=50]
Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=April3email&express_lane=true&amount=100]
Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=April3email&express_lane=true&amount=250]
Other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=April3email&express_lane=true]
Thank you for your support,
PA Democrats
PA Democratic Party
229 State Street
Harrisburg, PA 17101
United States
https://www.padems.com [https://www.padems.com]

name: Jon Tester
subject: How I stay grounded
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61202713/399421310/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjk5MTdiNC0yOGQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Od3siygwAt9gR7IDnqZORsBc-zP7dFGgxFzEwA8NroM=&emci=549917b4-28d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5b9917b4-28d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=4568237)

| | Can I explain something, Derek? I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents. In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — **as a farmer.** Every spring, I spend a lot of weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive. I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand. The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded. **And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.** **_[**That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $5 between Mark Warner and my campaign today to help us block Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate. Anything you can give makes a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61202715/399421321/-1842154350?refcode=mw_em_230403_1_a&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjk5MTdiNC0yOGQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Od3siygwAt9gR7IDnqZORsBc-zP7dFGgxFzEwA8NroM=)_** ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61202719/399421352/-1842154350?refcode=mw_em_230403_1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjk5MTdiNC0yOGQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Od3siygwAt9gR7IDnqZORsBc-zP7dFGgxFzEwA8NroM=)**** Thank you so much for sticking by me. I promise to spend every ounce of time fighting for you and your families (when I’m not out in the field, of course). — Jon ** ** ** ** ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61202722/399421355/-1842154350?refcode=mw_em_230403_1_a&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Yjk5MTdiNC0yOGQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Od3siygwAt9gR7IDnqZORsBc-zP7dFGgxFzEwA8NroM=)**** ** **
