clean_body: | | | Can I explain something, Derek? I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents. In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — as a farmer. Every spring, I spend a lot of weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive. I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand. The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded. And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do. = **= Thank you so much for sticking by me. I promise to spend every ounce of time fighting for you and your families (when I’m not out in the field, of course). — Jon = | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

Friend, I've been in politics a _long_ time.

I got my start in local politics in Baton Rouge in the 1980s, worked my way up to Bill Clinton's 1992 presidential campaign, and since then I've worked on campaigns around the U.S. and the world. **But here's the thing:**
**I have never seen a political party as cuckoo as the GOP today.**
From extending Trump's tax breaks for the wealthy to chipping away at our fundamental rights like voting and accessing health care, **the GOP of today is threatening our very democracy.**
But, friend, it gets worse. Republicans took back the House last year, so a lot of what they're planning _could actually happen._

**That's why this is urgent.** **We NEED to take back the House and hold on to our Senate majority next year, and in order to do that, we have to start NOW.**

At American Bridge, our mission is to hold Republicans accountable and DEFEAT them at the ballot box. **But we can't do it without you, friend.****[That's why I set a goal to raise $10,000 by midnight, so I am asking personally: Please, can you rush $15 or more to American Bridge right now to build up our resources so we can stop Republicans like Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis and Kevin McCarthy in their tracks?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61202701/399421281/1983311359?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2422-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiZmFiNTg4LTI4ZDItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Hk8T--NNn0-KofMhFU1smYcRisW_QCwa0ZXoM8Z08Yw=)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04747%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KSfT4IKLB4Vpbpbn1%2f8IgA&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04748%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Qmf4sl2w9g3XbdAvr99Qvg&sysid=1) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04749%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bZOVE9N0smbIz3gRggVrbA&sysid=1)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c04740%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oqtIYn%2bjuYPjQ53J5gj2Pg&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

Your America News

The Failing New York Times has released rumored details of my coming **ARREST :**
_“He will be fingerprinted._
_He will be photographed._ _He may even be handcuffed._ _The former president is expected to walk through the routine steps of felony arrest processing in New York.”_

This is the battle I willingly signed up for when I decided to take on the entire Washington Machine as a political outsider 8 years ago, and be YOUR voice.
Nothing worthwhile in life ever comes easily. And I can think of nothing more worthwhile than the noble mission to SAVE _AMERICA._

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Thank you for your early support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress **[marcykaptur
body:
People like you are powering this campaign forward. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61204445/399428011/-818894537?refcode=EM_FR_230403TY_N_MK_45DA_3_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzBmZWVkZC0yYmQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Pkar7aldnT1ui0y-aNzqIn8Sq0tBW_Dld_ZeAnlW_g=)
---
We just finished up our first end-of-quarter filing period, and I want to say THANK YOU for helping power our campaign forward.

This was a big moment for our campaign, and we met the moment. To take back the House majority, we must win in toss-up races like ours. Early investments into our campaign make a big difference in what we can plan for in the coming months that will set us up for success.

While the race is still a ways away, I’m working hard in the House to deliver for Ohioans – as I’ve done my entire career. I’m grateful that you’re on my team along the way.

Thank you,

Marcy Kaptur
---
| | Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za8bufgco011pvcmrd1e9oqjf80o5p9uoqtsdg10_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgmapr2clh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmsbb8v6h5dvv4b1ag6328nj5tu3q3hhqk77grn8_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgmapr2clh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z04vf1rccm30sb9upuhvkketj171t33g9ch1sms0_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgmapr2clh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi6oe4ki2il3fcc6sbh63i4vogeljbpkt4kgm7m8_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgmapr2clh2bs)

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcpnpd4f13027144c0lfve78in37750a81rv9c0o_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgmapr2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc78aosagp5buajimojfestptclp50kobrp2fle8_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgmapr2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztcne9a1lcgp5pptuho9fnltb935f7smb6fe0r3o_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgmapr2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj0l87v7ria2a5ps31frl30pvq769226c6cslug0_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgmapr2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z05me514sdj4fu4smts6mah14susrgap0l6e0sb8_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgmapr2clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1o5ahdarpfeea611p32b2g1492igr8ee0uu8olg_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgmapr2clh2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zon1t95pfkqmng2eqos72outv82rc69jq5gahdpo_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgmapr2clh2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbuarr022q6ksb5p0o7c1qqgkchjt67kajt7sfjg_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgmapr2clh2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zg7f8jgnsj2pi7uokaefr0nfqcatkhfp4bi3jcj0_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgmapr2clh2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znc6o1qc8910f2n3d75gl0bfrm999jt7r26fc3k8_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgmapr2clh2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

name: Alexander Hyatt
subject: Activate your membership
body:
The Heritage Foundation is excited to welcome new members in 2023
{{md5_hash}}

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmhthomffthopt8deqp03rm930jmf9tf2clgqo5g_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgm2o76cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,

I hope this email finds you well. The Heritage Foundation is excited to welcome new members in 2023, and we would be honored if you joined us in our fight to advance conservative policy solutions in Washington and across the country.

---
|
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1mkh3nkhgd4th81s3rcird3mm97c8qk6ju738uo_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgm2o76cjh2bs)
---
| | As someone who believes in individual freedom, limited government, and free enterprise, we know you share our values. We need your help to ensure that conservative policies continue to shape the direction of our country.

I would like to personally invite you to join The Heritage Foundation today by clicking on this secure link: [https://secured.heritage.org/activate/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znkcsdrsimkurv6hv77rqfb1k1opaullfl6sro6o_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgm2o76cjh2bs)

Once you become a member, you will receive access to our exclusive members-only resources, such as policy briefings, research reports, and special events with our experts. Your support will help us stand up against the radical left agenda that seeks to undermine American values.

Thank you for considering joining our efforts to make a difference. We hope to welcome you to our community soon.

Best regards,

Alexander Hyatt
Membership Programs
The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. When you activate your membership, you will also receive a personalized membership card and access to our weekly policy update emails. Join us today by clicking on this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/activate/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkhvklaeu5e50qhgkh073ft1e2rrt6nf4v15l7to_rp22sh2s8i66o70clgm2o76cjh2bs)**
---
---

clean_body: Peter, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. I'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. body:
We can’t overstate the importance of Tuesday’s elections in Wisconsin – here’s why: | | |
---
| | **We’re just one day away from Wisconsin’s ultra-important special elections. [Rush $7 right now to elect state Dems and fight back against extremist Republicans in Wisconsin and beyond >>](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4OEAsID-DJgUhAfxhILAlnx17UgbEygPQ7U3CCqeD01xrBCsYMt1_2HAh_l5cygB9_PnflZOKMDnre77m3kRjmAuM6pBGNNY246U-Nkb6O3fgnI87NNhd71Szp-AqAa824NcF4KgYI0w0Y2zR9Lg5H0ZjXUmenY7LrHTh6DnjBKFSsT_1GvYWBok_g9HmAOzaJCFnHcLrkKmQktsG18F7-FP7_cKnK6exVyOqFktmFGGSGshoHcjfEPPw13er7oOvTjbnQYV_glFFKHROUsMaYAqRMx4nztBOe02XmBMjSVI-QGghV8CpgaAWqTbvZ5O4XP1vTnftUpBku1Wm2j3AxxE/3v1/LiUiaJNwQKKTiLxZRUTLiA/h0/G-dSa4YcXCzCBia4_4xItaL2Kr5dSb7xT_1FaOvtGdA)** We can’t overstate the importance of Tuesday’s elections in Wisconsin – here’s why:
* Democrat Jodi Habush Sinykin is facing off against election-denier Dan Knodl in a race that will determine whether Republicans gain a **supermajority in the state Senate.**
* **If they do, they’ll have enough members to REMOVE state officials impeached by the GOP-held state Assembly** – and Knodl _already_ said he’d consider launching impeachment proceedings against progressive Supreme Court candidate Janet Protasiewicz!
* With ultra-gerrymandered maps, Republicans have a tight grip on the WI state legislature – and they’re using their power to attack abortion access, voting rights, and more.

**But tomorrow, Democrats could turn the tide with key victories. So we’re counting on Democrats in your community and across the country to step up and own a piece of this fight today – we need _you_ standing with us.** [We need to seize this moment, but we’re running out of time: Chip in $7 right now to defeat state Republican extremists and build Democratic power in states like Wisconsin and across the country >>](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4OEAsID-DJgUhAfxhILAlnx17UgbEygPQ7U3CCqeD01xrBCsYMt1_2HAh_l5cygB9_PnflZOKMDnre77m3kRjmAuM6pBGNNY246U-Nkb6O3fgnI87NNhd71Szp-AqAa824Pck1F0MG1is0AGRn72iTYOmIYyPN00OghoET_ahah_BDVcp1DGd0e4osHmld3LSxo5TAYAQRVaZcpplcusjB82_UfNAnmkl-MThbThYZ9Sg-loqKGcuhLBzuS24UzvTphyl0rwkvhyXIKK24_JiXA-BiFFbK9s0hCi_cKmWOM2DmslKXGzxjqydIzXgzpHLiWzT8oGlIL9CNFFQaCWJoVQ/3v1/LiUiaJNwQKKTiLxZRUTLiA/h1/rvFJejAd5YGqXpyqQ36V370P-AcDQFboQ_ZylpGcBp8) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

With a progressive candidate on the bench working toward fair maps, Democrats could FINALLY have a chance to build power in Wisconsin and fight back against Republicans’ right-wing agenda. **And if our progressive candidates win on Tuesday, we’ll have already hit the ground running.**
**Republicans have poured _millions_ of dollars into the state – they know that if Democrats win, their extreme, unpopular agenda doesn’t stand a chance. So it’s vital that we channel the full power of this grassroots movement into this fight. **
[So please: Will you chip in $7, $25, or whatever feels right today to elect state Democrats in states like Wisconsin? name: Bill Posey Campaign
subject: Substantial wins for Floridians this session
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bill Posey
body:
| | | [](https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-156-298-479-e6ff9a4fd0-6ua2855efa)
---
| | Dear Friend, You all know my primary priority has always been holding Washington accountable, and that often has included our own party. You and I both have experienced the frustration of broken promises and misplaced priorities the last time Republicans controlled the Congress and the White House. However, over the last few weeks, I have been encouraged by the strong start of this new Republican majority. My Republican colleagues and I are working to oppose Biden’s dangerous agenda at every step and began delivering on the promises we’ve made to hard-working Americans. Don’t worry, I won’t let my guard down and I’ll keep the pressure on leadership to keep their word. Here are just a few examples of the victories we are seeing in Washington: PASSED H.R. 23 – **The Family and Small Business Taxpayer Protection Act:** This resolution, passed by House Republicans, defunds Joe Biden’s plans and stops his Administration from using increased audits to target middle-class Americans and small businesses. PASSED H.R. 497 & H.R.382 – **The Freedom for Healthcare Workers Act and The Pandemic is Over Act:** House Republicans passed these important resolutions to end COVID vaccine mandates on our healthcare workers and end the “Health Emergency,” so Democrats can no longer use COVID-19 as an excuse to enact socialist policies and collect data on Americans. **But that’s just scratching the surface!**
* Passed 118th Congress Rules Package – Creating more accountable members of Congress.
* Passed H.R. 26 – The Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act.
* Passed a resolution supporting crisis pregnancy centers, churches, and pro-life organizations after attacks by the Far-Left.
* Passed a resolution to protect retirement savings from Biden’s overreach.
* Passed H.R. 347 – The REIN IN Inflation Act.
* Passed H.R. 22 – The Protecting America’s Strategic Petroleum Reserve from China Act.
* Passed H.R. 21 – The Strategic Production Response Act ends Biden’s abuse of our petroleum reserves.
* Passed H.J. Res. 26 – A Joint Resolution Disapproving the District of City Council Revised Criminal Code Act of 2022.
* Passed H. Res. 104 – A Resolution to Condemn Communist China for Violating U.S. Sovereign Airspace.
* Passed H.R. 497 – The Freedom For Health Care Workers Act: Ends the draconian federal vaccine mandate for health care workers.
* Passed H.J. Res. 7 – A Resolution Terminating the COVID-19 National Emergency Declaration.
* Passed H. Con. Res. 9 – A Resolution Condemning Socialism.
* Established the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
* Established the Select Committee on Strategic Competition Between the United States and the Chinese Communist Party (CCP).
* Passed H.R. 139 – The SHOW UP Act to return federal workers to 2019 remote work levels.
* Passed H.J. Res. 24 – A Resolution Disapproving the Action of the District of Columbia Council in Approving the Local Resident Voting Rights Amendment Act of 2022.

These are just a few examples of the work that our new Republican majority is doing to keep our promise and deliver results. Some of these have become law, some are languishing in the Democrat Senate, and others are moving through the Senate. I look forward to more positive action by this new Republican majority and, with your help, we can continue to hold this administration accountable! Find out how you can get involved [here](https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-156-298-479-e6ff9a4fd0-6ua2855efa)

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Friend, You all know my primary priority has always been holding Washington accountable, and that often has included our own party. You and I both have experienced the frustration of broken promises and misplaced priorities the last time Republicans controlled the Congress and the White House. However, over the last few weeks, I have been encouraged by the strong start of this new Republican majority. My Republican colleagues and I are working to oppose Biden’s dangerous agenda at every step and began delivering on the promises we’ve made to hard-working Americans. Don’t worry, I won’t let my guard down and I’ll keep the pressure on leadership to keep their word. Here are just a few examples of the victories we are seeing in Washington: PASSED H.R. 23 – The Family and Small Business Taxpayer Protection Act: This resolution, passed by House Republicans, defunds Joe Biden’s plans and stops his Administration from using increased audits to target middle-class Americans and small businesses. PASSED H.R. 497 & H.R.382 – The Freedom for Healthcare Workers Act and The Pandemic is Over Act: House Republicans passed these important resolutions to end COVID vaccine mandates on our healthcare workers and end the “Health Emergency,” so Democrats can no longer use COVID-19 as an excuse to enact socialist policies and collect data on Americans. But that’s just scratching the surface! Passed 118th Congress Rules Package – Creating more accountable members of Congress. Passed H.R. 26 – The Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act. Passed a resolution supporting crisis pregnancy centers, churches, and pro-life organizations after attacks by the Far-Left. Passed a resolution to protect retirement savings from Biden’s overreach. Passed H.R. 347 – The REIN IN Inflation Act. Passed H.R. 22 – The Protecting America’s Strategic Petroleum Reserve from China Act. Passed H.R. 21 – The Strategic Production Response Act ends Biden’s abuse of our petroleum reserves. Passed H.J. Res. 26 – A Joint Resolution Disapproving the District of City Council Revised Criminal Code Act of 2022. Passed H. Res. 104 – A Resolution to Condemn Communist China for Violating U.S. Sovereign Airspace. Passed H.R. 497 – The Freedom For Health Care Workers Act: Ends the draconian federal vaccine mandate for health care workers. Passed H.J. Res. 7 – A Resolution Terminating the COVID-19 National Emergency Declaration. Passed H. Con. Res. 9 – A Resolution Condemning Socialism. Established the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Established the Select Committee on Strategic Competition Between the United States and the Chinese Communist Party (CCP). Passed H.R. 139 – The SHOW UP Act to return federal workers to 2019 remote work levels. Passed H.J. Res. 24 – A Resolution Disapproving the Action of the District of Columbia Council in Approving the Local Resident Voting Rights Amendment Act of 2022. These are just a few examples of the work that our new Republican majority is doing to keep our promise and deliver results. Some of these have become law, some are languishing in the Democrat Senate, and others are moving through the Senate. I look forward to more positive action by this new Republican majority and, with your help, we can continue to hold this administration accountable! Find out how you can get involved Sincerely, Bill Posey | | | Paid for by Friends of Bill Posey P.O. name: Julia DeGraw
subject: FWD: Petition: Help Stop Major Threat HB 2659 and Support Climate-Friendly and Equitable Communities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
| | | Dear Peter, **Tomorrow, we are submitting a petition opposing the Major Threat bill, HB 2659.** This bill would allow eight major urban areas in our state to back out of our newly adopted Climate-Friendly and Equitable Communities (CFEC) program. [**Will you sign on to this petition now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61205804/399433245/-1609798450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmNTc3MDE5LTMwZDItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TN5BJa4AjZn7ZJYNVtHKT_qJGU0UT-E7CAv1XO4C_v0=&emci=2a21c8d7-ffd0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1f577019-30d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) The CFEC program was supported by numerous Oregonians, businesses, and organizations. And, it was created with guidance from a historically diverse advisory committee, representing some of the most marginalized communities in our state. Implementing the CFEC program is a historic opportunity to try to make right on parts of our ugly past in terms of housing, urban policy, climate pollution, and environmental justice. **This bill does the opposite by delaying and repealing this program.** All of us deserve access to walkable and bikeable neighborhoods with diverse, affordable housing, served by safe, low-cost transit options. [**Please consider signing on to our petition opposing this Major Threat by 5pm today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61205805/399433246/-1609798450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmNTc3MDE5LTMwZDItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TN5BJa4AjZn7ZJYNVtHKT_qJGU0UT-E7CAv1XO4C_v0=&emci=2a21c8d7-ffd0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1f577019-30d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Thank you, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61205806/399433247/697470913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmNTc3MDE5LTMwZDItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TN5BJa4AjZn7ZJYNVtHKT_qJGU0UT-E7CAv1XO4C_v0=&emci=2a21c8d7-ffd0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1f577019-30d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Hello Peter, A Major Threat bill, HB 2659, is scheduled for a public hearing next Tuesday. The bill would repeal and delay our newly adopted Climate-Friendly and Equitable Communities (CFEC) program, rolling back the progress we’ve made on tackling climate change and addressing inequity. We should be providing the CFEC program with adequate funding. Instead, [**we find ourselves fighting for its right to exist. Will you make your voice heard and add your name to this petition that we are submitting as public testimony on April 4th?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61205807/399433248/-1609798450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmNTc3MDE5LTMwZDItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TN5BJa4AjZn7ZJYNVtHKT_qJGU0UT-E7CAv1XO4C_v0=&emci=2a21c8d7-ffd0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1f577019-30d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) The CFEC program, which was part of the major climate executive order signed by Governor Brown, would transform eight urban areas in our state by making neighborhoods more pedestrian and bike friendly, improving air quality, and improving liveability for everyone. This program is a critical piece of Oregon’s Climate Action Plan. [**It can help make our communities healthier, more inclusive, and more climate-resilient for generations to come.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61205808/399433249/-1609798450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmNTc3MDE5LTMwZDItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TN5BJa4AjZn7ZJYNVtHKT_qJGU0UT-E7CAv1XO4C_v0=&emci=2a21c8d7-ffd0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1f577019-30d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Extreme heat threatens our communities and environment, and it’ll only get worse unless we act to decrease climate pollution. Our state is getting hotter and drier. Temperatures are rising, disrupting rainfall patterns and creating more frequent drought conditions, as well as more extreme weather events. Overall, warm and dry conditions are likely to increase with climate change and are associated with large wildfires in our state––like the 2020 Labor Day fires. Climate change affects our agriculture and timber industries and fisheries. It also affects our daily lives. Whether your favorite hobbies include skiing, fishing, or simply exploring your neighborhood, we enjoy our open spaces year-round. [**By prioritizing our environment, climate, and housing when developing our cities, the CFEC program aims to reduce climate pollution and provide more affordable housing options.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61205809/399433250/-1609798450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmNTc3MDE5LTMwZDItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TN5BJa4AjZn7ZJYNVtHKT_qJGU0UT-E7CAv1XO4C_v0=&emci=2a21c8d7-ffd0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1f577019-30d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Last year, over 1,600 individuals, businesses, and organizations spoke up to help ensure that our state adopted the program. We need to make this transition. **A rollback of this program would most likely mean a continuation of the status quo: continued dependence on and prioritization of gas guzzling modes of transportation, inequitable access to housing options, and extreme weather conditions.**[**That’s why we need your help to stop this bill from gutting the CFEC program. We need more affordable housing options in walkable, transit-friendly neighborhoods. Can you sign on to this petition before next Tuesday?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61205810/399433251/-1609798450?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmNTc3MDE5LTMwZDItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TN5BJa4AjZn7ZJYNVtHKT_qJGU0UT-E7CAv1XO4C_v0=&emci=2a21c8d7-ffd0-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1f577019-30d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Thank you for your support, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |
---|---|---
|
|

Implementing the CFEC program is a historic opportunity to try to make right on parts of our ugly past in terms of housing, urban policy, climate pollution, and environmental justice. This bill does the opposite by delaying and repealing this program. All of us deserve access to walkable and bikeable neighborhoods with diverse, affordable housing, served by safe, low-cost transit options. Thank you, Julia DeGraw Coalition Director, OLCV Hello Peter, A Major Threat bill, HB 2659, is scheduled for a public hearing next Tuesday. The bill would repeal and delay our newly adopted Climate-Friendly and Equitable Communities (CFEC) program, rolling back the progress we’ve made on tackling climate change and addressing inequity. We should be providing the CFEC program with adequate funding. Instead, The CFEC program, which was part of the major climate executive order signed by Governor Brown, would transform eight urban areas in our state by making neighborhoods more pedestrian and bike friendly, improving air quality, and improving liveability for everyone. This program is a critical piece of Oregon’s Climate Action Plan. Extreme heat threatens our communities and environment, and it’ll only get worse unless we act to decrease climate pollution. Our state is getting hotter and drier. Temperatures are rising, disrupting rainfall patterns and creating more frequent drought conditions, as well as more extreme weather events. Overall, warm and dry conditions are likely to increase with climate change and are associated with large wildfires in our state––like the 2020 Labor Day fires. Climate change affects our agriculture and timber industries and fisheries. It also affects our daily lives. Whether your favorite hobbies include skiing, fishing, or simply exploring your neighborhood, we enjoy our open spaces year-round. Last year, over 1,600 individuals, businesses, and organizations spoke up to help ensure that our state adopted the program. We need to make this transition. A rollback of this program would most likely mean a continuation of the status quo: continued dependence on and prioritization of gas guzzling modes of transportation, inequitable access to housing options, and extreme weather conditions. Thank you for your support, Julia DeGraw Coalition Director, OLCV | | ---|---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters. | ---|---

Friend,
It’s hard to believe that I will be ARRESTED tomorrow as a result of the most disgraceful witch hunt in our nation’s history.
Even the Fake News openly admits it’s a witch hunt:
| **POLITICO** **“Trump Seems to Be the Victim of a Witch Hunt. So What?”**

_...“So what?”_
That’s the media’s response to the ruling political party inciting a witch hunt to arrest its strongest opponent.
The Fake News doesn’t care about justice or the rule of law. They’re nothing but puppets for the left-wing regime that wants to silence and even criminalize dissent.
Meanwhile, the former Speaker of the House stated that Americans should be _presumed guilty_ and forced to prove their _innocence_ in court.
_**Our country has fallen.**_
_**But I’m not giving up on America. We can and we will save our nation in 2024.**_
_**And I know you haven’t given up on America either.**_

**Our fundraising numbers are right on track, and I have YOU to thank.**
I’ve said it before, and I’ll say it again: _our race could be the tightest in the country._
Peter, my last election went to a RECOUNT and we can’t afford to cut it that close again.
This next quarter is just as CRITICAL for our race, and we’re looking to get off to a good start.

name: Response Requested ----------- House GOP
subject: Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt Trump indictment...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | **Mark Levin SHREDS the corrupt indictment against Trump:**
_" The Democrat Party wants a one-party country, it wants a one-party system... And it's not an accident that this happens in Democrat cities, with Democrat judges, with Democrat prosecutors, with Democrat grand juries, and that's the way it's going to work."_
Levin hit the nail on the head.

This is not some even-handed, unbiased prosecution. This Manhattan DA is a hyperpartisan zealot rushing to throw Donald J. Trump behind bars, stop him from running for president, smear his supporters, and cement TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL...

Don't legitimize this partisan Witch Hunt with your silence!

We're PLEADING with every Patriot in America to speak out right now. Here's how you can help:
_**[Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62514268:63lBpxGtN:m:1:3331421248:62A987653C9316C3FAF432ACB5D95B6A:r "Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**_
We need 1,000,000 signatures before he's arraigned so the Radical Left knows they don't speak for the will of the American People.

Unfortunately, we can't make that case without YOU.

**As of this morning, nearly EVERY Patriot we've asked has agreed to sign our petition - we're just waiting on a few more holdouts who haven't signed. Including you.**

This could be your last chance to add your name before he's arraigned.
**[SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62514268:63lBpxGtN:m:1:3331421248:62A987653C9316C3FAF432ACB5D95B6A:r "SIGN ON: Demand Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt >>")**
We'll be on the lookout for your name.

Thank you,

House GOP

subject: SPECIAL LINK To Join Pastor's For Trump National Prayer Call w/Mayor Rudy Giuliani
body:
URGENT MATTER America's Mayor, Rudy Giuliani, will be joining Pastor's For Trump tonight at 6:30pm CT for another National Prayer Call live from Tuls
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11579.1.0a50c0f86ca884f2e975eb0b7ccc757d) |
---
## URGENT MATTER
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11580.1.d9fd4ac3bd02213e9737f42bc2ea2013)
---
America's Mayor, **Rudy Giuliani** , will be joining [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11581.1.38c24782d5887da3a66b6a79ac1b416e) tonight at 6:30pm CT for another **National Prayer Call** live from Tulsa, OK (_along with other surprise guests..._)!
Our last National Prayer Call had over 115,000 people watching live while **President Donald Trump** joined us along with **General Michael Flynn** and **Roger Stone**.
This upcoming prayer call is our **National IMPORTANCE** due to the fact that **President Trump** has been indicted by a Grand Jury in NY.
Please plan to join us to pray for our Nation and President Trump on Monday at 6:30pm CT.
If you live in the Tulsa area you are welcome to join us at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11582.1.4fc2b61bb8457db7f3ca43aecdce09ae) where the broadcast will take place (doors will open at 6pm CT).
**Date** : Monday, April 3
**Time** : 6:30pm CT
**Location** : [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11583.1.11b262633c65c59bbcadddf94910750a) 4121 S Sheridan Rd Tulsa, OK
**Online** : [www.Pastors4Trump.com/prayercall](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11584.1.6b8dcea21749cc2f58f7111d7a0dcd12) as well as [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11585.1.15e8b7e8080c4b926fb78e44296b632c), [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11586.1.c6877ce145e91ce4a38f698331e9ceba), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11587.1.47a7a0d0d039b8baf5fa692001173d25).
Here is how you can help:
1\. Share the recorded Prayer Call of [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11588.1.4ce0648df7f7476a351532c3a7b67bb7) w/President Trump to friends: [https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11589.1.d251fd0d32309b5f3a85bef6edb5e1a2)
2\. Invite your others to join you for Monday's National Prayer Call at [www.Pastors4Trump.com/prayercall](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11590.1.79278e135aaab50b926d5a6f81208180).
3\. Make a donation to Pastor's For Trump of $5, $10 or more so that we can reach more Pastors across the country: [https://www.pastors4trump.com/ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11591.1.e1e99c6f0a271450ee30fad3c93fd356)
1. | Share the recorded Prayer Call of [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11592.1.a54360f778e372d998ea7fc198320688) w/President Trump to friends: [https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11593.1.019ce8307e31db33c06eff6c22de0e73)
---|---
2. | Invite your others to join you for Monday's National Prayer Call at [www.Pastors4Trump.com/prayercall](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11594.1.ef9cb42f0338734e2f326b38aa025242).
---|---
3. | Make a donation to Pastor's For Trump of $5, $10 or more so that we can reach more Pastors across the country: [https://www.pastors4trump.com/ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11595.1.8004202d8addebe1b7bee09f6ce0a6c4)
---|---
God Bless America
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11596.1.ff325b07aa146d2bf7cfd13cb9e61cee), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11597.1.a30635c446b350f3eef072682adf50fa), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11598.1.2843aae26689e0b8afe5ebb8cb462fa7), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11599.1.4da72cad2998043ffa0c2259d713d22e), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11600.1.53127ac3f7cc7d0ed07167efc417d82e), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11601.1.8980dea1ea646509e886bfb984d704cb)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11602.1.000e6967db29a4e2954a63b82f29c8c3)
## Message From President Trump
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11603.1.77dad675366f373ee97d19d8a79f6d7f)
---
**President Trump** issued his statement regarding our National Prayer Call on Monday night through his Truth Social account. The Fake News media called it "_horrible_ " but **President Trump** labeled it an "_honor_." **We had over 3,000 Pastors and 115,000 people live with us on the stream with just ONE days' notice.** We are preparing for the next one and _you will definitely want to be a part of it..._ You can register at [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11604.1.5701e9a82c63c1770f2690b4e00d4985)! **President Trump** also shared on Truth Social my Tweet about how impressive it was for him to request pray for our country instead of himself.
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11605.1.215d706c61d04511ab17ffc4ec95ca4d)
---
If you would like to hear me explain what happened on the call when _leftist trolls_ invaded our online backstage you can listen to my interview with **OAN's Dan Ball** here: [https://www.oann.com/video/real-america-video/pastors-4-trump-host-nationwide-prayer/](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20242038.11606.1.596f77a225bff7ff66dc7ae3fe1d3a96)
Please continue to pray for President Trump!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

Please plan to join us to pray for our Nation and President Trump on Monday at 6:30pm CT. If you live in the Tulsa area you are welcome to join us at where the broadcast will take place (doors will open at 6pm CT). Date : Monday, April 3 Time : 6:30pm CT Location : 4121 S Sheridan Rd Tulsa, OK Online : as well as , , . Here is how you can help: 1\. We are preparing for the next one and you will definitely want to be a part of it... You can register at ! President Trump also shared on Truth Social my Tweet about how impressive it was for him to request pray for our country instead of himself. | If you would like to hear me explain what happened on the call when leftist trolls invaded our online backstage you can listen to my interview with OAN's Dan Ball here: Please continue to pray for President Trump! | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61210101/399449694/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjllYTVkYi0zOWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_6mZjRZL4PTFlmjTsK5O5BgdSQS4tNfDo2CXiz3vQ5A=&emci=2e7a7887-4bce-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=df9ea5db-39d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=561582) | Friend, After the 2022 midterms brought voters across the country major progressive wins through direct democracy — including raising the minimum wage, protecting access to reproductive care, and more — _extremist lawmakers have launched an all out assault on the ballot measure process._ _[**Donate to our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign to help us fend off their attacks. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61210102/399449702/-721321771?refcode=E20758-20230330-BMRCFundraiser-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjllYTVkYi0zOWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_6mZjRZL4PTFlmjTsK5O5BgdSQS4tNfDo2CXiz3vQ5A=)_ **_In Missouri, Florida, Ohio, South Dakota, and Idaho, several proposals have been introduced to make it harder for issues to be put on the ballot — such as increasing the number of district signatures required to qualify an issue for the ballot, or raising the threshold for a measure to pass. AND for the second year in a row, the Mississippi state legislature has thrown out a proposal that would reinstate the ballot measure process for voters in their state._** These are just a few places where state legislatures are trying to make it more difficult for working Americans to bring about the change they want to see in their communities – _and more are likely to follow suit._ [**That’s where we come in. We’ve been monitoring these attacks very closely and are gearing up to fight back through our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign (BMRC), a campaign fund dedicated to protecting direct democracy from attacks on the ballot measure process. Will you help fuel our fight to defend the ballot box by rushing a donation to our BMRC today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61210103/399449703/-721321771?refcode=E20758-20230330-BMRCFundraiser-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjllYTVkYi0zOWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_6mZjRZL4PTFlmjTsK5O5BgdSQS4tNfDo2CXiz3vQ5A=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately:_ | **[$15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61210104/399449706/-721321771?express_lane=true&refcode=E20758-20230330-BMRCFundraiser-EG-Other-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjllYTVkYi0zOWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_6mZjRZL4PTFlmjTsK5O5BgdSQS4tNfDo2CXiz3vQ5A=)** | **[$25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61210105/399449707/-721321771?express_lane=true&refcode=E20758-20230330-BMRCFundraiser-EG-Other-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjllYTVkYi0zOWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_6mZjRZL4PTFlmjTsK5O5BgdSQS4tNfDo2CXiz3vQ5A=)**

clean_body: | | Friend, After the 2022 midterms brought voters across the country major progressive wins through direct democracy — including raising the minimum wage, protecting access to reproductive care, and more — extremist lawmakers have launched an all out assault on the ballot measure process. = In Missouri, Florida, Ohio, South Dakota, and Idaho, several proposals have been introduced to make it harder for issues to be put on the ballot — such as increasing the number of district signatures required to qualify an issue for the ballot, or raising the threshold for a measure to pass. AND for the second year in a row, the Mississippi state legislature has thrown out a proposal that would reinstate the ballot measure process for voters in their state. These are just a few places where state legislatures are trying to make it more difficult for working Americans to bring about the change they want to see in their communities – and more are likely to follow suit. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We know these next two years are going to be critical for direct democracy, team. As our politicians become less and less receptive to the wishes of their constituents, and now that the fight for some of our most fundamental rights has decisively shifted to the states, defending the ballot process is vital to ensuring we can continue our track record of successful ballot campaigns into 2024. = = Thank you, FP Team Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
The Radical Left - the enemy of the hard-working men and women of this country - have **INDICTED** me in a disgusting witch hunt.
Alvin Bragg, the Soros-funded District Attorney behind the indictment, relied on the testimony of a convicted felon and a disbarred lawyer.
**Never before in our Nation 's history has this been done. **
The Democrats have cheated countless times over the decades, but weaponizing our justice system to punish a political opponent who just so happens to be a President of the United States, has never happened before. _Ever._
From the time I came down the golden escalator at Trump Tower and even before I was sworn in as your President of the United States, the Radical Left Democrats have been engaged in a witch hunt to destroy our movement.
Ever since I ran for president as a complete political outsider, the corrupt ruling class has tried to shut down our America First movement.

clean_body: | | | | Friend, We are living through the darkest chapter of American history. The Radical Left - the enemy of the hard-working men and women of this country - have INDICTED me in a disgusting witch hunt. Alvin Bragg, the Soros-funded District Attorney behind the indictment, relied on the testimony of a convicted felon and a disbarred lawyer. Never before in our Nation 's history has this been done. The Democrats have cheated countless times over the decades, but weaponizing our justice system to punish a political opponent who just so happens to be a President of the United States, has never happened before. Ever. From the time I came down the golden escalator at Trump Tower and even before I was sworn in as your President of the United States, the Radical Left Democrats have been engaged in a witch hunt to destroy our movement. Ever since I ran for president as a complete political outsider, the corrupt ruling class has tried to shut down our America First movement. The Deep State will use anything at their disposal to shut down the one political movement that puts YOU first. But I promise you this: This Witch Hunt will BACKFIRE MASSIVELY on Joe Biden. Friend,
We are living through the darkest chapter of American history.
The Radical Left - the enemy of the hard-working men and women of this country - have **INDICTED** me in a disgusting witch hunt.
Alvin Bragg, the Soros-funded District Attorney behind the indictment, relied on the testimony of a convicted felon and a disbarred lawyer.
**Never before in our Nation 's history has this been done. **
The Democrats have cheated countless times over the decades, but weaponizing our justice system to punish a political opponent who just so happens to be a President of the United States, has never happened before. _Ever._
From the time I came down the golden escalator at Trump Tower and even before I was sworn in as your President of the United States, the Radical Left Democrats have been engaged in a witch hunt to destroy our movement.
Ever since I ran for president as a complete political outsider, the corrupt ruling class has tried to shut down our America First movement.
The Deep State will use anything at their disposal to shut down the one political movement that puts YOU first.

The Radical Left - the enemy of the hard-working men and women of this country - have INDICTED me in a disgusting witch hunt. Alvin Bragg, the Soros-funded District Attorney behind the indictment, relied on the testimony of a convicted felon and a disbarred lawyer. Never before in our Nation 's history has this been done. The Democrats have cheated countless times over the decades, but weaponizing our justice system to punish a political opponent who just so happens to be a President of the United States, has never happened before. Ever. From the time I came down the golden escalator at Trump Tower and even before I was sworn in as your President of the United States, the Radical Left Democrats have been engaged in a witch hunt to destroy our movement. Ever since I ran for president as a complete political outsider, the corrupt ruling class has tried to shut down our America First movement. The Deep State will use anything at their disposal to shut down the one political movement that puts YOU first. But I promise you this: This Witch Hunt will BACKFIRE MASSIVELY on Joe Biden. With your support, we will write the next great chapter of American history - and 2024 will forever go down as the year we saved our Republic. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! subject: A 99-year sentence for doing his job!
disclaimer_text: paid for by the infamous George Soros, wants to sentence Sgt
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513777:JbgnAxGNJ:m:1:3391001263:06B9DBE2C3AA98FBBB311CD881118A2C:r)
---
| | [**A progressive district attorney wants to put an innocent cop in prison for 99 years. This is a****death********sentence****. Please help!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513777:JbgnAxGNJ:m:1:3391001263:06B9DBE2C3AA98FBBB311CD881118A2C:r)**[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513777:JbgnAxGNJ:m:1:3391001263:06B9DBE2C3AA98FBBB311CD881118A2C:r) ** This is Sheriff David Clarke. Please just take a moment to read my urgent text to you -- an innocent cop's life may depend on it. [**A progressive district attorney, bought and paid for by the infamous George Soros, wants to sentence Sgt. Josh Blake to 99 years in prison for doing his job.**** **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513777:JbgnAxGNJ:m:1:3391001263:06B9DBE2C3AA98FBBB311CD881118A2C:r) If we can't raise the crucial funds needed to get a top lawyer for Josh, the rabid**** progressive**** D.A., Jose Garza will win. [**And if that happens, I'm deeply concerned Josh won't live long enough to die of old age in prison. Because violent criminals -- maybe some he arrested himself, will****murder****him.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513777:JbgnAxGNJ:m:1:3391001263:06B9DBE2C3AA98FBBB311CD881118A2C:r) On May 31st, 2020, in Austin, Texas, an anti-police mob started rioting. They looted and vandalized buildings. They even set police cars on fire! Then the mob blocked a major highway that runs through Austin. No one could get through, not even police cars, fire trucks, and ambulances. The rioters then began to throw objects at the officers. So Josh and his fellow police officers deployed non-lethal bean bag rounds at the rioters that were throwing rocks and other objects. **Then what did progressive D.A. Jose Garza do? Did he indict the rioters for arson, looting, assault, and more?[NO! He indicted Josh and 19 other Austin police officers for committing first degree felonies!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513777:JbgnAxGNJ:m:1:3391001263:06B9DBE2C3AA98FBBB311CD881118A2C:r)** Josh himself was charged with two counts of aggravated assault, which can mean a 99-year sentence. That's a death sentence one way or another. [**Sgt. Josh Blake may die behind bars because a rabid****progressive****D.A. is on a mission to destroy good cops!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513777:JbgnAxGNJ:m:1:3391001263:06B9DBE2C3AA98FBBB311CD881118A2C:r) And Josh and his wife simply don't have the money to hire a top-shelf lawyer. Thankfully, National Center for Police Defense, Inc stepped in. With your generous support, the NCPD will help provide an excellent, aggressive legal defense for Josh. The NCPD was founded in 2015 to help law enforcement officers and military service members in their time of greatest need, when they're unjustly charged for crimes they didn't commit. NCPD helps pay for legal expenses. And even help pay for food, rent, utility bills, and more so innocent cops and their families don't go under as they endure the brutal legal process. NCPD can do all that only with the generous support of concerned people like you. You may be the only thing standing between Josh and violent criminals who plan to harm him, even kill him. [**Please help save Josh's life by fully funding his crucial legal defense with your very best gift immediately.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513777:JbgnAxGNJ:m:1:3391001263:06B9DBE2C3AA98FBBB311CD881118A2C:r) Thank you so much. Retired Sheriff David Clarke
---
[Help Josh!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513777:JbgnAxGNJ:m:1:3391001263:06B9DBE2C3AA98FBBB311CD881118A2C:r)

body:
Join us in the fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction! | | |

| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b6bf93102f&e=6a281f566d)

---
| Dear Peter,

I'm excited to let you know that **our[2023 Washington State Republican Party Membership cards](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=3423e2c4d1&e=6a281f566d) are on the way**, and I am asking you to join the thousands who have already renewed their membership by investing in a stronger Republican Party.

By renewing your Sustaining Membership today, you'll be joining us in the fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction. Your support will help us to recruit and train new activists and volunteers, launch effective advertising campaigns, and support our Republican candidates at all levels of government.

Embossed with your name and featuring our logo, I hope your Card will be a constant reminder that Sustaining Members like you are the cornerstone of our party.

I also hope your Card will be a symbol of the victories that we’ll earn if we unify and continue to focus on the Democrats and the disasters they’ve created across our state and America.

Most importantly, I want your Card to be a reminder of our Republican solutions to those problems – solutions that will give hope to millions of voters who’ve lost faith in a process that’s led by woke liberals.
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=dc8d56abee&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=83eee0c247&e=6a281f566d "Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!")
---
| By earning victory in local elections this year and flipping seats in Olympia next year, Washington Republicans can fight to put convicted criminals behind bars. We can cut wasteful and corrupt government programs and lower your taxes. And we can protect the sanctity of your vote. But we can’t do this without your support.

[I'm asking you today to become a 2023 Sustaining Member TODAY with a donation of ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d5af96ee83&e=6a281f566d)[$10,](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f158217e1d&e=6a281f566d) [$25](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=bdf7bf534b&e=6a281f566d), [$50](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=748c0bd944&e=6a281f566d),[ or more.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=e0b4fff51d&e=6a281f566d) Every dollar counts, and every contribution makes a difference in our fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction.
---
| [Renew you membership Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=dada8cb3cc&e=6a281f566d "Renew you membership Today!")

| As a [card carrying member of the Republican Party](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=cde7d26be8&e=6a281f566d), you can know that you are making the difference and helping us recruit and support strong candidates that will win in 2023 as we set the stage to win big in 2024.

Thank you for your continued support of our party and our mission. Together, we can make a real difference and ensure that Washington State doesn’t fall any further to the radical out-of-touch democrats.

Thank you in advance for your support,

Caleb Heimlich
Chairman

body:
Conservatives do not have a monopoly on patriotism.
#
Derek -
Conservatives do not have a monopoly on patriotism.
Veteran is not synonymous with Republican.
If you are sick and tired of far-right radicals hiding behind so-called “pro-America” gear, then we have something for you.
[**We just added our VoteVets hat to the store, and for $35 it’s yours. If you order by 11:59pm Eastern Time tonight, you can use the code GETYOURHAT for free shipping.**](https://shop.votevets.org/collections/featured-apprel/products/votevets-blue-trucker-cap/?source=em230403-1-15?utm_source=em230403-1-15)
Maybe you missed the hat on our first run, or maybe you want another one. Either way, this is a HIGH-QUALITY hat with the VoteVets logo and an American flag on the side. And as a bonus, we’ll use the proceeds to take on and defeat the far-right who have hijacked the flag to advance their radical agenda.
Here’s the hat.
[](https://shop.votevets.org/collections/featured-apprel/products/votevets-blue-trucker-cap/?source=em230403-1-15?utm_source=em230403-1-15)
[**Contribute $35 or more to VoteVets today and we’ll get your VoteVets hat right out to you and use the donation to elect Democrats and fight for Veterans in Congress.**](https://shop.votevets.org/collections/featured-apprel/products/votevets-blue-trucker-cap/?source=em230403-1-15?utm_source=em230403-1-15)
And remember — if you order by 11:59pm Eastern Time tonight, you can use the code GETYOURHAT for free shipping.
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

No matter how many vicious witch hunts they subject us to, we will not bend, we will not break, and we will NEVER stop standing up for TRUE JUSTICE – an America where the PEOPLE are put FIRST, not the Swamp creatures, globalist special interests, or the powers that be.
But because they know I can never be bought, bullied, or controlled, the attacks will never stop.
Our ONLY choice is to fend off each and every witch hunt they throw our way.
**Which is why I simply have to ask for your support during these unprecedented and dark times as the radical Democrats attempt to bury our campaign in never-ending witch hunts.**

body:

|
Peter-
I waited until today to send my weekly campaign brief because I appeared on CNN yesterday morning to talk about the most pressing topics in the news and wanted to share my interview with you. I went on CNN to talk about the bogus, political indictment of President Trump, the renewed debate over school security after the shooting in Nashville, and the recent passage of the Republican energy bill through the House of Representatives.
I like to go on left-leaning networks like CNN because I think it is important for conservatives to speak to audiences who may not usually hear our arguments on key policy debates. As you'll see in the clips below, when conservatives make level-headed arguments based on facts, we can be persuasive even to people that regularly tune into CNN.
As always, thanks for your support. Now, here's your brief.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| A POLITICAL PROSECUTION
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U9FCY93sBbxzyddS4RLkP5m5Nxhcc_4PM7Kwui9oRyn1p9cMJLb6y2UM1UlgmepKMZMBHmN43kWoaIvSUM-IkJMLAo-0NRwXTQ-F6ZdQDqGmwOU-BFaJjUrY48g773wlf-CfJDO5mYiEOaCTI_dfbW87jlhiqebRFSfTSI1tU6pH20rN_4utiwFNPLm7iMC1dutPQHIEuHlNEsN4fmto3Yncrv6yoLhvGxHb4guMHvFmtJPiWj-PyjyMtrSZOduz6K-y_iNtD4Rvh69gWjI3PcsKagBLxdZqShu4Hv9N3P4=&c=e1qWjrGesbeuE_YhUvlHVXv7SIU_1TkCMMG47THLYdl8MbYh8ELCew==&ch=2OWLVLsuKvlCii31R6IT8ssEV-0lqjKDaXC1yacOeAWT169hiBv2xQ==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U9FCY93sBbxzyddS4RLkP5m5Nxhcc_4PM7Kwui9oRyn1p9cMJLb6y2UM1UlgmepKMZMBHmN43kWoaIvSUM-IkJMLAo-0NRwXTQ-F6ZdQDqGmwOU-BFaJjUrY48g773wlf-CfJDO5mYiEOaCTI_dfbW87jlhiqebRFSfTSI1tU6pH20rN_4utiwFNPLm7iMC1dutPQHIEuHlNEsN4fmto3Yncrv6yoLhvGxHb4guMHvFmtJPiWj-PyjyMtrSZOduz6K-y_iNtD4Rvh69gWjI3PcsKagBLxdZqShu4Hv9N3P4=&c=e1qWjrGesbeuE_YhUvlHVXv7SIU_1TkCMMG47THLYdl8MbYh8ELCew==&ch=2OWLVLsuKvlCii31R6IT8ssEV-0lqjKDaXC1yacOeAWT169hiBv2xQ==)
---
| |
---
| The first topic of my interview with CNN was the overtly political indictment of President Donald Trump.
If this were anyone but Trump, would this New York District Attorney even take up the case? It's a simple question that I asked the CNN audience to honestly consider. Because when you put your political biases aside and view this through a nonpartisan lens, the answer is obviously that there is no way any prosecutor would bring this case UNLESS they wanted to go after Donald Trump politically.
Regardless of your opinion of President Trump, we should all be able to admit this fact: this decision to indict a former president and current presidential candidate on a very weak case is going to have serious ramifications for the future.
It weakens everyone's faith in the integrity of America's judicial system. And for all the left's talk about "threats to our democracy," I would certainly classify a weaponized justice system against political opponents as a threat to democracy. The fairness of our judicial system is essential to our nation's rule of law, and the rule of law is essential to our democracy. This bogus case against Donald Trump undermines both.
Share on [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U9FCY93sBbxzyddS4RLkP5m5Nxhcc_4PM7Kwui9oRyn1p9cMJLb6y2UM1UlgmepKE_TvNAqg54aD4j_-eF1dBdO7Q_Qb78vIU5UdgFy6XSdB3-C5XRF86WsiiduztooZT73CZ1kVpZGUFDwoSGKrk_I5IvI_frlnHHm0hhoNHOUBy2ew1YZk_A==&c=e1qWjrGesbeuE_YhUvlHVXv7SIU_1TkCMMG47THLYdl8MbYh8ELCew==&ch=2OWLVLsuKvlCii31R6IT8ssEV-0lqjKDaXC1yacOeAWT169hiBv2xQ==) and [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U9FCY93sBbxzyddS4RLkP5m5Nxhcc_4PM7Kwui9oRyn1p9cMJLb6y2UM1UlgmepK5uZgo5whGFfly13Sr5URM4AgLwxOtAU9WraBQd-8PF4r0MrTQupJch8oCxrvJo8bm6jBlhiqUPtR-KRSCb2PeTcOINJW1CULDadj8r9rcW0su1dvt5V5jUnun8oVkLc_x6RuZt4sZrHGjN40BnMQ5g==&c=e1qWjrGesbeuE_YhUvlHVXv7SIU_1TkCMMG47THLYdl8MbYh8ELCew==&ch=2OWLVLsuKvlCii31R6IT8ssEV-0lqjKDaXC1yacOeAWT169hiBv2xQ==).

| |
---
| | |

| |
---
| PUT ARMED SECURITY GUARDS IN EVERY SCHOOL
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U9FCY93sBbxzyddS4RLkP5m5Nxhcc_4PM7Kwui9oRyn1p9cMJLb6y2UM1UlgmepK7lnHeeLfpJeuozvLHcxi95sqkZJY1daYnjDRbXwdNxv-1FyIT8LWl4jBc_ZgwyFvtNvftM0rXBZO9_3KvX2tNFHhvRwlBPw78OsSAzuOzGo=&c=e1qWjrGesbeuE_YhUvlHVXv7SIU_1TkCMMG47THLYdl8MbYh8ELCew==&ch=2OWLVLsuKvlCii31R6IT8ssEV-0lqjKDaXC1yacOeAWT169hiBv2xQ==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U9FCY93sBbxzyddS4RLkP5m5Nxhcc_4PM7Kwui9oRyn1p9cMJLb6y2UM1UlgmepK7lnHeeLfpJeuozvLHcxi95sqkZJY1daYnjDRbXwdNxv-1FyIT8LWl4jBc_ZgwyFvtNvftM0rXBZO9_3KvX2tNFHhvRwlBPw78OsSAzuOzGo=&c=e1qWjrGesbeuE_YhUvlHVXv7SIU_1TkCMMG47THLYdl8MbYh8ELCew==&ch=2OWLVLsuKvlCii31R6IT8ssEV-0lqjKDaXC1yacOeAWT169hiBv2xQ==)
---
| |
---
| We also discussed the tragedy in Nashville, Tennessee, in which three children and three adults were murdered in yet another school shooting at the hands of a deranged individual.
We are all so sick of these tragedies. Truthfully, no one can understand what possesses a human being to commit such evil. It's a contagion that has spread within our society ever since the Columbine shooters opened the door to senseless, dramatic, public mass shootings. And because no one understands it, the national conversation devolves into senseless finger pointing.
The common narrative from the left and much of the media after these tragedies is always to go after guns. They want to ban certain types of guns and deny law-abiding Americans the right to own a firearm. But their proposed solutions will undermine the Second Amendment while doing little to actually solve the problem.
The best way to solve this problem without trampling on our Constitutional rights is to put armed security guards at every single school in this country. Anyone who is serious about securing any location, whether it's a school, or an airport, or corporate offices like the ones at CNN, knows that armed guards are the first thing you put resources toward.
Texas alone recently allocated $400 million for school security upgrades. Most schools already have armed security guards but we need to make sure they ALL do. We are never going to be able to change the evil inside a person that drives them to kill innocent children. What we can do is have all of the security measures in place to stop them. In fact, the Nashville shooter was deterred from attacking another school in the area because it had "too much security," according to police.
Taking away guns from law-abiding Americans won't stop school shootings. Putting armed guards at every school in America will. It's common sense and a good investment for the safety of our kids.
Share on [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U9FCY93sBbxzyddS4RLkP5m5Nxhcc_4PM7Kwui9oRyn1p9cMJLb6y2UM1UlgmepKUg-jmlxJtz7RjIoIYTL4uaxoFgK11Zr1WQ1M7VzqbI4LCkqUxyJtzSyzqVP_7Kn4VGofOwLv4y-Au-1ODFQCN0kk7Fj6Ro_tQV4eHyYQ0iYkid8N5xHobA==&c=e1qWjrGesbeuE_YhUvlHVXv7SIU_1TkCMMG47THLYdl8MbYh8ELCew==&ch=2OWLVLsuKvlCii31R6IT8ssEV-0lqjKDaXC1yacOeAWT169hiBv2xQ==) and [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U9FCY93sBbxzyddS4RLkP5m5Nxhcc_4PM7Kwui9oRyn1p9cMJLb6y2UM1UlgmepKpac65NcR_W8L5DSurTKZfoSnmpE22gw4wLgo_8-PHdIkXAMSNKR757k1sV9hrerEhsVHSNow1Ye7Z-REnVl3bRvwu_GfE9EVBswATAYRZtRIZnI6XgMHskPTH7mF6sJh5s93yH7-eYjQQOoo06RWOQ==&c=e1qWjrGesbeuE_YhUvlHVXv7SIU_1TkCMMG47THLYdl8MbYh8ELCew==&ch=2OWLVLsuKvlCii31R6IT8ssEV-0lqjKDaXC1yacOeAWT169hiBv2xQ==).

| | |
---
| |
---
| REPUBLICANS PASS LANDMARK ENERGY BILL THROUGH THE HOUSE
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U9FCY93sBbxzyddS4RLkP5m5Nxhcc_4PM7Kwui9oRyn1p9cMJLb6y2UM1UlgmepKvBUne2I0MKb56QQdE1_Zf69QM5u0ARQuWbGwhDcz-bvyvcl2dbo-KkoGdy6HgMlFRulQgW7Flylj4TJvJuCUgWxAISyAtRUks7C-jYP-r20FBTMnz5JXAQ==&c=e1qWjrGesbeuE_YhUvlHVXv7SIU_1TkCMMG47THLYdl8MbYh8ELCew==&ch=2OWLVLsuKvlCii31R6IT8ssEV-0lqjKDaXC1yacOeAWT169hiBv2xQ==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO WATCH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U9FCY93sBbxzyddS4RLkP5m5Nxhcc_4PM7Kwui9oRyn1p9cMJLb6y2UM1UlgmepKvBUne2I0MKb56QQdE1_Zf69QM5u0ARQuWbGwhDcz-bvyvcl2dbo-KkoGdy6HgMlFRulQgW7Flylj4TJvJuCUgWxAISyAtRUks7C-jYP-r20FBTMnz5JXAQ==&c=e1qWjrGesbeuE_YhUvlHVXv7SIU_1TkCMMG47THLYdl8MbYh8ELCew==&ch=2OWLVLsuKvlCii31R6IT8ssEV-0lqjKDaXC1yacOeAWT169hiBv2xQ==)
---
| Last week, House Republicans passed H.R. 1, the Lower Energy Costs Act. It was our top priority, which is why it was given #1 as the bill number, and it's full of commonsense, uncontroversial energy policy. Yet somehow the vast majority of Democrats voted against the bill. They had little specifics when arguing against it and instead reverted to their usual hyperbolic rhetoric that the legislation will kill the planet because it supports American oil and gas production.
We can't survive on a wind and solar-only energy future. It's unreliable, and it's irresponsible for my colleagues on the left to continue pushing this narrative. H.R. 1 removes permitting obstacles for American natural gas, which can provide safe, clean, affordable, and abundant energy to the world and displace foreign coal, which is the primary driver of global emissions.
This bill makes it easier to tap into America's vast deposits of critical minerals, which we need to make things like batteries and steel domestically rather than relying on China. And this bill includes two provisions I introduced to protect America's oil refining capacity and make it easier for states to develop carbon capture projects.
This bill simply promotes affordable, reliable energy produced right here in America. We produce the cleanest energy in the world and when we export that energy abroad, we lower global emissions. This bill checks all the boxes-it's good for energy production, consumers, and the environment. It is a shame so many Democrats voted against it in the House and that Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden will likely prevent it from becoming law while they're in control of the Senate and White House.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| ON SOCIAL MEDIA
---
