clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- I waited until today to send my weekly campaign brief because I appeared on CNN yesterday morning to talk about the most pressing topics in the news and wanted to share my interview with you. I went on CNN to talk about the bogus, political indictment of President Trump, the renewed debate over school security after the shooting in Nashville, and the recent passage of the Republican energy bill through the House of Representatives. I like to go on left-leaning networks like CNN because I think it is important for conservatives to speak to audiences who may not usually hear our arguments on key policy debates. As you'll see in the clips below, when conservatives make level-headed arguments based on facts, we can be persuasive even to people that regularly tune into CNN. As always, thanks for your support. Now, here's your brief. | | | | | | | | A POLITICAL PROSECUTION | | | == | == | | | The first topic of my interview with CNN was the overtly political indictment of President Donald Trump. If this were anyone but Trump, would this New York District Attorney even take up the case? It's a simple question that I asked the CNN audience to honestly consider. Because when you put your political biases aside and view this through a nonpartisan lens, the answer is obviously that there is no way any prosecutor would bring this case UNLESS they wanted to go after Donald Trump politically. Regardless of your opinion of President Trump, we should all be able to admit this fact: this decision to indict a former president and current presidential candidate on a very weak case is going to have serious ramifications for the future. It weakens everyone's faith in the integrity of America's judicial system. And for all the left's talk about "threats to our democracy," I would certainly classify a weaponized justice system against political opponents as a threat to democracy. The fairness of our judicial system is essential to our nation's rule of law, and the rule of law is essential to our democracy. This bogus case against Donald Trump undermines both. Share on == and ==. | | | | | | | | PUT ARMED SECURITY GUARDS IN EVERY SCHOOL | | | == | == | | | We also discussed the tragedy in Nashville, Tennessee, in which three children and three adults were murdered in yet another school shooting at the hands of a deranged individual. We are all so sick of these tragedies. Truthfully, no one can understand what possesses a human being to commit such evil. It's a contagion that has spread within our society ever since the Columbine shooters opened the door to senseless, dramatic, public mass shootings. And because no one understands it, the national conversation devolves into senseless finger pointing. The common narrative from the left and much of the media after these tragedies is always to go after guns. They want to ban certain types of guns and deny law-abiding Americans the right to own a firearm. But their proposed solutions will undermine the Second Amendment while doing little to actually solve the problem. The best way to solve this problem without trampling on our Constitutional rights is to put armed security guards at every single school in this country. Anyone who is serious about securing any location, whether it's a school, or an airport, or corporate offices like the ones at CNN, knows that armed guards are the first thing you put resources toward. Texas alone recently allocated $400 million for school security upgrades. Most schools already have armed security guards but we need to make sure they ALL do. We are never going to be able to change the evil inside a person that drives them to kill innocent children. What we can do is have all of the security measures in place to stop them. In fact, the Nashville shooter was deterred from attacking another school in the area because it had "too much security," according to police. Taking away guns from law-abiding Americans won't stop school shootings. Putting armed guards at every school in America will. It's common sense and a good investment for the safety of our kids. Share on == and ==. | | | | | | | | REPUBLICANS PASS LANDMARK ENERGY BILL THROUGH THE HOUSE | == | == | Last week, House Republicans passed H.R. 1, the Lower Energy Costs Act. It was our top priority, which is why it was given #1 as the bill number, and it's full of commonsense, uncontroversial energy policy. Yet somehow the vast majority of Democrats voted against the bill. They had little specifics when arguing against it and instead reverted to their usual hyperbolic rhetoric that the legislation will kill the planet because it supports American oil and gas production. We can't survive on a wind and solar-only energy future. It's unreliable, and it's irresponsible for my colleagues on the left to continue pushing this narrative. H.R. 1 removes permitting obstacles for American natural gas, which can provide safe, clean, affordable, and abundant energy to the world and displace foreign coal, which is the primary driver of global emissions. This bill makes it easier to tap into America's vast deposits of critical minerals, which we need to make things like batteries and steel domestically rather than relying on China. And this bill includes two provisions I introduced to protect America's oil refining capacity and make it easier for states to develop carbon capture projects. This bill simply promotes affordable, reliable energy produced right here in America. We produce the cleanest energy in the world and when we export that energy abroad, we lower global emissions. This bill checks all the boxes-it's good for energy production, consumers, and the environment. It is a shame so many Democrats voted against it in the House and that Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden will likely prevent it from becoming law while they're in control of the Senate and White House. | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | == | == | == | | | | | | NEWS | WASHINGTON EXAMINER: == FOX NEWS: == DAILY WIRE: == | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thanks for your reading and your support! | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | == == == | | | Any questions, comments, or concerns? Peter, I can't tell you how hard this is for me to send to you right now. March just ended, and with it, my first End-of-Quarter deadline of 2023.

We were making great progress toward hitting our goal, and then things tailed off. My finance team just informed me that we ended up **_$14,829 short of our projections_** for the quarter. **_THAT 'S NOT GOOD. _**

As I'm writing this, the Socialist Left is looking at this as an opportunity to attack all our campaign's progress to protect our God-given rights, values, and freedoms that make this country _**WORTH FIGHTING FOR.**_

clean_body: I knew I needed to reach out. | Peter, I can't tell you how hard this is for me to send to you right now. March just ended, and with it, my first End-of-Quarter deadline of 2023. We were making great progress toward hitting our goal, and then things tailed off. My finance team just informed me that we ended up $14,829 short of our projections for the quarter. THAT 'S NOT GOOD. As I'm writing this, the Socialist Left is looking at this as an opportunity to attack all our campaign's progress to protect our God-given rights, values, and freedoms that make this country WORTH FIGHTING FOR. With this being said, I'm going to ask that you help me make up ground in the next 12 hours. | God Bless you and your family, JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zufoq4m20b3acf054085487eprlpqnnlt5t9tn60_rp22sh2s8i66o70climaor6c9h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkqatjcgdelngl5s9ckj3dg8784kp77vtrbeeme8_rp22sh2s8i66o70climaor6c9h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfmbj9vl7rspr3atlk9gp7bl8nqpol17edfk18ig_rp22sh2s8i66o70climaor6c9h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbpathv3a8ijfpdj1md8aau0qlao32fjvohq2jv8_rp22sh2s8i66o70climaor6c9h2bs)

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs8tk8oph7m0icp8kh72979n2c8pmsnreolatl18_rp22sh2s8i66o70climaor6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9geq810g1okjeld5q4bk2speubtovjclrcichdg_rp22sh2s8i66o70climaor6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaumuladhkut7oc0idn9m4jijlh20aamej46fau0_rp22sh2s8i66o70climaor6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlogc4c00ghef08n1j5jtfebs3ug3f70ak4asb68_rp22sh2s8i66o70climaor6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfbso7vd9kl76tne4mskcjn6rkrodind3enld970_rp22sh2s8i66o70climaor6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlopollsainfc60gsl2rfdg37tajoe6bsfic3la8_rp22sh2s8i66o70climaor6c9h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zap7hkortfjshhtfdt2q1ncsq0l0rjv94f60f2ko_rp22sh2s8i66o70climaor6c9h2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqplf40pb3qv16tdkcr3sb7o09aes97uq1j9f1t0_rp22sh2s8i66o70climaor6c9h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zebke4i1iudi8ph7vqkdttn6s4jffohaajq8uuu8_rp22sh2s8i66o70climaor6c9h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z898cfaj7a8i8e0j9b90u2q5e5t2t3c6ahae5vl8_rp22sh2s8i66o70climaor6c9h2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We came close to the abyss in 2020. The race for Wisconsin’s Supreme Court seat tomorrow may decide whether we end up on the same precipice in 2024. Your support matters.
body:
Election Day tomorrow!
| | | | |
---
| | |

Protecting the initiative petition is vital for our democracy | | | |

# Capitol Report
April 3, 2023

|

|

|

Jefferson City, MO 65101
(573) 751-4415
Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov

---
|
---
| **Protecting the initiative petition is vital for our democracy!**
JEFFERSON CITY — [House Joint Resolution 43](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=02ae6adc15&e=a088917f89) was brought to the Senate floor for final passage Wednesday evening, in the first of what may be many rounds of debate. If passed, HJR 43 would amend the Missouri Constitution to change the process of citizen-led initiatives. The following is a statement from Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis:

“Attacks on Missouri’s initiative petition are attacks on Missouri’s democracy. Our state Constitution guarantees direct citizen participation in the democratic process, and we have protected that right for over a century. The initiative process allows everyday citizens to move beyond partisan politics and focus on what matters most to their communities. This proposal is about a select few power-hungry people believing they know what Missourians want better than Missourians do.”

Senator Roberts and several of his colleagues spoke against HJR 43 for more than four hours before the bill was tabled. Senator Roberts said, “Protecting the initiative petition is vital for our democracy.”

For more information, please contact Sen. Steven Roberts’ office at 573-751-4415.
---
|
---
| **Democrats filibuster attempt to limit constitutional changes**
Senate Democrats on March 29 blocked – at least temporarily – a proposed constitutional amendment intended to make it harder to amend the Missouri Constitution. Since the change is a priority for majority Republicans, the Senate is expected to resume debate on it at some point during the final weeks of the 2023 legislative session.

House Joint Resolution 43’s main provision would raise the vote threshold for ratifying future constitutional amendments from a simple majority – which has been the case for more than two centuries – to a 60 percent supermajority. As so-called “ballot candy” to entice voters into supporting something they might otherwise oppose, it also includes a provision falsely purporting to prohibit non-U.S. citizens from voting on constitutional amendments. Since, the constitution already bars non-citizens from voting in Missouri elections, this provision actually would change nothing.

The deceptive ballot language included in HJR 43 lists the ballot candy first, with the higher ratification requirement appearing last. The House of Representatives approved HJR 43 nearly two months ago on a straight party-line vote, with minority Democrats opposed.

During the Senate debate on the measure, Democrats filibustered for nearly four hours before Republican leaders set it aside. If the Senate ultimately passes HJR 43, it automatically will go on the November 2024 statewide ballot, unless the governor exercises his constitutional authority to set an earlier election date. Ratification would require just a simple majority.
---
|
---
| **Diversity debate overshadows $45.62 billion state budget**
The House of Representatives on March 30 voted out a nearly $45.62 billion state operating budget for the upcoming fiscal year following two days of debate focused on language Republicans inserted in the plan to broadly prohibit all state agencies and anyone who does business with them from promoting “diversity, equity or inclusion.” Because it would have wide-ranging negative consequences for the state, the Senate’s top budget official has vowed to strip the language when the appropriations process moves to the upper chamber.

During initial debate on March 28 on the various bills that make up the 2024 state operating budget, Republican lawmakers voted to add language barring the state from spending any money for “staffing, vendors, consultants or programs associated with” diversity, equity or inclusion, commonly known as DEI. Supporters of the language argued DEI promotes “neo-Marxism.”

However, both government and the private sector, including many companies that contract with the state, commonly promote diversity, equity and inclusion as a way to attract and retain workers, as well as foster stronger relationships with historically marginalized groups. Because DEI policies are so ubiquitous in modern society, the impact of attempting to defund everything connected to them could be devastating for Missouri by making it impossible for the state to hire outside contractors, prohibiting countless state programs and costing Missouri all of the $20.69 billion in federal funds it expects to receive in FY 2024.

Initially, Democrats largely stood alone in opposing the anti-DEI language, but as the House worked its way through initial passage of the appropriations bills, more Republicans began realizing the implications for the state, with about two dozen eventually joining the opposition. As the House was taking its final budget votes, the Republican chairman of the Senate Appropriations Committee told news reporters the controversial language will be removed.

With debate focused on diversity, equity and inclusion, discussion was limited on the substance of the House budget plan, which cuts $2.14 billion in spending authority from the governor’s request and leaves billions more from the state’s unprecedented $6 billion revenue surplus unexpended.

One Republican-initiated change eliminated more than $100 million in spending authority earmarked for local public school districts. While the House Budget Committee chairman argued this was excess authority that wouldn’t be spent, Democrats countered that instead of cutting it, lawmakers should let schools spend it, perhaps on increasing minimum teacher pay, a category in which Missouri already ranks as worst in the nation. Such proposals were rejected.

In another controversial move, House Republicans completely eliminated all state funding for local public libraries in retaliation for a lawsuit filed on their behalf challenging the constitutionality of a new “book banning” law that prompted many libraries to pull many popular and acclaimed books from their shelves out of fear of prosecution.

Democrats also criticized Republicans for failing to tap the state budget surplus to increase reimbursement rates for providers of critical in-home care and address staffing shortages throughout state government. In addition, the House plan eliminated $1 billion requested by the governor to begin rebuilding key sections of Interstate 70.

The budget debate now shifts to the Senate, which is expected to restore most of the governor’s requested spending, as well as further tap the surplus revenue for a variety of other programs and projects. The two chambers must approve identical versions of the 13 appropriations bills that make up the operating budget by a constitutional deadline of May 5.
---
|
---

[_**SB 64**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=a4261d0187&e=a088917f89) \- Enacts new law relating to wage range inquiries by employees and prospective employees

[**SB 65**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=4ee1023dba&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons

[_**SB 145**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=70ab1f23b9&e=a088917f89) \- Creates certificates of exemplary conduct and good moral character issued by circuit courts

[_**SB 146**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=653d76c1b8&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to compensation for wrongful convictions

[_**SB 147**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=150a3f7ca8&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility

[_**SB 215**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=7b92cacad8&e=a088917f89) \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution

[**_SB 216_**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=a97d74998e&e=a088917f89) \- Designates "James W Brooks Memorial Highway" in St. Louis City and St. Louis County

**[_SB 217_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=f07abc944f&e=a088917f89) **\- Creates the offense of unlawful possession by a minor

[**SB 363**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=110f3c7d21&e=a088917f89) \- Specifies that the St. Louis City school board shall fill any vacancy that occurs in such school board outside of the normal election cycle

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=a8c94b8023&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.

clean_body: Protecting the initiative petition is vital for our democracy | | | | | | | Capitol Report April 3, 2023 | | | | Contact Senator Roberts 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329 Jefferson City, MO 65101 (573) 751-4415 Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov | | | | | | | | | | | | Protecting the initiative petition is vital for our democracy! JEFFERSON CITY — was brought to the Senate floor for final passage Wednesday evening, in the first of what may be many rounds of debate. If passed, HJR 43 would amend the Missouri Constitution to change the process of citizen-led initiatives. The following is a statement from Sen. Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis: “Attacks on Missouri’s initiative petition are attacks on Missouri’s democracy. Our state Constitution guarantees direct citizen participation in the democratic process, and we have protected that right for over a century. The initiative process allows everyday citizens to move beyond partisan politics and focus on what matters most to their communities. This proposal is about a select few power-hungry people believing they know what Missourians want better than Missourians do.” Senator Roberts and several of his colleagues spoke against HJR 43 for more than four hours before the bill was tabled. Senator Roberts said, “Protecting the initiative petition is vital for our democracy.” For more information, please contact Sen. Steven Roberts’ office at 573-751-4415. | | Democrats filibuster attempt to limit constitutional changes Senate Democrats on March 29 blocked – at least temporarily – a proposed constitutional amendment intended to make it harder to amend the Missouri Constitution. Since the change is a priority for majority Republicans, the Senate is expected to resume debate on it at some point during the final weeks of the 2023 legislative session. House Joint Resolution 43’s main provision would raise the vote threshold for ratifying future constitutional amendments from a simple majority – which has been the case for more than two centuries – to a 60 percent supermajority. As so-called “ballot candy” to entice voters into supporting something they might otherwise oppose, it also includes a provision falsely purporting to prohibit non-U.S. citizens from voting on constitutional amendments. Since, the constitution already bars non-citizens from voting in Missouri elections, this provision actually would change nothing. The deceptive ballot language included in HJR 43 lists the ballot candy first, with the higher ratification requirement appearing last. The House of Representatives approved HJR 43 nearly two months ago on a straight party-line vote, with minority Democrats opposed. During the Senate debate on the measure, Democrats filibustered for nearly four hours before Republican leaders set it aside. If the Senate ultimately passes HJR 43, it automatically will go on the November 2024 statewide ballot, unless the governor exercises his constitutional authority to set an earlier election date. Ratification would require just a simple majority. | | Diversity debate overshadows $45.62 billion state budget The House of Representatives on March 30 voted out a nearly $45.62 billion state operating budget for the upcoming fiscal year following two days of debate focused on language Republicans inserted in the plan to broadly prohibit all state agencies and anyone who does business with them from promoting “diversity, equity or inclusion.” Because it would have wide-ranging negative consequences for the state, the Senate’s top budget official has vowed to strip the language when the appropriations process moves to the upper chamber. During initial debate on March 28 on the various bills that make up the 2024 state operating budget, Republican lawmakers voted to add language barring the state from spending any money for “staffing, vendors, consultants or programs associated with” diversity, equity or inclusion, commonly known as DEI. Supporters of the language argued DEI promotes “neo-Marxism.” However, both government and the private sector, including many companies that contract with the state, commonly promote diversity, equity and inclusion as a way to attract and retain workers, as well as foster stronger relationships with historically marginalized groups. Because DEI policies are so ubiquitous in modern society, the impact of attempting to defund everything connected to them could be devastating for Missouri by making it impossible for the state to hire outside contractors, prohibiting countless state programs and costing Missouri all of the $20.69 billion in federal funds it expects to receive in FY 2024. Initially, Democrats largely stood alone in opposing the anti-DEI language, but as the House worked its way through initial passage of the appropriations bills, more Republicans began realizing the implications for the state, with about two dozen eventually joining the opposition. As the House was taking its final budget votes, the Republican chairman of the Senate Appropriations Committee told news reporters the controversial language will be removed. With debate focused on diversity, equity and inclusion, discussion was limited on the substance of the House budget plan, which cuts $2.14 billion in spending authority from the governor’s request and leaves billions more from the state’s unprecedented $6 billion revenue surplus unexpended. One Republican-initiated change eliminated more than $100 million in spending authority earmarked for local public school districts. While the House Budget Committee chairman argued this was excess authority that wouldn’t be spent, Democrats countered that instead of cutting it, lawmakers should let schools spend it, perhaps on increasing minimum teacher pay, a category in which Missouri already ranks as worst in the nation. Such proposals were rejected. In another controversial move, House Republicans completely eliminated all state funding for local public libraries in retaliation for a lawsuit filed on their behalf challenging the constitutionality of a new “book banning” law that prompted many libraries to pull many popular and acclaimed books from their shelves out of fear of prosecution. Democrats also criticized Republicans for failing to tap the state budget surplus to increase reimbursement rates for providers of critical in-home care and address staffing shortages throughout state government. In addition, the House plan eliminated $1 billion requested by the governor to begin rebuilding key sections of Interstate 70. The budget debate now shifts to the Senate, which is expected to restore most of the governor’s requested spending, as well as further tap the surplus revenue for a variety of other programs and projects. The two chambers must approve identical versions of the 13 appropriations bills that make up the operating budget by a constitutional deadline of May 5. | | 2023 Legislation Updates \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions \- Enacts new law relating to wage range inquiries by employees and prospective employees \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons \- Creates certificates of exemplary conduct and good moral character issued by circuit courts \- Creates provisions relating to compensation for wrongful convictions \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution \- Designates "James W Brooks Memorial Highway" in St. Louis City and St. Louis County \- Creates the offense of unlawful possession by a minor \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines \- Specifies that the St. Louis City school board shall fill any vacancy that occurs in such school board outside of the normal election cycle \- Authorizes counties to freeze the real property assessed values of certain senior citizens | | "Signed By Governor" | "Truly Agreed Bills" | | | | | HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19). SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. Peter, we made it! We _crushed_ our quarterly fundraising goal.

Generous donations from everyday folks like you truly made all the difference. We’re confident that with you in our corner, Brandon’s going to defeat Tate Reeves and move Mississippi forward.

But we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas for a second. Tate Reeves has a massive war chest – if we’re going to win, we need to know that our supporters are ready to mobilize. That’s why we’re asking: **Who do you believe should serve as the governor of Mississippi?** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61213284/399461888/808545231?refcode=ea.27593211-43d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.27593211-43d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjc1OTMyMTEtNDNkMi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wzzj25q_K-B-VC_rs6QVb9vTnDK5M6vnYomtchq4Mdg=&emci=7d6abfe0-3dd2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=27593211-43d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6059782) | **[TATE REEVES →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61213285/399461889/808545231?refcode=ea.27593211-43d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.27593211-43d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjc1OTMyMTEtNDNkMi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wzzj25q_K-B-VC_rs6QVb9vTnDK5M6vnYomtchq4Mdg=&emci=7d6abfe0-3dd2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=27593211-43d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6059782)**

**[BRANDON PRESLEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61213287/399461891/808545231?refcode=ea.27593211-43d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.27593211-43d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjc1OTMyMTEtNDNkMi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wzzj25q_K-B-VC_rs6QVb9vTnDK5M6vnYomtchq4Mdg=&emci=7d6abfe0-3dd2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=27593211-43d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6059782)**
---
This election is bigger than any of us, Peter.

It’s about getting rid of Tate Reeves — one of the most disliked, self-serving governors in the country. It’s about cleaning up corruption, like how Reeves sent Mississippians' hard-earned taxpayer dollars to his personal trainer.

And sending a strong message to special interests everywhere that the American people are the ones in charge, not them.

We’re hoping to show Brandon that we have numbers on our side. So we want to know right now:
**Who do you believe should serve as the governor of Mississippi?**

clean_body: Brandon is going to see the responses to this. | = Peter, we made it! We crushed our quarterly fundraising goal. Generous donations from everyday folks like you truly made all the difference. We’re confident that with you in our corner, Brandon’s going to defeat Tate Reeves and move Mississippi forward. But we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas for a second. Tate Reeves has a massive war chest – if we’re going to win, we need to know that our supporters are ready to mobilize. That’s why we’re asking: Who do you believe should serve as the governor of Mississippi? | This election is bigger than any of us, Peter. It’s about getting rid of Tate Reeves — one of the most disliked, self-serving governors in the country. It’s about cleaning up corruption, like how Reeves sent Mississippians' hard-earned taxpayer dollars to his personal trainer. And sending a strong message to special interests everywhere that the American people are the ones in charge, not them. We’re hoping to show Brandon that we have numbers on our side. So we want to know right now: Who do you believe should serve as the governor of Mississippi? We greatly appreciate your input, Team Brandon | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Box 208 Nettleton, MS 38858 Click here to

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Sick of inflation? We have a plan
body:
Right now, America’s fiscal situation is dire, with the national debt now exceeding $230,000 per U.S. household!

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zri5f63o0fllsjjcqk0sp76tlff7mmskfe29q3ho_rp22sh2s8i66o70clim6pb2c5h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

I hope this email finds you well. But if you're like most Americans, then you're probably feeling the strain of the soaring inflation caused by our federal government's unconscionable spending sprees.

**Right now, America 's fiscal situation is dire, with the national debt now exceeding _$230,000 per U.S. household!_**

And if this debt goes unchecked, it may place a crippling tax burden on everyday Americans and could even set off another financial crisis with everyday Americans like you and me to foot the bill.

**Please join other concerned conservatives in demanding Congress curtail inflation, reduce taxes, and end its reckless spending spree by completing the quick 1-minute survey linked below:**

**[http://secured.heritage.org/inflation-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvv2madpbomgvh3r7vr8k0vd3j0968js11eh8nd0_rp22sh2s8i66o70clim6pb2c5h2bs)**

American families simply _cannot_ afford to get caught up in a vicious circle of rising interest rates, soaring inflation, economic stagnation, and ever-increasing debt.

[**Demand responsible stewardship of taxpayer dollars and a return to limited federal spending by completing your survey now »**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zct5vm62kr8767n0o3o93m6ej8n78nbskktqvnu0_rp22sh2s8i66o70clim6pb2c5h2bs)

Armed with your answers, The Heritage Foundation will work side by side with conservative legislators on your behalf to advance meaningful fiscal reform and pressure Congress to stop wasting _your_ money on frivolous federal spending.

The more people who complete this survey, the louder our collective voice. Please complete your survey now by clicking the link below--it will only take about a minute of your time:

**[http://secured.heritage.org/inflation-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhq8gn90asla35vqmgrnde3qumsof20qlf0cdcm8_rp22sh2s8i66o70clim6pb2c5h2bs)**

Gratefully,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

American Briefing

body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj8h23ua2d0jgr66hffj9sdeqlrnfrmidik9ecog_rp22sh2s8i66o70climeob4c3h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513860:JDBGCxGNH:m:1:3365131770:2B95892F845CD182F6A3C20D8D0AA0E3:r)

| | [**A progressive district attorney wants to put an innocent cop in prison for 99 years. This is a****death********sentence****. Please help!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513860:JDBGCxGNH:m:1:3365131770:2B95892F845CD182F6A3C20D8D0AA0E3:r)**[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513860:JDBGCxGNH:m:1:3365131770:2B95892F845CD182F6A3C20D8D0AA0E3:r) ** This is Sheriff David Clarke. Please just take a moment to read my urgent text to you -- an innocent cop's life may depend on it. [**A progressive district attorney, bought and paid for by the infamous George Soros, wants to sentence Sgt. Josh Blake to 99 years in prison for doing his job.**** **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513860:JDBGCxGNH:m:1:3365131770:2B95892F845CD182F6A3C20D8D0AA0E3:r) If we can't raise the crucial funds needed to get a top lawyer for Josh, the rabid**** progressive**** D.A., Jose Garza will win. [**And if that happens, I'm deeply concerned Josh won't live long enough to die of old age in prison. Because violent criminals -- maybe some he arrested himself, will****murder****him.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513860:JDBGCxGNH:m:1:3365131770:2B95892F845CD182F6A3C20D8D0AA0E3:r) On May 31st, 2020, in Austin, Texas, an anti-police mob started rioting. They looted and vandalized buildings. They even set police cars on fire! Then the mob blocked a major highway that runs through Austin. No one could get through, not even police cars, fire trucks, and ambulances. The rioters then began to throw objects at the officers. So Josh and his fellow police officers deployed non-lethal bean bag rounds at the rioters that were throwing rocks and other objects. **Then what did progressive D.A. Jose Garza do? Did he indict the rioters for arson, looting, assault, and more?[NO! He indicted Josh and 19 other Austin police officers for committing first degree felonies!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513860:JDBGCxGNH:m:1:3365131770:2B95892F845CD182F6A3C20D8D0AA0E3:r)** Josh himself was charged with two counts of aggravated assault, which can mean a 99-year sentence. That's a death sentence one way or another. [**Sgt. Josh Blake may die behind bars because a rabid****progressive****D.A. is on a mission to destroy good cops!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513860:JDBGCxGNH:m:1:3365131770:2B95892F845CD182F6A3C20D8D0AA0E3:r) And Josh and his wife simply don't have the money to hire a top-shelf lawyer. Thankfully, National Center for Police Defense, Inc stepped in. With your generous support, the NCPD will help provide an excellent, aggressive legal defense for Josh. The NCPD was founded in 2015 to help law enforcement officers and military service members in their time of greatest need, when they're unjustly charged for crimes they didn't commit. NCPD helps pay for legal expenses. And even help pay for food, rent, utility bills, and more so innocent cops and their families don't go under as they endure the brutal legal process. NCPD can do all that only with the generous support of concerned people like you. You may be the only thing standing between Josh and violent criminals who plan to harm him, even kill him. [**Please help save Josh's life by fully funding his crucial legal defense with your very best gift immediately.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513860:JDBGCxGNH:m:1:3365131770:2B95892F845CD182F6A3C20D8D0AA0E3:r) Thank you so much. Retired Sheriff David Clarke
---

subject: Fwd: Coach: “I Won’t Back Down”

body:
Did you see my note? It’s important that you read this >>>
| | | Peter,
I asked my team to send you an important note last week. I’m following up in case you missed their email below.
Chuck Schumer is coming after me – displaying typical brazen **DEMOCRAT DISHONESTY.**
Just look at this tweet he sent out.
When he says “health care” he’s referring to the Biden administration’s move to turn our U.S. Department of Defense into an _ABORTION TRAVEL AGENCY_!
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/e33f46f2aa16dfed/2d2cbcad6cf0d68fc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
I’m standing up against this immoral and illegal far-left insanity. **AND I WON’T BACK****DOWN!** Please read the email and my note below and step up today to stand with me in this fight.
\- Coach
---
|
---
To: All Supporters From: BREAKING NEWS (via Team Tuberville)Sent: March 28, 2023Subject: Coach: “I Won’t Back Down”
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/e33f46f2aa16dfed/aa6df05e5023b1e4c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
** _THE LATEST NEWS_**** _ON THIS DEVELOPING STORY:_** Last October, following the Supreme Court decision that overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , Department of Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin announced that the Pentagon intended to develop policies to expand taxpayer-subsidized abortion in the U.S. military, beyond what is allowed under federal statute.

For months, the Biden administration refused to provide lawmakers details.

Then, on February 16th, Secretary Austin released a memo announcing the formal implementation of this abortion policy – **which would fund travel and paid time off for service members AND their dependents seeking an abortion.**

Coach has followed through on his pledge to hold all general and flag officer nominations and high-level Pentagon promotions from Senate confirmation until this policy is reversed.

Now, Chuck Schumer has gone on the attack – with Coach in his sights!

Coach is taking a stand for LIFE and the RULE OF LAW.

[**Rush a secure contribution to show you’re behind him:**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/e33f46f2aa16dfed/a506bcb150e5e3cac3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
[**RUSH SUPPORT >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/e33f46f2aa16dfed/b5e5cb83d920541dc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
**Below is a note from Coach. He wanted to make sure it got to you:**
---
|
---
**I’ve reviewed Senator Chuck Schumer’s recent media comments. Here’s my response:** I WON’T BACK DOWN. The Biden administration’s politicization of our nation’s military and the Pentagon’s immoral and illegal expansion of its authority to advance the left’s extreme pro-abortion agenda is wrong. They’ve turned our Department of Defense into an abortion travel agency!
The law is clear, our U.S. Constitution is clear. Defense Secretary Austin has overstepped his authority, and it would be irresponsible for the U.S. Senate to allow this policy to stand. I refuse to let the Biden administration walk all over the legislative branch, period. \- Coach
---
|
---
_Thank you for any donation you can send as this showdown heats up._ _We’re grateful for your support, Peter!_ _\- Team Tuberville_
---
[**STAND WITH COACH >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/e33f46f2aa16dfed/e17bb5b87e04615ac3d6b838967d376c/33013)

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. | | The Washington Post is reporting on the truth that many of us know, but the GOP won’t admit: their lies have real human consequences. **The Big Lie is putting people in danger!** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61214970/399467345/1294554799?refcode=eem_fr_b1_040323_election-workers_30ac_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDYyODQ1Ny00OWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p09V1q8bgeX4_v_ZsatmVI5i08n8TcbFZgK7WE-0aNY=) Being an election clerk used to be a way to get involved in democracy and contribute to the political system we all cherish. After all, local officials are crucial to making our elections possible!

**But Trump and the GOP’s conspiracy theories have made life hell for election officials. Some have even received disturbing messages like “I KNOW WHERE YOU SLEEP:”** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61214971/399467346/1294554799?refcode=eem_fr_b1_040323_election-workers_30ac_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDYyODQ1Ny00OWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=p09V1q8bgeX4_v_ZsatmVI5i08n8TcbFZgK7WE-0aNY=) The Brennan Center for Justice reports that similar intimidation has taken place across the country. **And it’s not just at the local level – Secretaries of State have been receiving death threats ever since the 2020 election.**

**With threats to election workers at an all-time high, we need to do everything we can to elect Secretaries of State who will DEFEND democracy -_but that takes grassroots support!_**

clean_body: | = | | The Washington Post is reporting on the truth that many of us know, but the GOP won’t admit: their lies have real human consequences. The Big Lie is putting people in danger! = Being an election clerk used to be a way to get involved in democracy and contribute to the political system we all cherish. After all, local officials are crucial to making our elections possible! But Trump and the GOP’s conspiracy theories have made life hell for election officials. Some have even received disturbing messages like “I KNOW WHERE YOU SLEEP:” = The Brennan Center for Justice reports that similar intimidation has taken place across the country. And it’s not just at the local level – Secretaries of State have been receiving death threats ever since the 2020 election. With threats to election workers at an all-time high, we need to do everything we can to elect Secretaries of State who will DEFEND democracy -but that takes grassroots support! = | = = = = = = Team DASS Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. = | =

**Mar-a-Lago, FL** – As Joe Biden recently announced his Marxist executive order that seeks to impose racist and woke sexual ideology across the federal government, President Donald J. Trump has pledged to eradicate any attempt to weaken America’s institutions through these harmful and discriminatory “equity” programs.
Instead of making decisions based on merit or qualifications, these policies from Biden are enforced based on skin color and sexual identity.
[ ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kM1uqzAQhZ_G7IzM4B9YsLi5UTZRu223JjOAUxuQ7SRNn75yVXU3-r7RzNGxYfdueg7MHBjA4jAxANb-YwBneXh_1ee385EfXnbPj1rJR7HwnwHk505_q79XagrW-ULNscJBwdSIioZGd0JJJdq-WgaLrbIopJJW6IZgFF1rzcXoXvVKoK3cAAJaIUXbdGWoreq6Rko9GqNAjz2TAil9bBNuq_V4zfEW9vqyhcoPS857-sl0YnCKtzB6KorB6Q7j_HUFbmda0UrDI90pJrfOfHRIa-K0cQojIRYWbPx0KXC38rwQnwgpWs_n7U5xDbTmesnBV3HA_eG8d0kbJsVcCigPvwMAAP__RcdqJA)

“Biden is weaponizing every tool of government power to push this racism and this Communism and Marxism,” President Trump said. “I will instruct the Department of Justice to make clear that any such discrimination is completely and totally illegal, and to investigate the unlawful domination and discrimination and civil right abuses carried out by the Biden administration.”
All staff, offices, and initiatives connected to Biden’s un-American policy will be immediately terminated. President Trump will create a team to review and reverse actions under Biden's “equity” agenda and request Congress to establish a restitution fund for those unjustly discriminated against by these destructive policies.
_**PRESIDENT TRUMP WILL REVERSE BIDEN’S MARXIST EXECUTIVE ORDER** _

_“Every institution in America is under attack from this Marxist concept of ‘equity.’... I will get this extremism out of the White House, out of the military, out of the Justice Department, and out of our government.” -- President Donald J. Trump, March 2, 2023_
**RESTORING THE AMERICAN PROMISE OF EQUAL PROTECTION UNDER LAW: President Trump will eliminate all race and sex-based discrimination throughout the federal government.**
On day one, President Trump will revoke Biden’s Marxist DEI executive order, and reinstate the Trump 2020 [executive order](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kLtutDAQhZ_GdEZmsA0UFP_-K5pV0iatLwM4Mdiyvbe3j1hF6UbzHR19OmqL3s3PkXQnArA6mwkAaf8RgAs_fb7Ly8flTE9v0dOzFPx-UPhPAMoz4l_0t6XGTTl_fLtzZUcBc8MqHBvZM8EFa4dqHQdh1IBSay21VGbms5AcRAuoZD8MbeVGYNAyztqmP45aib5vOJe66wRIPRDOLObvMNuwK2-_SrpusTZhq_y4lhLzy2kiML3IfXUF13DNWKtkVnfDXC_hRmCKCbOzuBenPFWmuLBnAhM-0FyLuyENyWKiJmxaFbcvNCmDNOOD5oIJQ3lGty8EpiqNNt6d9y7LjnC2HDMcRj8BAAD___R6bjo) banning stereotyping based on race and sex in the federal government.
President Trump will instruct the Department of Justice to make clear that any such discrimination by the U.S. government is illegal.
The Trump administration will investigate the unlawful discrimination and civil rights abuses carried out by the Biden administration.
President Trump will immediately terminate all staffers hired to implement Biden’s policy and eliminate all related offices and initiatives.
President Trump will create a special team to rapidly review every action taken by federal agencies under Biden’s “equity” agenda that will need to be reversed.
President Trump will ask Congress to create a restitution fund for Americans who have been unjustly discriminated against by these “equity” policies, and he will restore a merit-based federal civil service.
**A WOKE TAKEOVER OF THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT: Joe Biden recently signed executive order is designed to embed Marxist ideology in every part of the federal government.**
Biden’s order requires that nearly every federal department and agency establish an “equity” enforcement squad to implement a woke takeover of the entire federal government.
The Marxist concept of “equity” involves the sinister practice of awarding jobs and benefits and enforcing government programs based on skin color or sexual identity rather than on merit and need.
Biden’s order weaponizes every tool of government power to push this Marxism and Communism.
Under Biden’s order, within 30 days, over 20 agencies including the Treasury, the Department of Justice, Department of Health and Human Services, and the Department of Defense will be [required](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kLuu3CAQhp8Gd1gwvrBbuMhmRbNK2qTFZmxIMBAudvbtIx9FpxvNjD59_6_26Oz6noh4EABjdSYApPtCAF794-f38fXj9aSPb9HR5zj053WFrwSgvCN-vv6ntLgr666teDZ6GmDlrMGJjzc29APr7o2Z5k5oHOZRcHEfuGbLPHec96sQAyK_i8ZOwKBjPev47RpaNdxuvO_HWYgBxvlOeqYx_w6rDl45_aukusd2CXvjJlNKzB9OkoA8z7M9jS1oQs3YbuEgIOdkcbV-oymEnYCMCbPV6ItVjqql2OAzAXlJEJAMCEg-EpD4F5da7IE0JI2JBk_XmorBRJU-lF8-mGq5MPin2vKmymuaa4whFbqGRKvXmDKmAzVdwr5Xb4vFTItJoW6GFoN0RY1JObqFA5Pf0RcCskmTjqd1zuZRkJ5tV89X5H8BAAD__2Ksj6w) to implement an “Agency Equity Team.”
These teams will be tasked with infusing radical left-wing concepts and training throughout the federal workforce as well as submitting annual equity plans to a new White House Steering Committee on Equity.
A member of Biden’s administration recently [admitted](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kM2O4yAQhJ8G37BwG2Ny4LDZyJdo97p7xaadMMOPBSRM3n7EaDS3VtenqlJpfzi7vxSZzwTgbk0mAGT8RQCu_Pz_r7j-u17o-c_h6EVMvDYVfhOA8jrwB_126dFr69p3vnRGTbAPrEM1CMkmPrHx1N2VBmHYuE1m3DUTo5QDM7PmALBJAavorAIGI-NsHGQ7ej1JOXAu1nmeQKwnwpnB_B53E4N25q2khz_6LfrOqXspR_7qtBBYaq190MU2LuHTYm0YgSVgzQSW1RoMNNtbyBQ_cHsU-0Qak8FES6QpxkLjo9D8ygW93WjSm82e7il6uqPBpB29xSem4DEUAkuXlDmqdc5mMRPObm2QFvoZAAD__22IcLU) that the goal is to put the concept of equity “at the center of how this government operates.”
Biden’s order re-establishes discrimination in America’s federal programs and forces the creation of an insidious system that discriminates based on race and sex.
**BIDEN’S DISCRIMINATORY AGENDA: The Biden administration has a long history of abandoning the principles of equal treatment for all Americans and pursuing discriminatory and Marxist policies instead.**
From day one, Biden has made it his mission to infuse radical policies into the federal government. Biden abolished President Trump’s 1776 Commission and quickly rolled out an education agenda that encourages teaching American children to erase the Declaration of Independence and its timeless truth that “all men are created equal.”
Last year, the Biden administration [released](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kLFugzAQhp_GbEb22QYyMDSNWKJ2bVeDD7jWgGs7QXn7iqjqdKf7T58-_XYJnsZHy-ozA5jJJQbA1AsDuOrz53t1_bhe-PkteH6pjN6PFF4ZQH4E_H_9o5S4WPLHtb4UrjUwSlFgK6tGGG2EOhVzi8III2QPqq6UAacGOUo12kEZGAchC2pBgBJaKNkcS2lN00itq76uDVT9iWnhMH1vo9tW691XjrcllMO2FL6dcw7p6dQx6PZ9L2eMlO2E5RYnBl2I2xQxJbpTWhh0EcMW8zPARA7XzPtjJI4_N8oPbodM28qDt2viEe9oPY_W0WA9dweF7sjthKuzRWxd2Ml7SlXNtJiONg6x3wAAAP__B0lvxw) 25 “equity action plans” that effectively call for allocating government resources based on an individual's race or identity rather than need.
Multiple judges have found that the Biden administration has engaged in unconstitutional discrimination under the guise of “equity.”
The Biden administration [attempted](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j7tu4zAQRb-G6iRQw5dYsFivocbYbZOWz4gxaREiDcF_HzAI0h3MGczcq3NJMbwUEhcEsEVXEQAifxDAjV7e__Pb2-06Xv6VNF45o2e38BcBtFfxv6s_VyafdUx9Kq6DUwzCjAevZr5gRhkmcthUmEUgRkqsrfTSeksoo9zNwkjB9GKHqAADwRSTeekwabYsM6XcCMGAG4kodr7e9-D2h07usx3PXCa75yGprbVSvzOtCNbzPKfHq8Xsa_cIVsAwI1gx70wQrM-KYC17ii3ajiY6_xidN208fIo-jCZpex-DPrI_6rS1nIZDuXLGlGLlAlH80Vv3B18BAAD__z--Y2I) to grant loan forgiveness to certain groups of farmers while excluding others before the program was blocked by a federal judge.
Another federal judge [found](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kDHP3CAMhn8N2TgRBwgZMvR6ynJq13Z1gvlCSyAC7ovu31dUVRfL8vvIemw8zuDde2bjnQHs3hYGwIYvDOAp7z-_6-eP54Pfv52BP7SSV0vhKwOo75P-o_-23OhAH9p0fHR2VuB60dHcayOUVGKYun2WZjUjOImuhwk3RLFZZaSUZlpHZVTnZxAwCCmG3rTmhsqYXkq9jqMCvU5MCkvld3I2RQz2V82v47xt6ejCvNd6lr9OC4Pluq6bS3ml0mIGS_GVCoOFPjF-UC71wBgZLCCgZ7AI3crAYHFkKWPgeJ4UAlbiW3rlyvMrUOF1x8pXbylytIePvtSM1afIN4yVW4pvvqVPb3mm4Mlx94q28Jr4tftKPFOp-MqNTVek3JTYsJSdDQ89Si2kU3aadJdne14-BF_0yKT4aO9tp_wJAAD__14giMY) that the Biden administration was engaging in race based discrimination in the allocation of COVID relief to restaurant owners.
The Biden administration and Democrats have also used “equity” as a catch-all term to justify each one of their radical policies, from the Green New Deal to defunding the police.
_**TRANSCRIPT** _
Joe Biden recently signed a very sinister executive order mandating that almost every federal department and agency establish a Marxist “equity”—this is something new—enforcement squad to implement a woke takeover of the entire federal government.
Every institution in America is under attack from this Marxist concept of “equity.”
Instead of treating everyone equally, making decisions based on merit or qualifications, “equity” means that benefits are awarded and policies are enforced based on skin color and sexual identity. We don’t think that’s a good idea. It’s a catch-all term used by the Radical Left to justify every one of its crazy programs. Climate change is now about fighting “environmental racism”. They falsely accuse law enforcement of racism to explain why they must end cash bail instead of busting up bloodthirsty gangs that kill people all over our cities.

When FEMA, the EPA, and the FAA, and IRS are corrupted and tasked with enforcing “equity,” freedom and equality under the law are absolutely DEAD.
I will revoke this executive order on my first day back in office. I will look forward to it.
The Oval Office is a wonderful place, but also a wonderful place to stop things that are very bad for our country from happening.
I will instruct the Department of Justice to make clear that any such discrimination is completely and totally illegal, and to investigate the unlawful domination and discrimination and civil right abuses carried out by the Biden administration.
I will immediately terminate all staffers hired to implement this policy, and eliminate all offices and initiatives connected to it. We will not allow it to happen.
I will create a special team to rapidly review every action taken by federal agencies under Biden’s “equity” agenda that will need to be reversed. We will reverse almost all of them. Maybe, in fact, all of them.
I will also urge Congress to create a restitution fund for Americans who have been unjustly discriminated against by these “equity” policies, and I will restore a merit-based federal civil service.
I will get this extremism out of the White House, out of the military, out of the Justice Department, and out of our government. We don’t want it in our country.
The United States of America will be strong again.
Thank you very much.

As we move forward, it's vital to Senator Durbin that we ensure that the Senate addresses the issues that matter most to you and your family.

Whether it's about gun violence, education, climate, reproductive rights, or judges, we are eager to hear your perspective. Your input will guide Senator Durbin’s efforts in the Senate as we work tirelessly to address these critical issues. There are no wrong answers, and your voice matters. Thank you for your continued support and dedication, Team Durbin ** **** Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

Friend, far-right Republicans are launching new attacks against reproductive rights across the country!
**Wyoming just banned mifepristone — a medication used to perform abortion and assist with miscarriages — even though abortion remains legal there. And now, a Trump-appointed judge in Texas could issue a ruling that would ban mifepristone _nationwide_.**
The majority of Americans _support_ legal abortion, and millions of people rely on medications like mifepristone to access affordable, non-invasive abortion care. But GOP extremists continue to push an out-of-touch and dangerous agenda.
It's far past time for Congress to take action and restore reproductive rights nationwide. **Sinema’s colleague Sen. Mark Kelly voted against the measure,** saying it would have “unintended consequence of reverting back to rules that create even more uncertainty for Arizona businesses, developers, and farmers.”
But since Sinema voted with Republicans, the resolution will now go to President Biden’s desk, and he’s being **forced to issue a veto** – only his second veto in office.
We’re thankful that the President is able to stop this. Otherwise, Sinema would be putting Arizona’s farmers, businesses, and families at risk – just for the benefit of corporate polluters.
**It comes as no surprise that Sinema has received over $350,000 from industry interests that pollute the land, water, and air**.

name: Team Women Win Wisconsin
subject: This is it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Women Win Wisconsin PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230403_em_fr_b1_WWW_1_YR_O [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230403_em_fr_b1_WWW_1_YR_O]
Peter,
Tomorrow is Election Day, which means it’s our last chance to ask for your support in our people-powered movement to restore reproductive rights in Wisconsin.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/666A5A4D5851736176767479304E367058506F63325A6F70455869566447524C6339584A534D4339764D6C5466543756516C464F453136313369636B33667A44/editor_images/WWW%204.3.23.jpg]
We wouldn't have made it this far without your help, Peter. With historically low voter turnout in spring elections and one final push left, can we count on you to chip in any amount today to help our team elect proven pro-choice champions? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230403_em_fr_b1_WWW_1_YR_O]
CHIP IN TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230403_em_fr_b1_WWW_1_YR_O]
Our reproductive freedoms are under attack.
Wisconsinites’ lives are at stake because of an abortion ban that was written before women had the right to vote and before doctors were told to wash their hands.
But what gives us hope is the opportunity to end the archaic 1849 abortion ban by electing a Supreme Court justice that shares our values. What gives us hope is the opportunity to elect women who believe in and will fight for reproductive freedom.
Peter, we believe that we can face these attacks on our rights head-on and come out stronger together.
We have amassed a movement of Wisconsinites from all walks of life in an effort to bring about real change because everyone in our state deserves the ability to make healthcare decisions without government interference.
Thank you for your support until this point. If you haven't voted yet, polls are open from 7:00AM to 8:00PM tomorrow. Please spread the word to any friends and family that haven’t filled out a ballot yet!
This is our last chance to make our pro-choice vision happen, Peter. We still have thousands of voters to turn out – will you contribute whatever you’re able to help our team get as many voters to the polls as possible? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230403_em_fr_b1_WWW_1_YR_O]
TURN OUT VOTERS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230403_em_fr_b1_WWW_1_YR_O]
With gratitude,
Team Women Win Wisconsin
The power to win elections now and in the foreseeable future is with pro-choice Wisconsinites and our fight for our rights.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230403_em_fr_b1_WWW_1_YR_O [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230403_em_fr_b1_WWW_1_YR_O]
With the future of our democracy and reproductive freedom at stake, former Wisconsin State Treasurer Sarah Godlewski launched an initiative building on the power of pro-choice women.
The fall of Roe v. Wade reinstated Wisconsin’s cruel abortion ban from 1849 that provides no exceptions for rape or incest and could jail or fine doctors. But we know the right-wing won’t stop there. Governor Evers has already vetoed nine anti-abortion bills that passed the GOP-controlled legislature, and when he called for a special special to repeal the 1849 law, Republicans gaveled in and out in less than a minute.
At Women Win Wisconsin, we believe the key to stopping the GOP is to activate the overwhelming majority of voters who support reproductive freedom. A recent Marquette University Law School poll showed 80% of Wisconsin voters are concerned with the change in abortion policy now that abortion is illegal in the state. These voters can make the difference in Wisconsin races that are often decided by only a few hundred votes.
Women Win Wisconsin will make sure pro-choice voters know exactly who’s going to fight for their reproductive rights and freedoms. We back pro-choice women running in Wisconsin’s most competitive races, and we’re excited to support Democratic victories up and down the ballot.
There are critical spring elections on Tuesday, April 4, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Please address a check to:
Women Win Wisconsin
PO Box 576
Madison, WI 53701
This solicitation of funds is made by the registered PAC “Women Win Wisconsin,” not by Sarah Godlewski herself.
SUPPORT WOMEN WIN WISCONSIN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230403_em_fr_b1_WWW_1_YR_O]
Paid for by Women Win Wisconsin PAC
PO Box 576
Madison, WI 53701
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://action.sarahforwisconsin.com/p/wOJhy22a702osU_Np8KOBw2?unsubscribedata=1PqP%2BHkw%2BcAMRMOjv7%2B9J%2BhjTSw3oIc4ZbE4Gugb3stEv59r256jSCKaCHW7Gn5mZ5M3IeSjJbJQDpiszo0aeA1CFowSRzb7q16%2BPZfQznYuTrZ2jpPjt%2B%2B%2FFAesECF8brYUOKpUbFvSIxMFvNThNFy9qRuVOr1leJEaUWHzx50BkU3hWOaMHlPfD6ye1AY%2FtMfWFry77ZxU%2FnNCjRR2xET9jJNDwOuiGpMjhgrl4P4H0KOBxivuuY2QpgdvLI5XMgMZOT7wnaJR5%2F0FbQ5e8%2BBX6UPBvWXYq8RKKX854nsz9KVbgd3410LpBMOXBzCJqA9wEAoUb7XJzzt7%2B61LETY7hEQ%2BnURx61yZsjfXYcI0wXeIXJDmJQSUVHjlv8UjRTg4uq8wQ7ZPfPWoFh8L0h0LscJCwUEaft%2BJwxwasPRpPJOQ7EBk%2BKnKaKMNolrk .

The attacks against me are coming from every direction, my first opponent has jumped in the race, and the GOP has labeled my seat as one of their top targets. _**Republicans plan to use every tool in their arsenal to turn Nevada deep red.**_

[ALERT: AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS REPUBLICAN IS THE LOWEST IT'S BEEN IN A DECADE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62515118:JKl9uxGIN:m:1:3331421248:1703683BC47D373FAF1802FBCCC8BC11:r)

Listen, we're entrusting you to tell us the truth, Peter.

_**[Have you left the Republican Party?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62515118:JKl9uxGIN:m:1:3331421248:1703683BC47D373FAF1802FBCCC8BC11:r)**_

[A. NO, I'M STILL A REPUBLICAN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62515118:JKl9uxGIN:m:1:3331421248:1703683BC47D373FAF1802FBCCC8BC11:r)
[B. YES, BUT I'M STILL A REPUBLICAN
C. YES, AND I'M CONSIDERING LEAVING](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62515118:JKl9uxGIN:m:1:3331421248:1703683BC47D373FAF1802FBCCC8BC11:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62515118:JKl9uxGIN:m:1:3331421248:1703683BC47D373FAF1802FBCCC8BC11:r)

A poll from Gallup is being used to back liberal media claims that Republicans are "leaving the party in droves" - **and if it's true, it means the worst has happened...and that support for Joe Biden is growing.**

Please do not delay for even a second. We need to hear back from you ASAP!

**[Please follow your personalized link NOW to submit your answer AS SOON AS POSSIBLE.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62515118:JKl9uxGIN:m:1:3331421248:1703683BC47D373FAF1802FBCCC8BC11:r)**

NRSC Headquarters

name: Drag Queens vs. The Marine Corps
subject: Our Military Readiness has me Worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bergman for Congress**
body:
Everywhere I look, Biden is protecting his friends in China no matter how hard they try to undermine and threaten our nation.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513862:JNvSuxGbN:m:1:3365131770:66010BA793C26096AC271F33C78D7294:r "Putin & Xi") Peter: Instead of worrying about an investment in "climate, environmental justice and conservation," I want Joe Biden and the rest of Washington investing in America's future. And there won't be a be a future if we allow China, Iran and Russia to threaten our military readiness and national security. The more our military fails to meet recruitment goals, the more our adversaries will know that our military won't deter them any longer because diversity training and CRT never scared a highly trained soldier with a rifle in his hands. More to the point, the war over pronouns won't stop the cyber attacks and potential nuclear attacks we face from foreign adversaries. **[Will you help me wake up Washington and keep our country safe? Donate and let's make our nation the world's leading superpower once again!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513862:JNvSuxGbN:m:1:3365131770:66010BA793C26096AC271F33C78D7294:r "Will you help me wake up Washington and keep our country safe? Donate and let’s make our nation the world’s leading superpower once
again!")** Everywhere I look, Biden is protecting his friends in China no matter how hard they try to undermine and threaten our nation. From trade, to TikTok, to their threats to our manufacturing and investments in technology, to their military prowess. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513862:JNvSuxGbN:m:1:3365131770:66010BA793C26096AC271F33C78D7294:r "Tweet")**How many warnings do you need?** Now China's President is meeting with Vladimir Putin and helping him perpetuate his threats to Ukraine, our country and anyone who opposes his tyranny. When I entered the Marine Corps for my 40+ year career, we emphasized marksmanship and survival over political correctness and that caused everyone to remain in awe of our Armed Forces. **[Join the Bergman Brigade and let's force Biden to remove DEI and pronoun training from our ranks! Donate TODAY!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513862:JNvSuxGbN:m:1:3365131770:66010BA793C26096AC271F33C78D7294:r "Join the Bergman Brigade and let’s force Biden to remove
DEI and pronoun training from our ranks! Donate TODAY!")** Biden is the same man who allowed a Chinese spy balloon to fly over our country undeterred and requested your taxpayer dollars be used to fund gender transitions in our military. His Administration has refused to stop spies from running around Capitol Hill who were posing as reporters. He's back peddled on the nuclear deal with Iran and reversed President Trump's action that hold them accountable. And no matter how he claims to be handling Putin, the war in the Ukraine is well into its second year. We cannot allow our military to be a second-class military power because someone thinks acceptance of drag queens and diversity training will somehow strengthen military recruitment and military readiness. **[Help me show Biden what protecting of our nation should looks like!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513862:JNvSuxGbN:m:1:3365131770:66010BA793C26096AC271F33C78D7294:r "Help me show Biden what protecting of our nation should looks like!")** Our enemies don't prioritize pronouns over military readiness, and neither should the United States. We must Save America first if we want to save our children and our planet. **[If you agree, then join me!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513862:JNvSuxGbN:m:1:3365131770:66010BA793C26096AC271F33C78D7294:r "If you agree, then join me!")** For our safety,
Rep. Jack Bergman (MI-1)
Lt. Gen., USMC (ret.) | | [JOIN THE BERGMAN BATTALION](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62513862:JNvSuxGbN:m:1:3365131770:66010BA793C26096AC271F33C78D7294:r "JOIN THE BERGMAN BATTALION")
---

| **Paid for by Bergman for Congress**
---

name: Ben Wikler
subject: The most important election you’ve never heard about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, this is Ben Wikler, Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin, and in a moment, [**I’m going to ask you to donate so we can help us reach our goal to win tomorrow's pivotal election,**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230403.gtRhl2&refcode=em20230403-2332&t=1&akid=2332%2E420207%2Er3fx5P) but first I want to explain the stakes:
**Tomorrow, Wisconsinites will vote to fill an open seat on the state Supreme Court** —in an election that will determine whether that body will have a conservative or a progressive majority until 2025. This race could shape decisions on voting rights, election subversion, legislative district lines, and so much more—and could have a larger effect on the 2024 presidential race than any other contest in the country this year.
Over these last two presidential cycles, the state Supreme Court has played an outsized role in shaping the electoral playing field and the powers of government in ways that have usually systematically advantaged Republicans in Wisconsin.
In 2020, Donald Trump asked our state Supreme Court to illegally throw out hundreds of thousands of votes in Wisconsin’s most Democratic areas. Thankfully, his lawsuit failed, but only by a slim 4-3 margin. If we can rebalance the Court, we are more likely to stop these brazen attacks on our democracy in their tracks.
**With a conservative justice retiring, April 4th represents a chance to flip an open seat** —which could lead to a Wisconsin Supreme Court majority ready to consider cases on new state legislative maps, voting rights, Wisconsin’s 1849 abortion ban, and otherwise examine cases based on the law rather than Republican ideology.
The Democratic Party of Wisconsin is fully behind Judge Janet Protasiewicz, the progressive candidate in this race. In keeping with other recent high-stakes campaigns here, this is the most expensive state Supreme Court race in American history, so we’ll need all the support we can get to win tomorrow.
[That’s why I’m humbly asking you for help now so my team can win this, Peter. Will you rush in a donation of any amount to help WisDems defeat far-right extremism tomorrow? »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230403.gtRhl2&refcode=em20230403-2332&t=2&akid=2332%2E420207%2Er3fx5P)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/16153?c0=20230403.gtRhl2&refcode=em20230403-2332&t=21&akid=2332%2E420207%2Er3fx5P)**
Yours in the fight,
Ben Wikler

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230403-2332-footer&t=22&refcode2=2332_420207_r3fx5P&akid=2332%2E420207%2Er3fx5P)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=2332%2E420207%2Er3fx5P)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2332%2E420207%2Er3fx5P)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress
