name: Nabretta for Working Families Party
subject: Tell Sbux CEO: Respect workers!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Join me and tell Starbucks’ new CEO: Do the right thing and respect workers' rights | | | Hi Peter, My name is Nabretta Hardin and I’m a partner at the Poplar and Highland Ave Starbucks in Memphis, TN and a leader with Starbucks Workers United. I’m a hardworking Black woman and I enjoy working and serving the community. I’m proud of the work that I do, but I’m not proud of Starbucks’ union-busting ways. On Wednesday, Starbucks’ former CEO Howard Schultz testified before the Senate HELP Committee Chaired by Senator Bernie Sanders over allegations that Starbucks has retaliated against workers by withholding benefits and raises, cutting hours of union employees, purposefully understaffing stores, conducting surveillance on employees, and illegally firing workers and closing stores that voted to unionize. **Rather than take responsibility for the 80+ complaints against Starbucks by the National Labor Relations Board — Schultz doubled-down, blatantly lied about his company’s illegal activities, and evaded questions.** But the company has a chance to change course. **[Will you tell Starbucks’ new CEO Laxman Narasimhan to do the right thing and respect workers’ rights? Click here to sign the petition.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTG33wB3bJjTydOFXeprjVf_K8hfXJd1y2yzFwm2PcALDNzFD-Npzg8brQiWD8Vt3d4_P52_XOuDKKXcKA6pgNp1i3QVlPBPrx7-oXBybr47N4QBt55sCoFojhmJR3VED3abM1nwvAWGdXTjP84D1uxC3qwjXR_NXHWI8jaR0IE4gmAQaWh5smmsWC9H0duql02IcvvHkFJSgKju_xDdp8m9lAV6r4CyDiUbnsMv5l_UPMTYg8WLP51ga7RJlUKC4qVLmUEmaxGAvWMzxjwCym-UYeCog90S-MbUk8zkCoJxniCRrg1mG8uRYCuLTpbJM_wNIfT467uWhqBJJsOX99nRyciR7DedduuvOw1wDzSYi6ICG9Ovay-iPrNSQWridoQ/3v1/9fdNdMtfR-ah_tvd_tBKSA/h0/8oNrofhe9GOjGCjicHbHlrh706LRHiuNMZnD7HGhPdk)** **[Sign the petition](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTG33wB3bJjTydOFXeprjVf_K8hfXJd1y2yzFwm2PcALDNzFD-Npzg8brQiWD8Vt3d4_P52_XOuDKKXcKA6pgNp1i3QVlPBPrx7-oXBybr47N4QBt55sCoFojhmJR3VED3abM1nwvAWGdXTjP84D1uxC3qwjXR_NXHWI8jaR0IE4gmAQaWh5smmsWC9H0duql02IcvvHkFJSgKju_xDdp8m-uO0LHCdKzcOVcgzYxOYGjHr35wofGPooT58_mOrUQTO9PIEtGwEBskvVfC7OLCUetXQqMPqDN8bTeI2vA8NJcQ73gcvBx30VlpvVZaXJazFN88ILk345kqPt0NH_fxxr0N4-moO2Lw-7tgPiexDivV9ljOZSJucOFqUK8IALRSA/3v1/9fdNdMtfR-ah_tvd_tBKSA/h1/qP2Lgr-TEcMPGPKaTHBLuv9hKkuxPse1PGRxDXkKgH4)** Peter, we have a constitutional right to unionize. But in the 475 days since the first Starbucks unionized, of the 290 stores who have since voted to unionize, not a single location has secured a fair union contract.1 Starbucks claims they are willing to bargain, but we have hundreds of examples where Starbucks managers refused to meet at the bargaining table or walked out within minutes of the meeting taking place. As Bernie Sanders said during the hearing on Wednesday, if Starbucks is actually honest about their willingness to bargain, they should “do it!” Starbucks calls their employees “partners” but they’ve been treating us as anything but. Partners live paycheck-to-paycheck, can’t afford the healthcare plans Starbucks provides, and aren’t allocated the hours we need to live. Many of my fellow partners have to live off of food stamps just to survive. Meanwhile Starbucks raked in $900 million in profits in the quarter ending in October last year.2 Starbucks has lost its way from the supposed progressive company it claims to be. But with a new CEO at the helm, we believe there is still time for Starbucks to change course by meeting with workers at the bargaining table and securing a fair contract for all employees who wish to unionize. **[Will you join the 7,500 workers who make up Starbucks Workers United who are calling on the new Starbucks CEO to stop their illegal union-busting campaign and secure a fair contract? Click here to add your name to the petition.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTG33wB3bJjTydOFXeprjVf_K8hfXJd1y2yzFwm2PcALDNzFD-Npzg8brQiWD8Vt3d4_P52_XOuDKKXcKA6pgNp1i3QVlPBPrx7-oXBybr47N4QBt55sCoFojhmJR3VED3abM1nwvAWGdXTjP84D1uxC3qwjXR_NXHWI8jaR0IE4gmAQaWh5smmsWC9H0duql02IcvvHkFJSgKju_xDdp8m904AOX9pEnvTaTkJdIiCc1UIHrRBVByDOsPEc0uCyhBuxUsfksinUoDZT1CBNde3bTZiRMHlXDPAlOB4lrrSKmvjSjVmpY3sFz8H3oXPbttB4yZfDk8obWhnOwh1vMKHPpEhdslsLFltyBTuNP2bnF_5Gps7GIX07D0BH5nSl05A/3v1/9fdNdMtfR-ah_tvd_tBKSA/h2/vhMT1Xu-TtrVZabbn56RXoS7LFsb0Qb3QmzxXAtz8n8)** **[Sign the petition](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTG33wB3bJjTydOFXeprjVf_K8hfXJd1y2yzFwm2PcALDNzFD-Npzg8brQiWD8Vt3d4_P52_XOuDKKXcKA6pgNp1i3QVlPBPrx7-oXBybr47N4QBt55sCoFojhmJR3VED3abM1nwvAWGdXTjP84D1uxC3qwjXR_NXHWI8jaR0IE4gmAQaWh5smmsWC9H0duql02IcvvHkFJSgKju_xDdp8m_LrNDJseBrISPYpdHwipjIBGds453p_bjLEuK_gM8feGefETlb8_j9Q1RSosPkMFt286r7u6Mov0M_WMx-I8ibVOYorAFlvcrHXIikFsLSel-2ayg9XF29cxvkCFxySCs3JlDoBDTZB5-jV4_8FIXuRFjvSQmU1GUJ_o35s7tjrw/3v1/9fdNdMtfR-ah_tvd_tBKSA/h3/HmsAHimRtHqp559Bg6j5BwrU4pYpcNdqloVzWT2p5MQ)** In solidarity, Nabretta Hardin
Starbucks Workers United

clean_body: Join me and tell Starbucks’ new CEO: Do the right thing and respect workers' rights | | | Hi Peter, My name is Nabretta Hardin and I’m a partner at the Poplar and Highland Ave Starbucks in Memphis, TN and a leader with Starbucks Workers United. I’m a hardworking Black woman and I enjoy working and serving the community. I’m proud of the work that I do, but I’m not proud of Starbucks’ union-busting ways. On Wednesday, Starbucks’ former CEO Howard Schultz testified before the Senate HELP Committee Chaired by Senator Bernie Sanders over allegations that Starbucks has retaliated against workers by withholding benefits and raises, cutting hours of union employees, purposefully understaffing stores, conducting surveillance on employees, and illegally firing workers and closing stores that voted to unionize. Rather than take responsibility for the 80+ complaints against Starbucks by the National Labor Relations Board — Schultz doubled-down, blatantly lied about his company’s illegal activities, and evaded questions. But the company has a chance to change course. Peter, we have a constitutional right to unionize. But in the 475 days since the first Starbucks unionized, of the 290 stores who have since voted to unionize, not a single location has secured a fair union contract.1 Starbucks claims they are willing to bargain, but we have hundreds of examples where Starbucks managers refused to meet at the bargaining table or walked out within minutes of the meeting taking place. As Bernie Sanders said during the hearing on Wednesday, if Starbucks is actually honest about their willingness to bargain, they should “do it!” Starbucks calls their employees “partners” but they’ve been treating us as anything but. Partners live paycheck-to-paycheck, can’t afford the healthcare plans Starbucks provides, and aren’t allocated the hours we need to live. Many of my fellow partners have to live off of food stamps just to survive. Meanwhile Starbucks raked in $900 million in profits in the quarter ending in October last year.2 Starbucks has lost its way from the supposed progressive company it claims to be. But with a new CEO at the helm, we believe there is still time for Starbucks to change course by meeting with workers at the bargaining table and securing a fair contract for all employees who wish to unionize. In solidarity, Nabretta Hardin Starbucks Workers United @sbwupocket Sources: 1\. , ABC News, March 29, 2023 2\. , New Republic, December 23, 2022 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. name: Our Revolution
subject: NEWS: Jamie Raskin Defends the Right to Protest, Bernie Rallies w/Brandon Johnson in Chicago, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Jamie Raskin & Greenpeace Defend the Right to Protest | Bernie
Rallies w/Brandon Johnson in Chicago | CPC Executive Action Push |
Missouri Votes Tuesday | Dems Must Deliver Ahead of 2024 | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1011&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

Don’t miss our next [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8473?t=1012&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call with
Philadelphia mayoral candidate Helen Gym and other progressive leaders on
Monday, April 10th at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8473?t=1013&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1014&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

The brand-new Our Revolution Store is now open! We’ve got lots of new
items — from hoodies to coffee mugs, even a baby onesie! Now is a great
time to grab some gear, make a statement, and help fund the movement.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8510?t=1015&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]CHECK OUT OUR NEW STORE!
★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1016&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1017&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

LET’S GO! Our Revolution-endorsed Brandon Johnson is SURGING in the
Chicago Mayor’s race, and progressive voter outreach could clinch a
powerful win for the city and our movement.

On Tuesday, the 55th anniversary of MLK Jr.’s assassination, Chicago has a
choice to make: elect a former public school teacher and union organizer
Brandon Johnson, or a school privatizer backed by real estate speculators
and police unions.

Brandon’s opponent Paul Vallas calls himself “more of a Republican,” shut
down public schools in cities across the country, and looted [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8502?t=1018&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]$1.6B from
Chicago public schools to benefit wealthy banks.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1019&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

“They have the money, but we have the people, and when the people stand
united, the people win,” Bernie told a packed house at Thursday’s
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8503?t=1020&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]Rally with Brandon, MLK III, and US Reps. Delia Ramirez and Jonathan
Jackson.

Brandon said to the crowd: “This moment has been brought to us by a
profound struggle of our ancestors. And, our dream is the nightmare of
these large corporations who don’t want to see this day come.”

“Chicago, we’re not going to let extreme right-wing greedy profiteers turn
us around,” he said. “They said they didn’t know my name, didn’t know
about a progressive movement bringing transformation — well, if you don’t
know, now you know!”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?t=1021&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]CHIP IN TO FUND OUR VOTER OUTREACH IN CHICAGO!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1022&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

Also in Illinois, Our Revolution is backing Suzanna Ibarra for Joliet City
Council! District 5 needs a change, and Suzanna is committed to better
public safety, water affordability, and equal representation for all
residents. Suzanna is also a leader of Will County Progressives, the Our
Revolution group in Joliet!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1023&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

Tuesday is also Election Day in St. Louis, where Our Revolution is
supporting a powerful progressive slate including Mayor Tashaura Jones,
Board President, and former Bernie delegate Megan Green, and a total of 9
ward candidates!

Our movement has been working for multiple election cycles in St. Louis.
Now, we’re looking to strengthen our progressive majority, which passed a
Basic Income trial in the city this year.

Our team is making 150k voter contacts in the city ahead of April 4th, and
we’re hearing a lot of excitement on the ground! Let’s bring home these
wins.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8364?t=1024&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]PHONEBANK FOR ST. LOUIS!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1025&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

And, Our Revolution Kansas City has a progressive slate on the ballot for
City Council, including Jenay Manley, Eric Bunch, Justin Short, Michael
Kelley, Johnathan Duncan, and Brandon Ellington!

Kansas City has become a hotbed of progressive activism with groups like
Jobs with Justice, KC Tenants, and the Missouri Workers Coalition — but,
Missouri is also becoming a testing ground for extremist right-wing
legislation.

This election is a chance to shift the balance of power and push back
against the gerrymandered legislature that controls the state!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1026&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

Power is up for grabs in major cities nationwide, and we are investing our
time and resources to elect progressives in Chicago, St. Louis, NYC,
Philly, Nashville, Dallas, and more. Get involved to help us build local
power!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1027&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1028&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1029&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

The fight for progressive policies is ramping up with the Congressional
Progressive Caucus releasing its 2023 list of [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8504?t=1030&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]executive actions for
President Biden to deliver for people and the planet.

Lately, Biden and Democratic leadership have been tacking to the right
ahead of 2024 — a risky gamble that Our Revolution Executive Director
Joseph Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8505?t=1031&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]The Guardian will backfire.

“The base isn’t overly enthusiastic about Joe Biden being the 2024
standard bearer,” Joseph said. “Moving to the right on issues like fossil
fuel extraction might not just dilute enthusiasm, but engender active
opposition.”

“You’re going to see progressives mobilizing to hold Biden’s feet to the
fire,” he said. “We’re not going to pull our punches in this moment.”

Biden has the power to raise wages, strengthen unions, lower healthcare
costs, and more. It’s time to prove that Democrats and democracy can work
for the people.

★ ★ ★

BERNIE VS. STARBUCKS

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1032&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

HELP Chair Bernie Sanders put billionaire Howard Schultz [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8506?t=1033&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]in the hot
seat this week — grilling him about Starbucks’ illegal union-busting
activities and showing that big corporations and wealthy CEOs are not
above the law.

Under oath at the hearing, Schultz admitted unionized workers were being
excluded from higher pay and benefits provided to the rest of the company.

Starbucks is facing 80+ NLRB complaints and 500 unfair labor practices
charges, and judges found the company has broken the law 130x across 6
states since workers began organizing in the fall of 2021. More than 360
stores unionized but have yet to see a contract.

★ ★ ★
PROTECT THE RIGHT TO PROTEST

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1034&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

“SLAPP stands for Strategic Litigation Against Public Participation,” US
Rep. Jamie Raskin [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8507?t=1035&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]told Our Revolution Monday. “It’s when a big
corporation brings a lawsuit against people for exercising their First
Amendment rights.”

“They don’t have any real cause, they’re just trying to drive a community
action or a civil liberties group into the ground with litigation costs,”
he said.

Rep. Raskin will be reintroducing his landmark bill to protect free speech
from baseless legal attacks and combat SLAPP suits — building on the
success of legislation in 32 states and DC.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1036&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

As [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8508?t=1037&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]Robert Reich explains in this video, corporations are using “SLAPP”
lawsuits to tie up organizations’ resources — some originally filed by a
former member of Trump’s personal law firm!

This is a coordinated attack, but we are organizing with a broad coalition
of groups and elected allies to protect the right to protest.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/end_slapp/?t=1038&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]Call your representatives and tell them to cosponsor Rep. Raskin’s
bill in the House!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1039&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

Also joining our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8509?t=1040&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]Live National Call was Greenpeace USA’s Deepa
Padmanabha, who dug into the impact of SLAPP suits on movements.

“Behind every SLAPP suit is a story of resistance and speaking truth to
power,” Deepa said. “The goal is to scare people into silence and drain
time and money otherwise spent on protecting our planet and communities.”

She said we don’t hear about most SLAPPs because they are usually filed
against ordinary people advocating to protect fundamental rights
threatened by corporate greed.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1041&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

“SLAPPs are driven by fear. Our movements are growing stronger, and these
corporations are feeling the force of people power,” she said. “They’re
desperate to put a price tag on First Amendment-protected activity.”

We need both federal anti-SLAPP legislation and anti-SLAPP laws in every
state. As Deepa told us: “Absent these laws, the cost of a SLAPP suit is
nothing compared to the benefit of silencing a powerful critic.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/end_slapp/?t=1042&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]Our movement must send a loud message refusing to be silenced. Add
your voice to demand federal protection of the right to protest. Call your
Reps!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1043&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

“With anti-protest bills popping up around the country, we’re seeing a
resurgence of efforts to crush progressive movements,” Mara
Verheyden-Hilliard, Partnership for Civil Justice Fund executive director,
told us on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8509?t=1044&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]Monday Call.

In the past 6 years, there have been 39 anti-protest laws in 20 states —
ratcheting up punishments from misdemeanors to felonies, penalizing
protests near pipelines as “critical infrastructure,” and more.

In the wake of the movement for black lives, new laws penalize marching on
the streets and even eliminate liability for cars that drive into
protestors, she said. Another law, enacted after the WV teacher's strikes,
eliminates police liability.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1045&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

Ariel Moger, Government & Political Affairs Director of Friends of the
Earth as House Republicans called on us to fight HR1 — the newest version
of the Dirty Deal introduced by House Republicans this week.

“Thank you to the activists who mobilized to defeat the Manchin’s Dirty
Deal multiple times last year,” Ariel said on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8509?t=1046&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]Monday Call. “That’s
almost unheard of — Manchin usually gets whatever he wants.”

“The new version is even worse than Manchin’s so we need to show up in
full force to make sure it dies in the Senate,” she told us. “It is full
of handouts and loopholes to oil, gas, and mining industries, giving them
more incentives to pollute the planet and our communities.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1047&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1048&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

Our Revolution’s newest local group SF Education Alliance has had some
early successes, including restoring English as Second Language (ESL)
classes at a community college after a petition drive.

The Alliance is also leading the fight to have the San Francisco Board of
Supervisors pass a resolution to protect Trans rights, which will be voted
on Tuesday. So far, all 11 supervisors have signed on!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1049&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1050&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

Don’t miss our next [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8473?t=1051&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call with
Philadelphia mayoral candidate Helen Gym and other progressive leaders on
Monday, April 10th at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8473?t=1052&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8511?t=1053&akid=4173%2E5885482%2EMkM7oi ][IMG]

Half a million Americans go bankrupt every year from Medical Debt — a
foreign concept to countries with single-payer healthcare. We’re compiling

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION HEADLINES: Jamie Raskin & Greenpeace Defend the Right to Protest | Bernie Rallies w/Brandon Johnson in Chicago | CPC Executive Action Push | Missouri Votes Tuesday | Dems Must Deliver Ahead of 2024 | & MORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Don’t miss our next [ ]LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call with Philadelphia mayoral candidate Helen Gym and other progressive leaders on Monday, April 10th at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT! [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] The brand-new Our Revolution Store is now open! We’ve got lots of new items — from hoodies to coffee mugs, even a baby onesie! Now is a great time to grab some gear, make a statement, and help fund the movement. [ ]CHECK OUT OUR NEW STORE! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] LET’S GO! Our Revolution-endorsed Brandon Johnson is SURGING in the Chicago Mayor’s race, and progressive voter outreach could clinch a powerful win for the city and our movement. On Tuesday, the 55th anniversary of MLK Jr.’s assassination, Chicago has a choice to make: elect a former public school teacher and union organizer Brandon Johnson, or a school privatizer backed by real estate speculators and police unions. Brandon’s opponent Paul Vallas calls himself “more of a Republican,” shut down public schools in cities across the country, and looted [ ]$1.6B from Chicago public schools to benefit wealthy banks. [ ][IMG] “They have the money, but we have the people, and when the people stand united, the people win,” Bernie told a packed house at Thursday’s [ ]Rally with Brandon, MLK III, and US Reps. Delia Ramirez and Jonathan Jackson. Brandon said to the crowd: “This moment has been brought to us by a profound struggle of our ancestors. And, our dream is the nightmare of these large corporations who don’t want to see this day come.” “Chicago, we’re not going to let extreme right-wing greedy profiteers turn us around,” he said. “They said they didn’t know my name, didn’t know about a progressive movement bringing transformation — well, if you don’t know, now you know!” [ ]CHIP IN TO FUND OUR VOTER OUTREACH IN CHICAGO! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Also in Illinois, Our Revolution is backing Suzanna Ibarra for Joliet City Council! District 5 needs a change, and Suzanna is committed to better public safety, water affordability, and equal representation for all residents. Suzanna is also a leader of Will County Progressives, the Our Revolution group in Joliet! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Tuesday is also Election Day in St. Louis, where Our Revolution is supporting a powerful progressive slate including Mayor Tashaura Jones, Board President, and former Bernie delegate Megan Green, and a total of 9 ward candidates! Our movement has been working for multiple election cycles in St. Louis. Now, we’re looking to strengthen our progressive majority, which passed a Basic Income trial in the city this year. Our team is making 150k voter contacts in the city ahead of April 4th, and we’re hearing a lot of excitement on the ground! Let’s bring home these wins. [ ]PHONEBANK FOR ST. LOUIS! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] And, Our Revolution Kansas City has a progressive slate on the ballot for City Council, including Jenay Manley, Eric Bunch, Justin Short, Michael Kelley, Johnathan Duncan, and Brandon Ellington! Kansas City has become a hotbed of progressive activism with groups like Jobs with Justice, KC Tenants, and the Missouri Workers Coalition — but, Missouri is also becoming a testing ground for extremist right-wing legislation. This election is a chance to shift the balance of power and push back against the gerrymandered legislature that controls the state! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Power is up for grabs in major cities nationwide, and we are investing our time and resources to elect progressives in Chicago, St. Louis, NYC, Philly, Nashville, Dallas, and more. Get involved to help us build local power! [ ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] The fight for progressive policies is ramping up with the Congressional Progressive Caucus releasing its 2023 list of [ ]executive actions for President Biden to deliver for people and the planet. Lately, Biden and Democratic leadership have been tacking to the right ahead of 2024 — a risky gamble that Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese told [ ]The Guardian will backfire. “The base isn’t overly enthusiastic about Joe Biden being the 2024 standard bearer,” Joseph said. “Moving to the right on issues like fossil fuel extraction might not just dilute enthusiasm, but engender active opposition.” “You’re going to see progressives mobilizing to hold Biden’s feet to the fire,” he said. “We’re not going to pull our punches in this moment.” Biden has the power to raise wages, strengthen unions, lower healthcare costs, and more. It’s time to prove that Democrats and democracy can work for the people. ★ ★ ★ BERNIE VS. STARBUCKS [ ][IMG] HELP Chair Bernie Sanders put billionaire Howard Schultz [ ]in the hot seat this week — grilling him about Starbucks’ illegal union-busting activities and showing that big corporations and wealthy CEOs are not above the law. Under oath at the hearing, Schultz admitted unionized workers were being excluded from higher pay and benefits provided to the rest of the company. Starbucks is facing 80+ NLRB complaints and 500 unfair labor practices charges, and judges found the company has broken the law 130x across 6 states since workers began organizing in the fall of 2021. More than 360 stores unionized but have yet to see a contract. ★ ★ ★ PROTECT THE RIGHT TO PROTEST [ ][IMG] “SLAPP stands for Strategic Litigation Against Public Participation,” US Rep. Jamie Raskin [ ]told Our Revolution Monday. “It’s when a big corporation brings a lawsuit against people for exercising their First Amendment rights.” “They don’t have any real cause, they’re just trying to drive a community action or a civil liberties group into the ground with litigation costs,” he said. Rep. Raskin will be reintroducing his landmark bill to protect free speech from baseless legal attacks and combat SLAPP suits — building on the success of legislation in 32 states and DC. [ ][IMG] As [ ]Robert Reich explains in this video, corporations are using “SLAPP” lawsuits to tie up organizations’ resources — some originally filed by a former member of Trump’s personal law firm! This is a coordinated attack, but we are organizing with a broad coalition of groups and elected allies to protect the right to protest. [ ]Call your representatives and tell them to cosponsor Rep. Raskin’s bill in the House! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Also joining our [ ]Live National Call was Greenpeace USA’s Deepa Padmanabha, who dug into the impact of SLAPP suits on movements. “Behind every SLAPP suit is a story of resistance and speaking truth to power,” Deepa said. “The goal is to scare people into silence and drain time and money otherwise spent on protecting our planet and communities.” She said we don’t hear about most SLAPPs because they are usually filed against ordinary people advocating to protect fundamental rights threatened by corporate greed. [ ][IMG] “SLAPPs are driven by fear. Our movements are growing stronger, and these corporations are feeling the force of people power,” she said. “They’re desperate to put a price tag on First Amendment-protected activity.” We need both federal anti-SLAPP legislation and anti-SLAPP laws in every state. As Deepa told us: “Absent these laws, the cost of a SLAPP suit is nothing compared to the benefit of silencing a powerful critic.” [ ]Our movement must send a loud message refusing to be silenced. Add your voice to demand federal protection of the right to protest. Call your Reps! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] “With anti-protest bills popping up around the country, we’re seeing a resurgence of efforts to crush progressive movements,” Mara Verheyden-Hilliard, Partnership for Civil Justice Fund executive director, told us on our [ ]Monday Call. In the past 6 years, there have been 39 anti-protest laws in 20 states — ratcheting up punishments from misdemeanors to felonies, penalizing protests near pipelines as “critical infrastructure,” and more. In the wake of the movement for black lives, new laws penalize marching on the streets and even eliminate liability for cars that drive into protestors, she said. Another law, enacted after the WV teacher's strikes, eliminates police liability. ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Ariel Moger, Government & Political Affairs Director of Friends of the Earth as House Republicans called on us to fight HR1 — the newest version of the Dirty Deal introduced by House Republicans this week. “Thank you to the activists who mobilized to defeat the Manchin’s Dirty Deal multiple times last year,” Ariel said on our [ ]Monday Call. “That’s almost unheard of — Manchin usually gets whatever he wants.” “The new version is even worse than Manchin’s so we need to show up in full force to make sure it dies in the Senate,” she told us. “It is full of handouts and loopholes to oil, gas, and mining industries, giving them more incentives to pollute the planet and our communities.” ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Our Revolution’s newest local group SF Education Alliance has had some early successes, including restoring English as Second Language (ESL) classes at a community college after a petition drive. The Alliance is also leading the fight to have the San Francisco Board of Supervisors pass a resolution to protect Trans rights, which will be voted on Tuesday. So far, all 11 supervisors have signed on! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Don’t miss our next [ ]LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call with Philadelphia mayoral candidate Helen Gym and other progressive leaders on Monday, April 10th at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT! [ ]RSVP ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Half a million Americans go bankrupt every year from Medical Debt — a foreign concept to countries with single-payer healthcare. We’re compiling stories to bring pressure and we need folks to stand up and speak out! [ ]SHARE YOUR STORY ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] [ ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN! ★ ★ ★ [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. [ ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month! name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Please let me explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by folks with a zest for demonization.

Friends -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my PAC, Campaign for Democracy. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here is the truth:
All across the country, our rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization.
They silence speech, kidnap immigrants, subjugate women and promote grievance and victimhood to distract from the fact that health care and education outcomes, economic progress for working folks, and violent crime rates are far worse in “red states” than they are in “blue” ones.
They cry “freedom” but work overtime to take away rights and dismantle our democracy in order to protect their power to dictate the choices people are allowed to make.
And somehow, Democrats are constantly on the defense. We allow these culture wars to take shape and people get distracted from the issues that matter in their lives.
That has to end.
We have to flip the “red state freedom” narrative on its head.
Do Floridians and Texans know that California has a lower homicide rate than their states? They will.
Do they know California has a lower infant mortality rate than Texas and Florida? They will.
Do they know California is the 4th largest economy in the world with better health care and education outcomes than Texas and Florida? They will.
But I cannot do it alone.
And as I launch this new effort, I need to ask if you’ll support this work. This is important and personal to me — so I am asking:
[**Can you please contribute $3 to my Campaign for Democracy today? It would mean a lot if you became a Founding Donor. And in truth, the amount isn’t as important as you being a part of this fight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-april-23?refcode=em230403-1-600k&refcode2=1227_4767699_NtCgnb&akid=1227%2E4767699%2ENtCgnb)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-april-23?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em230403-1-600k&refcode2=1227_4767699_NtCgnb&akid=1227%2E4767699%2ENtCgnb)**

| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-april-23?express_lane=true&refcode=em230403-1-600k&refcode2=1227_4767699_NtCgnb&akid=1227%2E4767699%2ENtCgnb)**

Thank you,
Gavin

| Friend
The 2nd Quarter of 2023 has officially begun, and to get ahead of the Radical Left, Kat Cammack needs your help to start the quarter off strong!
In the first few months of the Republican House majority, we delivered some of the best victories in years. Not only did we stop Biden's IRS expansion and fight to stop the high spending, but we also showed him and all of his radical allies in Congress that the RED HOUSE won't let them jam through their radical socialist agenda.
However, it will take more than just one good quarter to undo Biden's damage. We'll have to continue fighting and working together if we want to create a future that we can all be proud of.
If we can keep up the fight throughout the year and keep the Radical Left on their back foot - I know we can keep control of the House in 2024!
---

name: Democrats.org
subject: "No off years" is more than just a motto at DNC HQ
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Just take a look at what we’ve been up to ahead of the elections happening right now in Wisconsin: | |
---
Derek -- We know you’ve heard us say it before, but there are no off years here at the DNC. _No, really._ There’s an extremely consequential Supreme Court election happening in Wisconsin tomorrow. The end result could affect electoral maps, voting rights, and access to abortion in the Badger state. Thankfully, with the help of this team, we’ve built year-round infrastructure for candidates running up and down the ballot to tap into -- but we need your support to keep it up. clean_body: Just take a look at what we’ve been up to ahead of the elections happening right now in Wisconsin: | | Derek -- We know you’ve heard us say it before, but there are no off years here at the DNC. No, really. There’s an extremely consequential Supreme Court election happening in Wisconsin tomorrow. The end result could affect electoral maps, voting rights, and access to abortion in the Badger state. Thankfully, with the help of this team, we’ve built year-round infrastructure for candidates running up and down the ballot to tap into -- but we need your support to keep it up. “No off years” is more than just a motto at DNC HQ. We’ve sent thousands of Wisconsinites information on voter registration, voting deadlines, and even their specific polling location. ☎️ Volunteer Recruitment: One-on-one voter contact is essential for turning folks out ahead of an election -- and with a race as close as this one, every conversation we have could be the deciding factor. That’s why we’ve been recruiting volunteers to help make calls to voters across the Badger State and ensuring voters have everything they need to cast their ballot tomorrow. This is just a fraction of the work the DNC does to elect Democrats from school board to Senate across the country -- and it’s all made possible by your grassroots support. The DNC is the only party committee tasked with electing Democrats at every level, in every ZIP code. name: Andy Beshear
subject: Thank you for a strong first quarter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I wanted to check in quickly and say thank you. Peter,

Our team has been working around the clock to ensure we start the election year with a strong first quarter that shows Kentuckians, the press, and our opponents that this campaign has the resources it needs to win in November. Soon, campaign finance reports will be due and our fundraising numbers will be made available to the public for the first time this year. Thanks to you, we are in a great place to start 2023.

**We couldn't have done it without the thousands of grassroots donors whose generosity is keeping our campaign strong.**

This is only the beginning, and there's no doubt this will be a tough re-election campaign. But if we can keep up this momentum, I know we'll be able to win in November and keep delivering results for Kentuckians.

Thank you for being by my side, every step of the way.

Sincerely,

Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61217757/399475988/-428057120?refcode=em23_230403_eoqty_enask_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230403_eoqty_enask_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e3b12779-52d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2IxMjc3OS01MmQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2-0GBRYArWaPyPcOAiY13UDtaBxSEWwUUcJbTh0LzkM=)

subject: Insanity: Trump Could be in Prison for 30 Days BEFORE His Trial

name: Team Janet
subject: Wisconsin's democracy is on the line tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
here's why we need to care about the Supreme Court election
| | |
---
Friend, it's Team Janet for Justice – the folks working on behalf of Judge Janet Protasiewicz to elect her to the ten-year swing seat on Wisconsin's Supreme Court.
**With just one day left before the April election, we're writing to ask you to support Judge Janet and defend Wisconsin's democracy.**
**[_The stakes are clear: Everything from abortion access to fair maps to voting rights will come before Wisconsin's Supreme Court, and we need a pro-democracy voice to defend our values._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61217998/399476930/793872154?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2248-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2ZlZTQxZS01M2QyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rMsEZFI55LktH3-jfikttIP-QloW3j-kS3734PQknh0=)**
**_Judge Janet is running against Extreme Dan Kelly, and he's being supported by far-right megabillionaires who are trying to buy this election with negative TV ads._**
**[Friend, it's going to take a massive grassroots coalition to defeat GOP megadonors. Can you split a contribution today between Judge Janet and Maggie Hassan to join our team and win this swing seat on the court?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61217999/399476931/793872154?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2248-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2ZlZTQxZS01M2QyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rMsEZFI55LktH3-jfikttIP-QloW3j-kS3734PQknh0=)**

**Friend, Extreme Dan Kelly is absolutely the wrong choice for Wisconsin.**
🚩 Kelly is endorsed by all of Wisconsin’s most extreme anti-choice groups
🚩 Donald Trump has personally endorsed Dan Kelly in order to get another election denier on the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
🚩 Extreme Dan Kelly is backed by the same billionaires who supported Tim Michels and Ron Johnson
**[_It's clear that we need a candidate like Judge Janet who has the experience and values to rule fairly from the bench._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61218001/399476933/793872154?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2248-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2ZlZTQxZS01M2QyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rMsEZFI55LktH3-jfikttIP-QloW3j-kS3734PQknh0=)**
**[Like most elections in Wisconsin, this race is going to come down to just a few thousands votes. Friend, would you split any amount today between Judge Janet and Maggie Hassan to make a lasting impact in Wisconsin?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61218002/399476934/793872154?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2248-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2ZlZTQxZS01M2QyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rMsEZFI55LktH3-jfikttIP-QloW3j-kS3734PQknh0=)**

name: Mariah Morgan
subject: FWD: National Democracy Summer School
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Hi there, I'm bumping Wiley's email from yesterday to make sure you saw this wonderful opportunity. We are bringing on a handful of dedicated high school and college students for a 6-week fellowship with our campaign. See his email below, and apply for the fellowship here! [https://democracysummer.typeform.com/DS2023?utm_source=Partner] Thanks! Mariah ----- Original Message ----- https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?]“As a Democracy Summer Fellow, you’re not just going to change your life. You're going to change your country.” — Congressman Jamie Raskin Dear Friends: I am proud to announce that my campaign will be participating as a partner in the 2023 National Democracy Summer School! This one-of-a-kind Democratic Fellowship program—founded by Congressman Jamie Raskin and expanded across the country in an historic partnership with the DCCC—is dedicated to training the next generation of political activists and visionary leaders. As part of this initiative, I am looking for XX dedicated high school and college students to join me as Wiley Nickel For Congress Fellows! This six-week program will take place from Monday, June 26, 2023 - Monday, August 7, 2023 and requires a commitment of 10-15 hours per week. Fellows will participate in exciting online seminars and a special curriculum designed by Congressman Jamie Raskin, while also organizing on-the-ground with my reelection campaign here in NC-13. Throughout the academic portion, Fellows will learn from academic luminaries, political leaders, policy experts, issue advocates and top community organizers from across the country. Past Democracy Summer speakers have included House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Professor Laurence Tribe, Senator Elizabeth Warren, Rep. Alexandria Ocasio Cortez, Rep. John Lewis and Civil Rights leaders Bob Moses and Rev. William J. Barber II. Not to mention, Fellows will also learn state-of-the-art skills in phone-banking, text-banking, canvassing, fundraising and voter registration—all the necessary ingredients for a thriving field operation! Additional information and the application for the Fellowship can be found HERE [https://democracysummer.typeform.com/DS2023?utm_source=Partner] . The priority deadline to apply is April 14th, 2023. If you know a student who may be interested in this life-changing program, please forward them this email and remind them to select our campaign on the application—they won’t want to miss out! Apply Here [https://democracysummer.typeform.com/DS2023?utm_source=Partner] Thank you for your support, Wiley Nickel P.S. If you’re not a student, but still excited about Democracy Summer, you can support our participation in this enriching program by donating to my campaign here! Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2302-q1-wn?refcode=230228-email>I hope you can contribute toward the campaign so we can rebuild our warchest and hire our first staffer for the cycle.

>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?&recurring=true] Follow Wiley Online: https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC [https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC] http://twitter.com/wileynickel [http://twitter.com/wileynickel] http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc [http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc] Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress Wiley Nickel for Congress PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Tt-P0CQ0-ke3ulUkLsfzZw2?unsubscribedata=yoLNNL8bT446giVHP%2Ftv82SRzSFO1mTt6fvNs0ftpKvx9be2UKXMhmOszhmXsY5TY%2BNXT8gVvBaXo3kp%2BXkRAFf2hk9XlEls%2BEbkSQmGWWchVO5PTNEl9R7S5pmV9%2Bq1XW7xfxksylCf7fURhnQWCd5NFnuIHffdv%2BpZI3i46RiI54dKCm6NkLmzJtXXAl0otUX%2BmuneP65ZdennwjY1bgJg19qD8hQv13iJ56ABX3p2sQGgue5RDJtg7g2loZMDwmnpDCWRygyWaLD4fdlITlJXtGD6y%2FqxHgAASrKu1TeFi9Ucfoo1umCkX9krLIaa5FFXUIZ8ynJosauKg2rRP1L%2BK2jxbN3NQz1x78TvNZNCcYtATz5rg04u8jyLBFn7iowmpibrlaKrHSdgbHBnkEOQVdoBhU4vBqY1Cph%2BzN09oIbTV2VhqX24TJHj7byY .

name: Election Alert via COURIER
subject: Happening TOMORROW: one of the most important races of 2023
body:
This is our moment, Peter
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=805%2E120351%2EH1y0Iz)
Peter —
**We’re just 1 day out from one of the most important elections of 2023: Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race.**
[**We’ll explain more about the consequences of this race in a moment, but if you’re short on time: will you chip in $5 to help us mobilize voters and spread accurate information about the candidates in these final 24 hours?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3588?refcode=em-20230403&t=2&akid=805%2E120351%2EH1y0Iz)
**Many Wisconsin communities don’t have access to trustworthy local news coverage.** That leaves many voters either unaware that there’s an election happening or without trustworthy coverage to help them make an informed decision at the ballot box.
That’s where COURIER comes in.
Our dedicated reporters at our local, Wisconsin-based newsroom, _UpNorthNews,_ are working tirelessly to remedy this information gap by publishing eye-catching, straightforward news pieces.
Their stories range from explainers outlining what’s at stake in this important election to articles on the roles special interest groups are playing in this race:
[](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3588?refcode=em-20230403&t=3&akid=805%2E120351%2EH1y0Iz)
Peter, this race will have real consequences for ALL Wisconsinites for years to come. But it doesn’t stop there:
**Because Wisconsin is a key 2024 battleground state, the Court’s upcoming decisions on election laws will have enormous national consequences.**
We have less than 24 hours left to mobilize voters and get this critical information in front of them.
**The work of our**** _UpNorthNews_****team — the articles and amplified posts — is only possible with support from people like you.**
[**Will you chip in $5 now to power their work and help us spread accurate, factual information to as many voters as possible?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3588?refcode=em-20230403&t=4&akid=805%2E120351%2EH1y0Iz)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3588?refcode=em-20230403&t=5&akid=805%2E120351%2EH1y0Iz)**
Thanks for your support,
COURIER

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=805_120351_H1y0Iz&akid=805%2E120351%2EH1y0Iz)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=805%2E120351%2EH1y0Iz)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

Their stories range from explainers outlining what’s at stake in this important election to articles on the roles special interest groups are playing in this race: Peter, this race will have real consequences for ALL Wisconsinites for years to come. name: Energy Alert
subject: Shifting into high gear!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---
| | |

**Do you like your gas or diesel engine car?** _Say goodbye to it under the Democrats ' new environmentalist agenda!_

**Do you like cooking on your gas stove at home?** _Say goodbye to that under the Democrats ' new environmentalist agenda too!_

---
| | | [STOP THE DEMOCRATS RIGHT NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62515384:JNBelxGNv:m:1:3391001263:6A43640C46AE888069F7D1A756E0D530:r "STOP
THE DEMOCRATS RIGHT NOW")
---

Climate czar JOHN KERRY (who loves to fly on private jets) is leading the charge to impose more green energy mandates that will phase out America's plentiful and reliable energy sources and force you to live with less.

**Help Tim Scott and Republicans STOP the Democrats ' green energy agenda! _[Chip in anything you can to fight back now!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62515384:JNBelxGNv:m:1:3391001263:6A43640C46AE888069F7D1A756E0D530:r "Chip in anything
you can to fight back now!")_**

Don't let John Kerry and Joe Biden ruin the greatest economy on earth with crushing regulations. Their agenda could cost thousands of good-paying American energy jobs, ruin our standard of living, and forever diminish what's possible in America.

That's why we're shifting into high gear to stop these radical environmentalists and need every patriot reading this email to help Republicans today!

---
| | | [FIGHT BACK NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62515384:JNBelxGNv:m:1:3391001263:6A43640C46AE888069F7D1A756E0D530:r "FIGHT BACK NOW")
---

- Team Scott

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62515385:JNBelxGNv:m:1:3391001263:6A43640C46AE888069F7D1A756E0D530:r)
---

Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _**
This is just the beginning. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62515385:JNBelxGNv:m:1:3391001263:6A43640C46AE888069F7D1A756E0D530:r "Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?")**

---
| | [JOIN MY TEAM](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62515385:JNBelxGNv:m:1:3391001263:6A43640C46AE888069F7D1A756E0D530:r "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

Thank you for everything, and God Bless,

Tim Scott
---
| PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
---

CHARLESTON, SC 29407

For more information . | mailto:unsub-53294847747-echo7-871DC4C496DD422A28255B4EF41564DF@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

subject: Your 2023 membership, a personalized card, and more!
body:
Our Official 2023 DLCC Membership cards are made specifically for you! | | |
---
| | Our Official 2023 DLCC Membership cards are made specifically for you, to serve as a constant reminder that your membership helps fuel our work to:
* Elect strong Democratic leaders in state legislatures across the country who will fight for reproductive freedom, safe communities, and election integrity.
* Build long-term investments in our key target states so we can expand our razor-thin chamber margins.
* Compete against the GOP’s war chest of resources used to push their extremist agenda further in the states.

**We’re not exaggerating when we say none of that would be possible without our members behind us – but we still don’t see your name on our membership list.** [ So what do you say, will you take a moment to activate your 2023 membership and own a piece of this fight? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zi9kCoXAJOqyu2c0CzrjiVRnuPeXfsF1RJP26zqwh6tafdmgOosYx-noNQ7Ly7P8R6QpQL_24_tyQY4achXTfBKlJVcpSQvrfoYMzdpcBWXrycyxP3xANcUPKCVQU3VdrADjKhw0lNivvmW2RXSDpz1frdJ75TFD9O075ehR-D_2FrU5-Fcajb7hFr6-GrTltvGe4tHun9ljf7IAyJYcjSYZxJcFPhMSFjz0CZxvdhNLKKZ-TEfSv8XElkpX0gs5OGSItG60RKav3X72Gv6ad5LcVLj6nd4Cr_U_PNfK5H_cpCHjG2O5I9tuvWq8bwhMdlcpTsDXBd53pR2Csz_zh2Ff9QlexzZwKF1hJibVGH9sBUI6GeA3o4NZ4ao4EucjcGsJIvHvKiRe8wqxDAQ54eG9AbuffYPXz1R9H-mqw3myd4xN0HQIi7DVq8TN--w-Bc9S4bQf5BSBoCQmMJ9QnZ02xSQG7hOXsjZIz5VXmvVcF5ZRHn0AtNHB1127Y79Zg1Qr_M6eAwCWfTv53hjq6qPuvIazXO2xkPKkchW9aFq6O-UnEPSpdox9PLHipESkbQF_4bRoaMqNFMYl_yBdBA/3v1/FUzx3U53QcK0u0SBQC4kQQ/h0/PHFUhA3nCcZTKysPutEtUHoWYXmSaSzkjPslBgp8r70) **[YES >>](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zi9kCoXAJOqyu2c0CzrjiVRnuPeXfsF1RJP26zqwh6tafdmgOosYx-noNQ7Ly7P8R6QpQL_24_tyQY4achXTfBKlJVcpSQvrfoYMzdpcBWXrycyxP3xANcUPKCVQU3VdrADjKhw0lNivvmW2RXSDpz1frdJ75TFD9O075ehR-D_50NvpwlD2L7NKyqI-MgWSROsodWjqGn2VwFRdSnKXHHfUgd4lChMan0Sp12MimnPyjLTIdoiY3DfbcaBEukeDSEJGSfHY_z_aESLFVmjIe3qpETRxSGxO3ThdkfXtJdg-_Ve0Yz7EBEKDtlrulMcHFb7oMcQa9PLbpLr3q9cnGTjXq5n9v0oSIBxhCbBuGCSePtLfR3LdL5Eu29RZlwuZaYL2UtvvlChk6WokgTWAtbeJ2eEMRaDMd4ZGGt380blqtLFTfZHcjVWrvz039-PHz7anl_xXaT7-lO7cOLacd9_kqfsSvappjGsjvaTIx9NDBWWSUvjwqZfyA7v_mqByXxJLjYd6qarJKztQPsqesU9bZs5z7N127oV1rzZap_DKCGKEQRwooijubVQn_35W0/3v1/FUzx3U53QcK0u0SBQC4kQQ/h1/JiZcJJqiP_hyqofO2IVacrO64LKBQwrsolrhXWvs3ho)**

Build long-term investments in our key target states so we can expand our razor-thin chamber margins. Compete against the GOP’s war chest of resources used to push their extremist agenda further in the states. We’re not exaggerating when we say none of that would be possible without our members behind us – but we still don’t see your name on our membership list. We know that we’ve asked you to renew your membership a lot – but we wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t critically important. Becoming a 2023 member and investing in state Democrats early in the year will allow us to leverage resources for our target states, win critical special elections, and prepare for Election Day in 2024. Team, Last week, I voted against a toxic, anti-energy workers bill. Let me tell you why. While the GOP gave House Bill 1 a misleading name and claimed it would lower energy costs, the truth is that _it would do no such thing._ **This legislation would only serve to pad the pockets of Big Oil and Gas executives, rather than helping workers or consumers here in New Mexico.** I support our energy economy and the essential New Mexican workers who power it. Oil and gas made trillions of dollars globally last year in part due to the expansion of oil and gas production in New Mexico, but workers and families aren’t seeing those profits — massive energy corporations and their executives are. While my constituents pay $100 to fill up their trucks and our energy workers often live in tents and temporary trailer homes, wealthy executives are bringing in billions and living it up in mansions. My colleagues across the aisle want to make those wealthy CEO’s even wealthier at the expense of the people, and I won’t stand for it. **I will always fight to ensure New Mexico’s workers and families are a priority, which is why I voted NO on this bill.** The far-right are already attacking me for standing up to the Big Oil Barons, and we know it’s only going to get worse the closer we get to the 2024 election. **[Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford to stand with me and help ensure I can continue to fight for the energy workers of NM-02 in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61219157/399479853/1324874474?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230403energy_gv_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzFhOGYzMC01N2QyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gI5UtA96BkOfzn_x5TYICrFy2eXu0qdeL0FSgUZhDJY=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts [CLICK TO LISTEN]
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62515171:6f0r2xGSN:m:1:3331421248:49CB4FCE1BBCD42D1EAC0BE086117B0F:r)

Peter,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62515171:6f0r2xGSN:m:1:3331421248:49CB4FCE1BBCD42D1EAC0BE086117B0F:r)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62515171:6f0r2xGSN:m:1:3331421248:49CB4FCE1BBCD42D1EAC0BE086117B0F:r)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

name: Cori Bush
subject: All we’re asking for is 24 words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
It’s past time for Congress to act and affirm the ERA as our 28th Amendment.
#
Peter,
**Last week, Representative Ayanna Pressley and I launched the first-ever ERA caucus** — 100 years after the Equal Rights Amendment was first introduced and over half a century since it was passed by both chambers.
100 years is far too long for women, Black and brown folks, LGBTQ+ people, and other marginalized groups to wait for gender equality under the Constitution.
[**Equality is long overdue. If you agree and want to support our call for the Equal Rights Amendment, can you chip in $5 right now to help power our organizing in Congress and across the country to guarantee equal rights for all under the Constitution?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230403.PRZSXa&amount=5&refcode=em20230403-2450&t=1&akid=2450%2E1082990%2EwL5_Hl)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230403.PRZSXa&amount=5&refcode=em20230403-2450&t=20&akid=2450%2E1082990%2EwL5_Hl)**
When the U.S. Constitution was first drafted, women, Black and brown folks, and all marginalized groups were intentionally written out.**The absence of foundational equality allows discrimination to persist and injustice to fester — it’s past time for Congress to Act.**
In 24 simple words, the Equal Rights Amendment will add to our constitution that _‘Equality of rights under the law shall not be denied or abridged by the United States or by any state on account of sex.’_
This historic caucus — this multi-racial, mutli-generational grassroots movement we are building in Congress and across the country — will be exactly what we need to get the ERA across the finish line and achieve constitutional equality for all.
[**If you are able to, please chip in $5 right now to support this historic effort.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230403.PRZSXa&amount=5&refcode=em20230403-2450&t=21&akid=2450%2E1082990%2EwL5_Hl)
Now, let’s get to work.
Cori Bush

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230403?refcode=em20230403-2450-footer&t=22&refcode2=2450_1082990_wL5_Hl&akid=2450%2E1082990%2EwL5_Hl) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Emergency Homelessness Response funds are coming!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
These new laws will help address Oregon’s homelessness and housing crisis with the urgent focus it needs. |
#
---
Peter, Last week, I signed the Affordable Housing and Emergency Homelessness Response Package into law, upholding one of my campaign promises to address the housing crisis with the urgency it deserves. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61222483/399484315/1667196598?refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20230403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2JhZDUxZi01YWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fE64DMq8nnd-wuJ3Z_uefPjonTf3izBnwSOBCtXZBxo=) These bipartisan bills include the funding I proposed in my response to the homelessness state of emergency that I declared on my first full day as Governor. **Oregonians are ready to get to work to address the biggest issues we’re facing, and I’m grateful that the legislature made passing this package an early priority this session. This is a great down payment on our efforts to address the housing and homelessness crisis. ** Signing these bills into law is just one of the ways I’m honoring my commitment to all Oregonians to put our state on a brighter path. Thanks for supporting me in that work. Onwards, Tina | | Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services. **Can you chip in any amount now to support her work?** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61222488/399484318/1667196598?refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20230403_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2JhZDUxZi01YWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fE64DMq8nnd-wuJ3Z_uefPjonTf3izBnwSOBCtXZBxo=)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Dan Kelly tried to steal Wisconsin's electoral votes for Trump in 2020. As his attempts to steal this election show, he'll do it again in 2024. He must not end up as the deciding vote on Wisconsin’s State Supreme Court, where he could again put his loyalty to Trump over his duty to democracy.
body:
Election tomorrow!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0c53b74b-a397-4237-a7ef-9c3196430c68/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Will you join Blue Amp in giving $5, $10, $25 to elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz as the deciding vote on Wisconsin's Supreme Court, to protect our democracy!?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T799dcd96-5d9b-4197-ab41-77e2b527608f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _If there are lingering questions as to whether the Wisconsin Republican Party and their Supreme Court Judge candidate, right-wing bigot Dan Kelly, possess the slightest bit of decency, the question has been answered. _

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: It’s critical we stand with our trans and LGBTQ+ neighbors.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Culture wars protect the patriarchy.
#
_(tw: stories / mentions of sexual abuse)_
So we know people in power and conservatives use culture wars in order to distract and diffuse us from challenging institutions of power, right? I want to talk about how the attacks on trans and LGBTQ+ people factor into this.
The first time I was ever hit on by a grown man, I was about 13 or 14 years old. I still had braces in my teeth.
I can’t tell you how many stories I, and almost every woman I know, have about things like this.
Many of these disgusting attacks on trans and LGBT people are actually projections of what predatory, cisgender, and often straight men do when left alone in the presence of women – or sometimes, horribly, children.
**To distract you from challenging the patriarchy, they're trying to get you to attack the very gender expressiveness of gender non-conforming people that disrupts the patriarchy.** And it’s the LGBTQ+ community doing much of the work of challenging those same patriarchal and oppressive norms that uphold the kinds of silence that benefits abusers.
[That’s why we’re reaching out to you today. Will you please join us in defending our LGBTQ+ siblings by making an urgent $6 contribution today to Equality Federation?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230403.mTaGKP&refcode=em20230403-4080-P_FND_CHA_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4080%2E2526796%2EwA2rOw)
Equality Federation is an advocacy accelerator rooted in social justice and focused on building power for state-based lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, and queer (LGBTQ+) advocacy organizations. 100% of your donation will go directly to Equity Federation.
It is critical that we stand with our trans and LGBTQ+ neighbors. Their safety is all our safety.
**[Support our trans and LGBTQ+ allies today →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230403.mTaGKP&refcode=em20230403-4080-P_FND_CHA_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4080%2E2526796%2EwA2rOw)**
✌🏽🏳️🌈 🏳️⚧️ 💕,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230403?refcode=em20230403-4080-P_FND_CHA_MIS&t=3&refcode2=4080_2526796_wA2rOw&akid=4080%2E2526796%2EwA2rOw)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230403-4080-P_FND_CHA_MIS&t=4&akid=4080%2E2526796%2EwA2rOw)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=5&akid=4080%2E2526796%2EwA2rOw) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=6&akid=4080%2E2526796%2EwA2rOw) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=7&akid=4080%2E2526796%2EwA2rOw)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

clean_body: But we have a plan to stop him before it's too late. | | | The indictment of President Trump has exposed the TRUTH! George Soros is one of the greatest threats to the future of America anywhere in the world. How? You see, Soros is a radical left wing billionaire who uses his nearly limitless cash reserves to destroy our country by filling our local elected offices with his radical foot soldiers. Most recently, a District Attorney whose campaign he bankrolled to the tune of more than $1,000,000 made a blatantly political attack to discredit a former President. But the story that even right wing media won't tell you about is his efforts to take over local schools boards. Friend, over the last 40 years, Soros and a legion of groups he bankrolls have dumped untold sums of money into school board elections and the consequences have been DEVASTATING. But for the first time ever, CONSERVATIVES have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC. Let me take a step back to explain. In May of 2021, the 1776 Project PAC was founded with the specific goal of ridding our nation's school of left wing indoctrination. And to date, we've been WILDLY successfully. We've replaced more than 100 leftist school board members with BRAVE CONSERVATIVE school board candidates across 15 states. And people like Ben Shapiro, Tucker Carlson, and Laura Ingraham have publicly praised our mission and our success! "I am planning on giving some money to the 1776 Project. I think a lot of other people should as well because without an enormous amount of resources, they are flipping school boards all over the country." "Parents have almost no support. But now they do! The 1776 Project PAC a Political Action Committee designed to help communities elect SANE people to run their schools... Ryan Girdusky is the President of [the 1776 Project PAC].... If you're thinking about writing a check... think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky" "Help is on the way from a new Political Action Committee called the 1776 Project." Friend, we're not bankrolled by shady dark money billionaires like the radical left is. That means we rely 100% on support from generous, patriotic donors like you. This year ALONE we are planning to endorse and support another 250 BRAVE conservative school board candidates across the country. But we can only do that with your support. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, 1776 Project PAC P.S. We have a MASSIVE election day coming on MAY 6TH! 2️⃣ In the coming weeks, EMILYs List will be thrilled to announce some very exciting **Senate endorsements** for the 2024 elections (hint: you'll recognize some familiar faces!). Securing our hard-won Senate majority will be no easy feat, so we're investing _early_ in tried-and-true pro-choice women who can help keep anti-choice extremists out of power.

3️⃣ Last but not least, April is one of our favorite times of the year: it's Rising Star season! This is when we highlight our extraordinary nominees: six game-changing women in state or local office across the country who are igniting pro-choice change. Right now, we're tallying the results, and we'll announce the winner of the **2023 Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award** later this month. ****We're busier than ever this April, Peter, and you know what that means. clean_body: | | | New month, new goals → Happy April, Peter! Here at EMILYs List, we're gearing up for a HUGE month of election preparation (tomorrow is a big Election Day!), exciting new endorsements, and a major announcement: the winner of our 2023 Rising Star award! 1️⃣ First, we're gearing up for major elections in Wisconsin and Colorado this month, so these final days of outreach are make-or-break for our endorsed candidates — including pro-choice champion Judge Janet Protasiewicz , who could become the deciding vote (!!) for abortion rights on the Wisconsin Supreme Court. 2️⃣ In the coming weeks, EMILYs List will be thrilled to announce some very exciting Senate endorsements for the 2024 elections (hint: you'll recognize some familiar faces!). Securing our hard-won Senate majority will be no easy feat, so we're investing early in tried-and-true pro-choice women who can help keep anti-choice extremists out of power. 3️⃣ Last but not least, April is one of our favorite times of the year: it's Rising Star season! This is when we highlight our extraordinary nominees: six game-changing women in state or local office across the country who are igniting pro-choice change. Right now, we're tallying the results, and we'll announce the winner of the 2023 Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award later this month. **We're busier than ever this April, Peter, and you know what that means. If you want to help win elections, endorse fantastic candidates, and power our pro-choice, pro-woman movement, donate to EMILYs List today: Thank you so much, the EMILYs List team ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Friend,
The radical Left's end game is clear.
Soros believes that with his hand-picked D.A. - Alvin Bragg - having **INDICTED** me for committing __no__ __crime__ , they can bleed our campaign dry by dragging us through witch hunt after witch hunt.

No matter how many vicious witch hunts they subject us to, we will not bend, we will not break, and we will NEVER stop standing up for TRUE JUSTICE - an America where the PEOPLE are put FIRST, not the Swamp creatures, globalist special interests, or the powers that be.
But because they know I can never be bought, bullied, or controlled, the attacks will never stop.
Our ONLY choice is to fend off each and every witch hunt they throw our way.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Governor Ron DeSantis is putting Floridians’ lives at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Today is a dark day for Florida
#

Friends -
Today is a dark day for Florida.
This morning, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis signed permitless carry legislation into law. He did so behind closed doors, without any special ceremonies or celebrations.
That’s because he knows that permitless carry is widely unpopular with Floridians. According to recent polling, 61% of Floridians oppose permitless carry, and over two-thirds of Miami-Dade voters oppose this dangerous legislation.
Permitless carry allows almost anyone to carry a gun in public without a background check, any training, or having ever fired a gun. With the passage of this legislation, more guns will be able to flood our Florida communities.
Ron Desantis’ decision to sign permitless carry into law quietly is an ultimate act of cowardice. Desantis is putting Floridians' lives at risk to cozy up to the gun lobby, and we need your help to fight back.
[**We must hold Governor Ron DeSantis and other extreme politicians like him accountable. Please chip in to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us fight back against radical elected officials who promote a dangerous “guns everywhere” agenda.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23.fjJHm6&refcode=em230403-1-30&t=1&akid=4867%2E3935704%2EBmqUEJ)

I have an important, heartfelt message for you:

**Thank you for your commitment to truth and justice.**

Donald Trump has evaded consequences for his crimes for years – but now, thanks to you, he will finally face the punishment he deserves.

**_We all know Trump's arrest should have happened YEARS ago, and I'm so grateful you had the courage to see it through!_**

In the face of fierce opposition, I know that your work is not easy. The attacks being carried out by MAGA Republicans are reprehensible!

_I refuse to let your bravery go unnoticed._

[So I’m signing this letter to say “Thank you” and chipping in $3 to UniteDemocrats to help keep brave Democrats like you in office. »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61233279/399494705/698232043?amount=3&refcode=UD_20230403_EMLTR_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhMjU0ZjdmLTYyZDItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MtSMcrMPGNbm3e8nzMaFWyMSF_BUovwo755UTRcNJ48=) | [500 SIGNATURES NEEDED:
