body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61235157/399496399/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTUzNDk3ZTgtNjNkMi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LMBS--azn3Cde6NCDu5YCGpyLlAGBJ1gHx4thWJbbTA=&emci=a3436324-3bd2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a53497e8-63d2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

Last week, we faced our first FEC end-of-quarter deadline of 2023. And thanks to the support of this team, _**we surpassed our goal!**_

Soon, our fundraising numbers will be made public. Finishing the quarter strong helps prove the strength of our people-powered movement as we look ahead to April.

It is because of your generosity that I'm able to fight for our region in Congress. Just last month, I met with community leaders in Tacoma to plan how the Recompete Pilot Program can invest in the economic well-being of our communities. And I was honored to welcome tribal leaders to Washington, D.C. to push for investments in climate resilience.

**It's an honor to work for you in Congress every single day, and I'm ready to roll up my sleeves and get back to it! So, from the bottom of my heart, I want to say thank you again for all that you've done and continue to do for both me and this campaign.**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.

| Peter,

This grassroots network is the life force of our campaign. Each of you plays an integral role in making sure we mount a winning campaign, which starts with strong fundraising.

I’m happy to report we reached our first-quarter fundraising goal!

I want to recognize those of you who contributed in the past week and powered our campaign past our goal:
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61235660/399496622/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230403-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWYyMDU4NGYtNjRkMi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Pp0IDgQcS0R8bY1ZTC1aRYbSSGabidYSs_JK4Y3Rxu8=)
Running for Congress isn’t easy, and it’s important you know how grateful I am for your support and generosity. People like James, Brenda, and Sarah help make our campaign possible.

We have a challenging road ahead, but I know with you in my corner we’ll mount another winning campaign in 2024 so I can continue advocating for us in Congress.

With sincere appreciation for your support,
Abigail

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=12835e930aac4142a67a48e3f0874ddb&_e=k3rIWuSRVyekhfF8W3ko5wlLELWBavMz6VBUR25vJqUKuTQxBaeZnBM_C-sZPJOtI6H0YV6LQQi_AbmK3Xg4vSa84GrTGM6qbJ_6fqOStxwfoA4Xmbdj3O6N-TOi1nfua8yZNdHjTN1bYbiSf-x--U28nrPLA0ocerR-iiiUU1ozLboiidztL0lkYYqrPT4-rnZGRGbbX2xPjcB5YzGuDb1o8aKjjwfsoG5nkeLIr35q9XPQur6PF-SSE2gWtP_lnxf7iYYgLvQESaHhj3UchA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=12835e930aac4142a67a48e3f0874ddb&_e=k3rIWuSRVyekhfF8W3ko5wlLELWBavMz6VBUR25vJqUKuTQxBaeZnBM_C-sZPJOtI6H0YV6LQQi_AbmK3Xg4vSa84GrTGM6qbJ_6fqOStxwfoA4Xmbdj3O6N-TOi1nfui8rtmOmMFj6dwsV0XcdDs9rye4PLISyYLQm3yJO_bz10bkgy2uUCJZz8Q_hu4VRgoe5i2mzs2nmUM5VOU2A_74otFD8qM0biZH3HBp__FRCBqJYL_8xxyulaC8ldCOmb_VGUL17IIeiGk_rkK319LQ%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=12835e930aac4142a67a48e3f0874ddb&_e=k3rIWuSRVyekhfF8W3ko5wlLELWBavMz6VBUR25vJqUKuTQxBaeZnBM_C-sZPJOtI6H0YV6LQQi_AbmK3Xg4vSa84GrTGM6qbJ_6fqOStxwfoA4Xmbdj3O6N-TOi1nfusg7_sIuiJkzPTAaNbu2gnEtk15gDsU3i5SPB1KuFr8TKrAEUyHvNgL8sZT8gkux1L-pfa5UbaCz2qUTGhBD7FMJpDDMc9JnJDhliHpBQ9Dwn3HQjeM8NF8Q-lSA1zRdjC1J-9B2aghByOSUYd3IcPA%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=12835e930aac4142a67a48e3f0874ddb&_e=k3rIWuSRVyekhfF8W3ko5wlLELWBavMz6VBUR25vJqUKuTQxBaeZnBM_C-sZPJOtI6H0YV6LQQi_AbmK3Xg4vSa84GrTGM6qbJ_6fqOStxwfoA4Xmbdj3O6N-TOi1nfugB3eqpJzxbZ11WTVuM0XWuwVsbfgnfmkxGZHG05WRs2zfoZU-1JCqBOY6iGdxu6dAzgXm0vrk8PxW618P2lOaxVOfJ5EU2nfvpbXBw9VV3Mo7dlDaEv1V6m3rhsAoEnP-xQxB-Qs_6avVlpWl0Z9fQ%3D%3D)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | April 2, 2023
---
| WEEKLY NEWSLETTER
---
| Issue 7
---
| | **A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)** The indictment of former President Trump should concern everyone, regardless of political views. The actions of this Manhattan District Attorney could lead us down a path of no return, where jailing those we disagree with becomes normalized. We must consider what this will means for our country and the slippery slope it will lead us down. As a refugee from communist Vietnam who went on to serve our country, I've witnessed the weaponization of the law for political gain in failed states. It's alarming to see it happen in the world's greatest democracy. I assure you, this is not what we desire for our nation. We are better than this. I believe in the American Spirit and know our country's best days are ahead. Our nation's enemies relish seeing us divided and at odds with each other. Instead, we must unite to safeguard our freedoms and preserve our way of life. Only by standing united can we effectively defend ourselves against those who seek to extinguish the flame of freedom and liberty that burns within us. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of [Unleash America PAC](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=a40914124f6a48d69c36b87c572693a1&_e=c5bTPqMNw3EBxN2E8ELSXThkYYLsJKVyy1EwchwkzNWZQQJByKlKNGSv1a0cEUuMx9GX2LBP8ghaP76pSs7lxrTfejbn1Wa3E-9MrUlRfZgFzJDwZdXwMLMBvGK-BxHRZZ7jHf06vTrZgax6iDJe84Yy5l7hXUK9p1sASzBs0VDWpi1ody_Y5QVF6d2716CeqvcqvNQCExWQE3-QQ6A2IA6R316Q7xMcII_mhyueNf1UAAY-YC5G-lpvL-M3jmY-3ms4GFuBr4dMF5PsA11rdsGzX1U1T-Ro46DEVNt4eKI%3D)

clean_body: | | | | | April 2, 2023 | WEEKLY NEWSLETTER | Issue 7 | | A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) The indictment of former President Trump should concern everyone, regardless of political views. The actions of this Manhattan District Attorney could lead us down a path of no return, where jailing those we disagree with becomes normalized. We must consider what this will means for our country and the slippery slope it will lead us down. As a refugee from communist Vietnam who went on to serve our country, I've witnessed the weaponization of the law for political gain in failed states. It's alarming to see it happen in the world's greatest democracy. I assure you, this is not what we desire for our nation. We are better than this. I believe in the American Spirit and know our country's best days are ahead. Our nation's enemies relish seeing us divided and at odds with each other. Instead, we must unite to safeguard our freedoms and preserve our way of life. Only by standing united can we effectively defend ourselves against those who seek to extinguish the flame of freedom and liberty that burns within us. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of | Hung Cao joins Newsmax National Report On Tuesday, Cao reviewed foreign policy news of the week on National Report. From the fentanyl coming over our Southern Border to Russia’s threat of placing nuclear weapons into allied Belarus, the Biden administration is not doing nearly enough to protect Americans and our friends abroad. Watch the entire segment to hear Hung’s perspective on these developments around the world. | Social Media to Share Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. Be sure to like and share, and when you tweet at Hung remember to use #UnleashAmerica! | | | | | | That's it for this week, thank you for reading. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Tell BlackRock To Stop Financing Deforestation & Land Grabbing >>
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704467?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Friend, chances are that when you think of rainforests, you picture lush greenery among towering old-growth trees, brightly colored birds, and iconic wildlife like orangutans and elephants living harmoniously among flourishing plants. But the harsh reality is that this vibrant and pleasant depiction of our jungles is becoming increasingly scarce today. Our rainforests are being _**DECIMATED**_ by corporate greed -- ancient treescapes being carelessly** _HACKED AWAY_** at and roaring _**FOREST FIRES**_ in thick clouds of smoke, leaving behind industrial wastelands of **_STUMPS AND RUBBLE_** in what was once a thriving ecosystem. What’s even worse, is that along with this _**industrial deforestation**_ comes**VIOLENT land grabbing** where Indigenous People are** aggressively expelled from their homes** with force. Driven by profit, powerful companies are committing horrific human rights abuses and destroying the last of our world’s great rainforests -- all to produce junk food and cosmetics.**_Friend, we cannot let BlackRock continue to finance the violation of human rights and the exploitation of our Earth for profit._[DEMAND environmental justice for our planet and all of the living beings who call these precious rainforests home! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704468?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704469?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Agribusiness is the world’s leading cause of deforestation,** and if we allow this industry to thrive, it will negatively impact **_everything we love about this precious Earth._**
Not only is **mass deforestation and land grabbing devastating** for our rainforests and all those who live there, _**but it also has severe global impacts.**_
Rainforests are an essential part of our ecosystems,_**providing us with oxygen and storing massive amounts of carbon from the atmosphere.**_ Our planet is already _**IN PERIL**_ due to the human-driven climate crisis -- so rainforests are more vital than ever to the Earth’s survival.
But BlackRock is more concerned with immediate profits than the**long-term implications of deforestation and land grabbing.** And unless we stand up against these corporate bullies NOW, **our rainforests could soon be DESTROYED FOREVER** \-- which will have irreparable consequences to life on Earth as we know it. [**Please, Friend, we’re relying on environmentalists like you to speak up. Will you take urgent action to help SAVE our rainforests from corporate greed before it’s too late?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704470?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1704469?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for being a part of the fight,
Friends of the Earth**

body:
Bright and early tomorrow morning, voters will head to the polls to elect a new Supreme Court justice -- and the end result will have big implications in the state for years to come. | |
---
[](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJUD71pFwOcoTMmoY7V15aOlxnKmS5Y-7I-2GSOAj9xaJUBI9lFO_e79hFhce_qh4rTBRojgWyQ49DJNYAixeeZoAqSGmRnKLF8gxBGvlnrGiPV0IbbdPSAjuR0ug1lyPfF-pxi38-Yb2pTfKslcT4anCfRP3Dpg4P8yZzDvBErU34RhSmzRhTHl57S87x75gyPjjDcjsyyCDV5akBzCL1z0IaeYCm5PXQNg_-WId3cRDEYrRE5C79hIsmkrdZcRBU3iJd_gJScJ6r0o908VD1OqkTrG9pulwpwTgTPu38KRFrNV3wPqdu4JdcDl6YUHx0005CE05pBy4TJGW5FhoAzO9FYCBzg53I3-ceoj5KtQJL7mAX0Zsr9y5rqk3MwrA0_MiG3e63vPhmHp8Q3PDVNPZusAOplD7Aip5O6AiMk1o/3v1/fCpiNAguR_O8ZXgLXhrj9w/h0/5HGoY4z6j83u4uAmgYCjzImhsKHg9Jjdy_s89IaYAhk) Derek, there is an incredibly consequential election happening in Wisconsin. Bright and early tomorrow morning, voters will head to the polls to elect a new Supreme Court justice -- and the end result will have big implications in the state for years to come. **The choice for voters is clear:** Judge Janet Protasiewicz believes in fair electoral maps, defending voting rights, and protecting access to abortion. Her opponent, Dan Kelly, is too extreme for Wisconsin’s Supreme Court. He will make it harder for patients to access reproductive health care, put doctors at risk of prosecution, and threaten our democracy. **The DNC is pouring resources into get-out-the-vote efforts for Wisconsin right now, Derek. clean_body: Bright and early tomorrow morning, voters will head to the polls to elect a new Supreme Court justice -- and the end result will have big implications in the state for years to come. | | Derek, there is an incredibly consequential election happening in Wisconsin. Bright and early tomorrow morning, voters will head to the polls to elect a new Supreme Court justice -- and the end result will have big implications in the state for years to come. The choice for voters is clear: Judge Janet Protasiewicz believes in fair electoral maps, defending voting rights, and protecting access to abortion. Her opponent, Dan Kelly, is too extreme for Wisconsin’s Supreme Court. He will make it harder for patients to access reproductive health care, put doctors at risk of prosecution, and threaten our democracy. The DNC is pouring resources into get-out-the-vote efforts for Wisconsin right now, Derek. The finish line is within our sights, and we can’t give up until we run through the tape. name: HER Time Abortion Alert
subject: A lot going on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61238697/399500222/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230403_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmE0MTM4OWUtNjlkMi1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sDcxFsWuJFBWA8nKZZb8mj2Ur9dGPnlx3g5kAPBpuM0=)
---
Peter, We’re being inundated with stories daily about new abortion restriction attempts across the states. We wanted to take a few moments to recap:
* A group of 21 legislators in South Carolina proposed the death penalty for all women who receive abortion care.
* The Wyoming legislature passed a total ban on medication abortion, which the Governor then signed. The law was temporarily blocked by a judge, but it’s clear this fight isn’t going away.
* Iowa is working on its own bill that would not only outlaw almost all abortions in the state, but also effectively force public libraries, schools, and colleges to censor access to reproductive health information to the public.
* A new bill passed in Idaho outlaws what they’re calling “abortion trafficking,” or helping a minor cross the state border to obtain an abortion.

On top of all that, we’re still waiting for the outcome of the medication abortion case out of Texas, which could determine the legality of mifepristone throughout the country — even in states where abortion is protected, like California. [_**We’ve been building up our Abortion Rapid Response Fund, so we can continue to respond to all these attacks and more. The Wyoming legislature passed a total ban on medication abortion, which the Governor then signed. The law was temporarily blocked by a judge, but it’s clear this fight isn’t going away. Iowa is working on its own bill that would not only outlaw almost all abortions in the state, but also effectively force public libraries, schools, and colleges to censor access to reproductive health information to the public. A new bill passed in Idaho outlaws what they’re calling “abortion trafficking,” or helping a minor cross the state border to obtain an abortion. On top of all that, we’re still waiting for the outcome of the medication abortion case out of Texas, which could determine the legality of mifepristone throughout the country — even in states where abortion is protected, like California. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: CaucusRoom
subject: New Rules on Light Bulbs Will Leave You in the Dark
body:
Trump will appear in court on Tuesday. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-quljhik-trhiujldw-yh/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Monday! Colorado Members: Join us Tuesday at 5:30 pm for a [discussion with Jesse Mallory from Americans for Prosperity.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-y/) **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-t/) **Trump Will Appear in Court** Former President Donald **[Trump will speak from his home in Florida](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-i/)** just hours after his scheduled court appearance in NYC on Tuesday, April 4th. Trump's lawyer **[will motion to dismiss the charges](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-d/)**. **Leaving You in The Dark** The Biden administration is **[preparing to implement a sweeping nationwide ban on commonly used light bulbs](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-h/) a**s part of its energy efficiency and climate agenda. **How to Solve the Bank Crisis Problem** With sleepy Joe Biden, Treasury Secretary Yellen, and Fed Chair Powell having steered us into the crisis,**[it's time to learn the sound lessons of big bank pros.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-k/)** **Pentagon Disbands DEI Unit** Florida Rep. Matt Gaetz is being applauded for his advocacy against "diversity, equity, and inclusion" DEI, **[after the Pentagon quietly announced it was disbanding a DEI program within its educational system](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-u/).** **Disney Pulls a Fast One** [**Disney invoked the name of King Charles III** ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-o/)in an unusual bid to quietly upend Gov. Ron DeSantis' plan to reign in the "corporate kingdom's," continued self-governance. DeSantis says the **[fight with Disney is not over](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-x/).** **Flipping Out Over MTG** The announcement that**[Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene would be appearing on this Sunday's episode of CBS "60 Minutes"](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-m/)** infuriated prominent liberals on social media this week.

**Pathetically Weak Indictment** Former Attorney General [**Bill Barr reacted to the indictment of former President Trump over his alleged 2016 hush money scandal on Friday, calling it "an abomination."**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-c/) **Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-q/)!**
* Do you have a **[sanctuary home](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-a/)**?
* No chickens [**left behind**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-f/)**.**
* **[It's okay](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-z/).**
* Affordable**[home improvements.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-v/)**
* **[Deep thoughts](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quljhik-trhiujldw-e/) **with AOC**.**

Share the attached graphic as a social media post and raise awareness about the unfair treatment of our Representatives for standing up for our children and against gun violence.

subject: Add your name: Tell Joe Biden not to reinstate family detention.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, President
Biden isn’t on our side. He’s never been a progressive fighter, and he’s
continuing to disappoint us.

The New York Times recently reported that the Biden Administration is
“considering reviving the practice of detaining migrant families” — this
would be a huge betrayal to us all if his administration reinstated the
horrifying policy of detaining undocumented immigrants at the border.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132723?t=1001&akid=28307%2E1203867%2E1exVjw ]We need you to sign our petition right now. Will you add your name
today and call on Joe Biden to not reinstate family detention for migrant
families? We need as many signatures as possible.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132723?t=1003&akid=28307%2E1203867%2E1exVjw ]Add Your Name

When we collectively raise our voices against injustice, we are powerful.

Thank you for taking action today,

Team JD

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: 2023 National Democracy Summer School
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
I am proud to announce that my campaign will once again be participating as a partner in the 2023 National Democracy Summer School! [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61238909/399501359/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTFiNWNlMi02YWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pWiiIt_9m_I7jeRWQx6esu0FnFabgrgEP1PO3xFq3YU=&emci=3a1f7561-3ed2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=4a1b5ce2-6ad2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)
---
Dear Peter:

I am proud to announce that my campaign will once again be participating as a partner in the 2023 National Democracy Summer School! This one-of-a-kind Democratic program was founded by Congressman Jamie Raskin and expanded across the country in an historic partnership with the DCCC. Democracy Summer School is dedicated to training and educating the next generation of political activists and visionary leaders.

**As part of this initiative, I will be nominating dedicated high school and college students to join me as Team Schrier Scholars!** As a fellow, you will be trained as organizers and activists with my re-election campaign in Washington's 8th District, and will also have access to an online curriculum.

This virtual six-week program will take place from Monday, June 26, 2023 - Monday, August 7, 2023 and requires a commitment of about 4 hours per week. We’ll host live educational sessions with political leaders and facilitate in-depth discussions and activities over Zoom.

Past Democracy Summer speakers have included House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, the late Rep. John Lewis , and other distinguished speakers and experts in their field.

In 2018, grassroots activism helped us flip Washington's 8th District blue for the first time ever, and it helped us keep it blue in 2020 and 2022. As organizers and volunteer activists with our campaign, you'll host at least one voter registration or voter education event in collaboration with other participants. You'll also have the opportunity to attend a meeting with me and my entire campaign staff!

[**If you would like more information or are looking to apply to be a Democracy Summer fellow, click here.**](https://democracysummer.typeform.com/DS2023?utm_source=xxxxx&typeform-source=www.google.com?ms=em23_230403_demsum_wlsi_gq_act___DrKS_ettx&refcode=em23_230403_demsum_wlsi_gq_act___DrKS_ettx&source=em23_230403_demsum_wlsi_gq_act___DrKS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230403_demsum_wlsi_gq_act___DrKS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=BmCsfWR1MazfscvAuJyCQ35df0g9B3x9Kzd3RCieANZiLeSQbIN0E5g+YAB/2jlCOU6jAytu40igT3813oGqk3BvXcNAF06uVpNBl/xW4PbTHumgVAow2GZPQ3p8t/9g0TnyQKKpz/5732j5GyN/6F2+hrOA2Id/CAmFxDO2rEA=&refcode2=4a1b5ce2-6ad2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811) The deadline to apply is Friday, April 14th. Please forward this email to any students you know who might be interested in this opportunity!

Not a student but still want to support the next generation of political leaders? clean_body: I am proud to announce that my campaign will once again be participating as a partner in the 2023 National Democracy Summer School! Dear Peter: I am proud to announce that my campaign will once again be participating as a partner in the 2023 National Democracy Summer School! This one-of-a-kind Democratic program was founded by Congressman Jamie Raskin and expanded across the country in an historic partnership with the DCCC. Democracy Summer School is dedicated to training and educating the next generation of political activists and visionary leaders. As part of this initiative, I will be nominating dedicated high school and college students to join me as Team Schrier Scholars! As a fellow, you will be trained as organizers and activists with my re-election campaign in Washington's 8th District, and will also have access to an online curriculum. This virtual six-week program will take place from Monday, June 26, 2023 - Monday, August 7, 2023 and requires a commitment of about 4 hours per week. We’ll host live educational sessions with political leaders and facilitate in-depth discussions and activities over Zoom. Past Democracy Summer speakers have included House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, the late Rep. John Lewis , and other distinguished speakers and experts in their field. In 2018, grassroots activism helped us flip Washington's 8th District blue for the first time ever, and it helped us keep it blue in 2020 and 2022. As organizers and volunteer activists with our campaign, you'll host at least one voter registration or voter education event in collaboration with other participants. You'll also have the opportunity to attend a meeting with me and my entire campaign staff! The deadline to apply is Friday, April 14th. Please forward this email to any students you know who might be interested in this opportunity! Not a student but still want to support the next generation of political leaders? = Thank you for your support, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Josh Hawley
subject: re: my opponent’s numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, I was looking over the newest FEC fundraising numbers, and I was absolutely shocked.
_My Democrat opponent is hauling in MASSIVE amounts of cash from far-Left socialists across the country._

He’s connecting with the most radical donors from New York City to San Francisco, and they’re pouring money into our race here in Missouri.
**And with so much money coming in from the coasts, it’s going to be hard to catch up.**

name: Urgent Redistricting Update
subject: POLITICO: Republicans planning on “ambitious gerrymandering” ahead of 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
it’s central to their strategy to winning the House
|
---

Team, Republicans have a cynical strategy to expand their House majority in 2024 – one that doesn’t involve getting more votes. **_POLITICO:_
"Republicans are readying to plow ahead with ambitious gerrymandering despite previous reprimands from state courts – now that they’ve elected judges who are less likely to thwart their plans."

[_Help defeat GOP gerrymandering: Donate to the NDRC >>_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61239490/399503176/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230403_FR_4B_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcyYWI3NmZjLTZjZDItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ClfVPL502j5p2SRWUPo0_7Gok6OWuzui_v2uVibSd5o=)** For years, Republicans stacked courts with judges they believed would help advance their anti-democratic agenda. **Now, they’re hoping the courts will grant them a green light for extreme gerrymandering ahead of 2024.**
* In North Carolina, Republicans are asking the state’s highest court to **roll back fair maps.**
* In states like Ohio, Republicans are fighting to **defeat challenges to rigged maps.**
* And in Wisconsin, right-wing activists are spending record sums to **elect a state supreme court justice** who they believe will uphold gerrymandered maps.

[**_Help support fair maps nationwide: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61239491/399503177/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230403_FR_4B_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcyYWI3NmZjLTZjZDItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ClfVPL502j5p2SRWUPo0_7Gok6OWuzui_v2uVibSd5o=) Here’s the good news team: The NDRC has a proven track record of defeating these kinds of attacks on our democracy.

Last November, our strategy helped secure what the _New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” If we continue fighting, we can ensure the maps are even fairer in 2024 and beyond – **_but if we grow complacent, the GOP could roll back our progress before the next election!_**

President Obama warned that **“Our opposition is counting on the NDRC to lose the energy and drive that our movement has sustained so far. We simply cannot afford to do that.”** [**_Our work is powered by supporters like you. Will you donate today to help the NDRC continue fighting for a strong democracy?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61239492/399503178/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230403_FR_4B_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcyYWI3NmZjLTZjZDItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ClfVPL502j5p2SRWUPo0_7Gok6OWuzui_v2uVibSd5o=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: it’s central to their strategy to winning the House | Team, Republicans have a cynical strategy to expand their House majority in 2024 – one that doesn’t involve getting more votes. POLITICO: "Republicans are readying to plow ahead with ambitious gerrymandering despite previous reprimands from state courts – now that they’ve elected judges who are less likely to thwart their plans." = For years, Republicans stacked courts with judges they believed would help advance their anti-democratic agenda. Now, they’re hoping the courts will grant them a green light for extreme gerrymandering ahead of 2024. In North Carolina, Republicans are asking the state’s highest court to roll back fair maps. In states like Ohio, Republicans are fighting to defeat challenges to rigged maps. And in Wisconsin, right-wing activists are spending record sums to elect a state supreme court justice who they believe will uphold gerrymandered maps. = Here’s the good news team: The NDRC has a proven track record of defeating these kinds of attacks on our democracy. Last November, our strategy helped secure what the New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” If we continue fighting, we can ensure the maps are even fairer in 2024 and beyond – but if we grow complacent, the GOP could roll back our progress before the next election! President Obama warned that “Our opposition is counting on the NDRC to lose the energy and drive that our movement has sustained so far. We simply cannot afford to do that.” = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: Katie Porter
subject: Congress has work to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Living in Orange County, I hear from so many parents who fear their kids will never be able to afford to stay in the area they grew up in.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=20546%2E3422442%2EolujZa)
Derek,
California has struggled with the high cost of housing for decades, and for too long federal officials have refused to be a good partner to local governments who can’t fix this problem on their own.
Last Congress, I supported a tax credit that would have helped build 300,000 affordable homes here in California. While it didn’t become law, I’m still fighting, because there's so much more the federal government can do to spur innovation in the housing market that allows us to increase supply and lower costs.
**In the Senate one of my top priorities will be lowering the cost of housing.** Living in Orange County, I hear from so many parents who fear their kids will never be able to afford to stay in the area they grew up in. When I visited UC Davis the other week, most of the students I met with told me they couldn’t see themselves being able to ever afford buying a home.
Now, I want to hear from you: [**How has the high cost of housing affected your family?**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_housing_costs/?source=EMAG03_1_HOU_20230403_V1_F&akid=20546%2E3422442%2EolujZa)
**[Share your story ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_housing_costs/?source=EMAG03_1_HOU_20230403_V1_F&akid=20546%2E3422442%2EolujZa)**
Thanks for sharing your story,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG03_1_HOU_20230403_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=20546_3422442_olujZa&akid=20546%2E3422442%2EolujZa)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=20546%2E3422442%2EolujZa)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=20546%2E3422442%2EolujZa)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Katy Frisch
subject: Nate Silver got this one very wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61239990/399504426/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDAxMGNjOC02ZWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Qvg-pjfA681Rx319sJhiWsYCNJ-xRMVh9hwNricKeQ=&emci=cf7a1b67-c5cf-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=50010cc8-6ed2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter,

In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert. Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd congressional district “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.” Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes! | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61239991/399504427/729998634?refcode=20230403.2_AF_4F&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDAxMGNjOC02ZWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Qvg-pjfA681Rx319sJhiWsYCNJ-xRMVh9hwNricKeQ=)
---
In the end, though, the race went to a recount. **Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country.**

Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he listened.

Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But defeating Lauren Boebert is just too important to sit this out. **Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you to be all-in too?**

[**_Please, if you can afford to, will you split a donation right now between Adam’s campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia to help defeat Lauren Boebert and extremists across the country? We were outspent in 2022 and just barely lost. Whatever you can afford to give today will help us invest early and win._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61239992/399504428/729998634?refcode=20230403.2_AF_4F&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDAxMGNjOC02ZWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4Qvg-pjfA681Rx319sJhiWsYCNJ-xRMVh9hwNricKeQ=)

This is a journey we’re making again because so many people like you reached out and encouraged Adam to run one more time.

I know it means a lot to Adam that you have his back.

Thank you,

Katy
|
---

---

P.O. BOX 89202
Atlanta, GA 30312
United States

However, If you wish to unsubscribe you can do so [here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/502xl98alkm3J5MS-c04xA2?unsubscribedata=UoJv1d%2ByvHBUmYiCXI45KZ2aAbj99KbAPjsVf4hZhdVAfWrW7N6ygot%2BfdKtYUn01YEppnsVUja35OKtv7DblUSFJyqjj0NOqcjRCHHw03AOKE4FGxAkkYj8bk46COKzCFN28L1U24Q1EFDp4a%2Bw7IAnJpuoadG3B%2BW9h53YgkGqflusfOZwFwAkFhEa8ufW7XEJLaI0246JV5LmXJWBVQIcRy8smvo8ZwSu2t5b2EkDpAo5fiKc99tNp6O88oxiXdBarhZMPO1DwYqMGaky45p4MvdeFUQJvD%2FqvA0Z8%2BupBuW1ALO%2FBHyMZO6SqtEh9lqh5XEZi8IDiAloz%2FJ%2BlF0KRB4%2FAp3NkSHxQnXaXtQzuNcpIxPROmVr8zi37S3dVq2hTpj12yoGVounLi6%2F6W%2B4o2L1S18tTjbObbvYP5Dos91NOOAA6aiUV54NGlKk).

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We came close to the abyss in 2020. The race for Wisconsin’s Supreme Court seat tomorrow may decide whether we end up falling into it in 2024. Your support matters.
body:
Election Day tomorrow!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb13db798-811b-4811-ae17-6e92cff009df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Dan Kelly's a threat to democracy. Full stop._** **_[We must elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz to Wisconsin's Supreme Court.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc33a33cf-68b9-4158-ad43-160b11593a51/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It will provide a 4-3 majority to save our democracy from Trump's electoral theft & ensure millions of women control their bodies, not zealots & demagogues._** _* Please read this to understand how close we came to the abyss in 2020:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3702c231-45a0-44d0-b582-218e9509b52e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**ONE VOTE. We were one vote from authoritarian catastrophe.**_

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. subject: Countdown to WI
body:
Dan Kelly excused insurrectionists and election-deniers and showed his true colors by helping the Republican Party try to steal the 2020 election... | | |
---
| | The GOP-backed candidate for the Wisconsin Supreme Court has admitted to having “no problem” with insurrectionists – **probably because they’re bankrolling his candidacy.** Dan Kelly excused insurrectionists and election-deniers showing his true colors by helping the Republican Party try to steal the 2020 election for Donald Trump. He’s nowhere near fit enough to decide cases on voting laws, election outcomes, and our government – but time’s running out to stop him. **This race is just one day away.********With election-denying dark money groups pouring in $4 million dollars to swing this race for Kelly, we need to amass a _huge_ surge of grassroots support.** [ Can we count on your support? YOU can make the difference in critical races in battleground states that will determine the future of this nation. Any candidate who can so brazenly say that insurrectionists are “no problem” should not be representing us in elected office. In fact, Dan Kelly has no problem with:
❌ The people who violently stormed our nation’s capitol.
❌ That the will of the voters was threatened and that a mob tried to destroy our democracy.
❌ Denying us our rights, taking money from dangerous extremists, and rubber-stamping whatever right-wing agenda the Wisconsin GOP will try to enact.
With democracy, voting rights, access to abortion, and gerrymandering on the line in this special election, we MUST fight back against Dan Kelly’s complete disregard for our community and our futures.
[Please, we need you with us right now. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: What’s on your mind?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

Can you fill out my campaign’s April Priorities Survey? I’ve had a busy few weeks in the Senate, folks — introducing legislation to put our country on a path to net-zero agriculture emissions and reintroducing my bipartisan _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_ to enact key wildlife protections to conserve animals and plants for future generations. I’d love to hear your thoughts about what I’m working on, as well as what issues matter most to you. Will you take a few minutes to fill out my campaign’s April Priorities Survey? The first question is below: | **Martin’s _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_ would be the most significant conservation law since the _Endangered Species Act of 1973_. Do you support it and similar legislation to conserve our wildlife?**
Yes
No

body:

Peter,

Thank you Senator Briese | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1d34842f2707/n41kepo7ku-460811?e=25844e23a8)

---
| | Peter,
---
| Conservative Republicans in our State Senate are fighting for significant tax decreases, and we’re excited to share another BIG WIN for Nebraskans!

Due to Senator Tom Briese’s efforts to reform Nebraska Property Taxes, every homeowner and landowner in the state will keep more of their hard earned money.

We are grateful for the dedication of Senator Briese in spearheading this property tax relief in the bill he introduced [LB243](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=977d3c978b&e=25844e23a8), which just passed General File!
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=8fc20ca2f6&e=25844e23a8)
---
| This achievement for historic property tax relief is not a done deal yet, as there are still two more steps in the process before this bill becomes law.

_But when LB 243 becomes law_ , Nebraska Republican Senators will have set another precedent of advancing our party values of limited government, fiscal responsibility, and protected liberties.

**The Nebraska Republican Party will always support such efforts for every resident in our state!**

I hope you’ll consider getting into the fight with us to advocate for our values and help every Nebraskan remain aware of our continued WINS by offering a donation of any amount today.
---

| Sincerely,

name: Bradley Whitford (via WisDems)
subject: What’s at stake in Wisconsin:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
Fighting like hell is how we’ll win tomorrow - and it’s how we’ll protect abortion rights for years to come in states like Wisconsin.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61240608/399506400/2135170041?refcode=EM_FR_230403WISC_N_BW_FULL_6_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzI2Zjg0MC03MWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTjPybC_PafuIFuO0JyfcNhl_YA1Y-MGuc3lKG0yfQM=)
---
Hi there,

This is Bradley Whitford. I’m an actor and you might know me as the character Commander Lawrence in _The Handmaid’s Tale_. Some of you might know a little bit about the dystopian world depicted in that show, but **I’m writing to you about the very real stakes for so many women and marginalized communities in Wisconsin** if we don’t act on this historic opportunity to elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz and rebalance our state Supreme Court.

Since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, a criminal abortion ban from 1849 has been in place in Wisconsin. Governor Tony Evers has been fighting tooth and nail for reproductive freedom in the state, but with gerrymandered maps drawn in the Republicans’ favor, things are dire in Wisconsin.

Here’s the good news though: **the team at WisDems has a historic opportunity to rebalance the state Supreme Court in their fast-approaching election** — which could bring them one critical step closer to fair maps and access to reproductive health access in Wisconsin. [**Election Day is tomorrow, and the WisDems need your help to bring this home. Can you answer my call and split $10 to support Jennifer Wexton and WisDems so they can elect progressives like Judge Janet Protasiewicz?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61240609/399506401/2135170041?refcode=EM_FR_230403WISC_N_BW_FULL_6_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzI2Zjg0MC03MWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTjPybC_PafuIFuO0JyfcNhl_YA1Y-MGuc3lKG0yfQM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between the Wisconsin Democratic Party and Jennifer Wexton:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61240610/399506402/2135170041?express_lane=true&refcode=EM_FR_230403WISC_N_BW_FULL_6_NG_N_EB10&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzI2Zjg0MC03MWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTjPybC_PafuIFuO0JyfcNhl_YA1Y-MGuc3lKG0yfQM=)**

| | **[Other »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61240615/399506407/2135170041?refcode=EM_FR_230403WISC_N_BW_FULL_6_NG_N_EBother&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzI2Zjg0MC03MWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTjPybC_PafuIFuO0JyfcNhl_YA1Y-MGuc3lKG0yfQM=)**
---
Abortion and reproductive health care are critical. It's a freedom that came after centuries of forced pregnancies and sterilization, high mortality rates, and countless acts of violence.

**Right now, Wisconsin is central in the conversation to fortify abortion rights.** We can either elect pro-democracy, pro-choice leaders who fight like hell to protect reproductive freedom, or far-right leaders who will enforce an archaic abortion ban as the law of the land.

_We need to invest in Wisconsin like our rights depend on it_ — because frankly, they do. That’s why my friends at WisDems are counting on your help to raise an ambitious $250,000 before the polls close tomorrow and mobilize voters all across the state. **[Please, split a $10 donation to WisDems and Jennifer Wexton, help us stop this far-right nightmare, and elect progressives like Judge Janet Protasiewicz — _Wisconsin needs us to mobilize now!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61240616/399506408/2135170041?refcode=EM_FR_230403WISC_N_BW_FULL_6_NG_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzI2Zjg0MC03MWQyLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTjPybC_PafuIFuO0JyfcNhl_YA1Y-MGuc3lKG0yfQM=) **

clean_body: Fighting like hell is how we’ll win tomorrow - and it’s how we’ll protect abortion rights for years to come in states like Wisconsin. = Hi there, This is Bradley Whitford. I’m an actor and you might know me as the character Commander Lawrence in The Handmaid’s Tale. Some of you might know a little bit about the dystopian world depicted in that show, but I’m writing to you about the very real stakes for so many women and marginalized communities in Wisconsin if we don’t act on this historic opportunity to elect Judge Janet Protasiewicz and rebalance our state Supreme Court. Since Roe v. Wade was overturned, a criminal abortion ban from 1849 has been in place in Wisconsin. Governor Tony Evers has been fighting tooth and nail for reproductive freedom in the state, but with gerrymandered maps drawn in the Republicans’ favor, things are dire in Wisconsin. Here’s the good news though: the team at WisDems has a historic opportunity to rebalance the state Supreme Court in their fast-approaching election — which could bring them one critical step closer to fair maps and access to reproductive health access in Wisconsin. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between the Wisconsin Democratic Party and Jennifer Wexton: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Abortion and reproductive health care are critical. It's a freedom that came after centuries of forced pregnancies and sterilization, high mortality rates, and countless acts of violence. Right now, Wisconsin is central in the conversation to fortify abortion rights. We can either elect pro-democracy, pro-choice leaders who fight like hell to protect reproductive freedom, or far-right leaders who will enforce an archaic abortion ban as the law of the land. We need to invest in Wisconsin like our rights depend on it — because frankly, they do. That’s why my friends at WisDems are counting on your help to raise an ambitious $250,000 before the polls close tomorrow and mobilize voters all across the state. = Thank you, Bradley Whitford Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America. **=** Paid for by Wexton for Congress Wexton for Congress PO Box 650550 Sterling, VA 20165 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Friend,
Tomorrow, my father will be arrested despite having committed NO CRIME.
_It’s hard to believe I just typed those words. It’s hard to believe something so tyrannical could happen in America..._
...But this is the reality of our country now that the Radical Left Democrats run America.
As you know – and as I’ve personally witnessed my entire life – my father is a WARRIOR.
_He will not let this sham indictment stop our mission to Make America Great Again! Our movement will prevail – just as we’ve prevailed after every other vicious attack._

name: Ben Wikler
subject: We’ll think back to April 4th:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
A hypothetical - but possible - scenario of 2024 if we lose in April.
#
Wisconsin’s Supreme Court election will have a significant impact in 2024. Here’s why:
Imagine a hypothetical scenario where the 2024 presidential election is extremely close. Wisconsin could make-or-break our chances of electing a Democratic President. _Here’s an example:_
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em230403-2-t2&t=1&akid=4330%2E196590%2Ew0TL10)
[**We know this Supreme Court election will be close. We can’t afford to leave close, tight decisions up to a conservative Supreme Court. Split $5 between The Long Run and WisDems now to help us defeat far-right extremist Dan Kelly and save the 2024 election.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em230403-2-t2&t=2&akid=4330%2E196590%2Ew0TL10)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically evenly split between The Democratic Party of Wisconsin and The Long Run PAC:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.swMvtB&refcode=em230403-2-t2&t=21&akid=4330%2E196590%2Ew0TL10)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.DT_zdK&refcode=em230403-2-t2&t=22&akid=4330%2E196590%2Ew0TL10)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.zkrtZA&refcode=em230403-2-t2&t=23&akid=4330%2E196590%2Ew0TL10)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.B1zxC_&refcode=em230403-2-t2&t=24&akid=4330%2E196590%2Ew0TL10)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.jgEQ-M&refcode=em230403-2-t2&t=25&akid=4330%2E196590%2Ew0TL10)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em230403-2-t2&t=26&akid=4330%2E196590%2Ew0TL10)
Picture this: First, the Republican presidential candidate has an early lead in Wisconsin but thousands of absentee ballots have yet to be counted—especially in Milwaukee County, one of the most Democratic counties in the state.
Then, the Supreme Court issues a ruling at 10 pm on Election Day to stop absentee counting based on unverified GOP claims. It comes down to a 4-3 decision with Dan Kelly, the WisGOP’s former “election integrity advisor,” as the deciding vote.
**A 4-3 decision, with Dan Kelly as the decider, would not only stall voting—it might leave thousands of ballots uncounted or thrown out.** The Court would hand Trump or DeSantis (or any Republican) the victory in this hypothetical, but also possible, scenario.
Folks across the country in places like Pennsylvania would watch in despair. _You and I would think back to this Supreme Court election in 2023 where we had a chance to defeat Dan Kelly and elect a pro-democracy justice like Janet Protasiewicz._
We can’t let a hypothetical scenario like this play out — and it won’t if Judge Janet Protasiewicz wins this election. [**Can you chip in $5 right now to help WisDems and The Long Run to defeat Dan Kelly and prevent this nightmare scenario from ever becoming reality?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em230403-2-t2&t=27&akid=4330%2E196590%2Ew0TL10)
Your support will propel our victory-winning operation forward, help elect progressives like Janet Protasiewicz, and prevent this hellish outcome. Thank you.
Ben Wikler
Chair, WisDems

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=4330%2E196590%2Ew0TL10). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=4330%2E196590%2Ew0TL10)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=4330_196590_w0TL10&akid=4330%2E196590%2Ew0TL10)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=31&akid=4330%2E196590%2Ew0TL10)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

The Wisconsin Democratic Party is working to elect a pro-voting, pro-democracy, pro-abortion rights candidate, while facing off against a far-right extremist who represents the exact opposite — with a campaign fueled by millions of dollars from election-denying groups.
Whoever wins this once-in-a-decade race will be the deciding vote on critical issues that could have a massive impact on people in every corner of the country. With election day less than 24 hours away, **we need all hands on deck to support the Wisconsin Democratic Party as they lead the charge to reach voters.**
The stakes have never been higher. If a pro-voting candidate wins the open seat that’s up for grabs tomorrow it would shift control of the court to a 4-3 majority that could defend voting rights in the 2024 election and beyond, undo extreme gerrymandering that’s thwarted the will of the people, and reverse some of the most damaging policies like the state’s 1849 abortion ban.
